name: GOTV PAC
subject: Two billionaires are coming for the PA Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25]
Peter ,
We want to turn your attention to one of the most important elections this November: The Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
Right now, two billionaires, Leonard Leo – architect of the Trump Supreme Court – and Jeff Yass – Greg Abbott's biggest donor who just helped Trump rig the Texas maps – are now pouring millions into Pennsylvania to try and flip the state's Supreme Court.
Why? Because the Pennsylvania Supreme Court decides redistricting, and if these billionaires can buy Republicans a majority, they'll gerrymander Democrats out of power for the next decade.
Yass has already spent millions propping up far-right judges and funneling dark money into attack ads. Now he's teaming up with Leo and the Republican State Leadership Committee to run a "Vote No in November" campaign against Democratic justices. If they succeed, they won't just wreck Pennsylvania's courts; they'll hand Trump's MAGA machine another tool to dismantle democracy.
Can you chip in $15 right now to help us take on the billionaire machine trying to buy the courts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08182025&amount=25] We already took down Elon Musk in April when he tried to buy the Wisconsin Supreme Court; now we're ready to do the same in Pennsylvania.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: This is how MAGA is dismantling our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
When Trump took office, the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints.
There are reportedly just three lawyers left in the whole department. This is just another step on the MAGA plan to dismantle our democracy and leave them in control.
The threat is clear, folks, as states pass more suppressive legislation and Trump attacks the way we vote. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend our fundamental right to vote and more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081825_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081825_2&amount=25]
This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :
" Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "
This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month.
It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months.
Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081825_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_2&amount=35]
The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote.
But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.
You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever.
Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $25 or more right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081825_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081825_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081825_2&amount=20]

name: John Bisognano, NDRC
subject: No more gerrymandering, no more Big Ugly Bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We can’t let them gerrymander their way to holding the House
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113561957/564191329/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNTE0NDA0LTkwN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1jbHJ9IDTtm-UCT1OFX4kEcNy4UW1ImYu0mTFfgb7Ao=&emci=0c54a4ca-647c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b0514404-907c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)

_[**NO MORE BIG UGLY BILLS.
DONATE NOW >> **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113561958/564191330/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_BBBFollowup_email_20250818-NDRC-Tier1-BBBFollowup_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250818-NDRC-Tier1-BBBFollowup_&utm_campaign=BBBFollowup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNTE0NDA0LTkwN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1jbHJ9IDTtm-UCT1OFX4kEcNy4UW1ImYu0mTFfgb7Ao=)_ Hey Peter, Trump’s Big Ugly Bill is now law — and the fact is, most Americans wish it wasn’t. According to Pew Research, way more Americans opposed the legislation (49%) than supported it (29%), and **“most Americans are doubtful they would benefit from the bill.” In fact, I think it’s the worst polling I’ve ever seen on a bill!** Turns out, people don't like having health care stripped away, or food assistance slashed, or climate progress reversed, or massive tax cuts that primarily benefit the wealthy. So, what do these folks do after they passed such a deeply unpopular bill? Of course, pick up the pen and start: **gerrymandering!** That’s why our work _today_ is so important. By stopping a new, extreme gerrymander in Texas, by fighting to defend Black and Latino opportunity districts, by supporting pro-democracy candidates — this is how we undo the damage that’s being done by this Congress and start to fix the country we love. **But to do this, we have to put in the work and make the necessary investments.[The single best way for you to help right now is by starting a monthly donation to make sure we have the steady support we need in the redistricting battles ahead — through the end of 2025 and into the 2026 midterms.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113561959/564191331/-279538265?recurring=1&refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_BBBFollowup_email_20250818-NDRC-Tier1-BBBFollowup_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250818-NDRC-Tier1-BBBFollowup_&utm_campaign=BBBFollowup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNTE0NDA0LTkwN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1jbHJ9IDTtm-UCT1OFX4kEcNy4UW1ImYu0mTFfgb7Ao=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Republicans know their only path to success in continuing to hold on to power in the U.S. House is to gerrymander states as much as they possibly can.
If their current effort to redraw Texas’s congressional map works out the way Trump has demanded — a “ruthless” gerrymander to pick up five more Republican seats — then regaining a majority next year gets that much tougher. And they’re already turning their sights to other states where they think they can run the same playbook.
**We have to do everything possible to stop these attacks on democracy and make sure voters have a fair chance to make their voices heard.[Start a monthly gift to power the fight for fair maps every single month!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113561968/564191340/-279538265?recurring=1&refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_BBBFollowup_email_20250818-NDRC-Tier1-BBBFollowup_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250818-NDRC-Tier1-BBBFollowup_&utm_campaign=BBBFollowup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNTE0NDA0LTkwN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1jbHJ9IDTtm-UCT1OFX4kEcNy4UW1ImYu0mTFfgb7Ao=)**

clean_body: We can’t let them gerrymander their way to holding the House | = Hey Peter, Trump’s Big Ugly Bill is now law — and the fact is, most Americans wish it wasn’t. According to Pew Research, way more Americans opposed the legislation (49%) than supported it (29%), and “most Americans are doubtful they would benefit from the bill.” In fact, I think it’s the worst polling I’ve ever seen on a bill! Turns out, people don't like having health care stripped away, or food assistance slashed, or climate progress reversed, or massive tax cuts that primarily benefit the wealthy. So, what do these folks do after they passed such a deeply unpopular bill? Of course, pick up the pen and start: gerrymandering! That’s why our work today is so important. By stopping a new, extreme gerrymander in Texas, by fighting to defend Black and Latino opportunity districts, by supporting pro-democracy candidates — this is how we undo the damage that’s being done by this Congress and start to fix the country we love. But to do this, we have to put in the work and make the necessary investments.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = = Republicans know their only path to success in continuing to hold on to power in the U.S. House is to gerrymander states as much as they possibly can. If their current effort to redraw Texas’s congressional map works out the way Trump has demanded — a “ruthless” gerrymander to pick up five more Republican seats — then regaining a majority next year gets that much tougher. And they’re already turning their sights to other states where they think they can run the same playbook. We have to do everything possible to stop these attacks on democracy and make sure voters have a fair chance to make their voices heard.= = Thanks for being in this fight alongside us, John Bisognano President National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m back, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30]
Derek,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
That’s why, today , I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.
Will you chip in $30 or more now – split between Tim Kaine and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30]
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price.
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:
Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $30 or $15 now, split between Tim Kaine and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?express_lane=true&amount=30]
CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?express_lane=true&amount=100]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?express_lane=true&amount=250]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown]
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

name: DNC HQ
subject: re: California
body:
This isn’t politics as usual.
---
Derek, We’re about to ask you to **[donate directly to the DNC today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250818_4341_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4341_22930333_F-imyw&akid=4341%2E22930333%2EF-imyw)** If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: Republicans want to rig the 2026 election to make sure they control Congress — regardless of how the people vote. **This isn’t politics as usual. It’s an emergency for our democracy. And we can’t just stand by and let Trump burn everything down.** Democrats are fighting fire with fire. In California, Governor Gavin Newsom just called for a statewide ballot measure to counter Republicans’ gerrymandering efforts in Texas. This new measure would level the playing field and help make sure voters decide who runs the House of Representatives — _not Donald Trump._ But the truth is, this fight isn’t going to be easy. If this measure is on the ballot, Republicans will spend whatever it takes to stop it from succeeding. **[That’s why we’re asking for your help. Can you chip in a $3 donation today and help fund Democrats’ efforts to protect our democracy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250818_4341_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4341_22930333_F-imyw&akid=4341%2E22930333%2EF-imyw)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking, Peter
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.

Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind -- while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.**[**Will you chip in $5 or more now -- to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)**
---
****
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for -- and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life -- but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
[****I’m personally asking, Peter : If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-brown-dnc?refcode=em250818&refcode2=696_2563979_g7ZX9m&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=696%2E2563979%2Eg7ZX9m)**

* **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas Democrats end walkout over redistricting as California prepares to retaliate," **AP's**Bill Barrow** and**Fernanda Figueroa** \-- "Texas Democrats ended a two-week walkout Monday that stalled Republican efforts to redraw congressional districts as part of [a national partisan brawl](https://substack.com/redirect/2d369501-0e5f-4a59-aad1-d0bc1aa22769?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over President **Donald Trump 's** desire to reshape U.S. House maps to his advantage.

Their return to the Texas Capitol -- which will now involve escorts by state police to make sure the lawmakers don't bolt again -- puts the Republican-run Legislature in position to satisfy Trump's demands as California Democrats separately [advance new congressional boundaries](https://substack.com/redirect/705c3e59-437b-4661-b097-feb951924fbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in retaliation. The tit-for-tat puts the nation's two most populous states at the center of an expanding fight over [control of Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/9f37101e-ca67-4990-aa53-f08875434f1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. The battle also has [rallied Democrats nationally](https://substack.com/redirect/53329923-d21b-49fe-9a8f-47a1d59b355f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after infighting and frustrations among the party's own voters since Republicans took control of the White House and Capitol Hill in January.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/ba09a7b4-f15e-4cba-9c7a-852e5518c640?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In Texas, dozens of state House Democrats left the state Aug. 3 to deny their Republican-majority colleagues the attendance necessary to vote on redrawn maps intended to send five more Texas Republicans to Washington. After spending nearly two weeks in Illinois and elsewhere, they declared victory when Republicans adjourned their first special session on Friday and Democrats around the country rallied in opposition to the Trump-led gerrymandering effort. They pointed specifically to [California's release of proposed maps](https://substack.com/redirect/f2d9effc-26bb-4f9b-b0fe-69435997eb46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) intended to increase Democrats' U.S. House advantage by five seats, effectively neutralizing any Republican gains in Texas.

Many of the absent Democrats left Chicago early Monday and landed hours later at a private airfield in Austin, where several boarded a large charter bus to the Capitol. Once inside, they were greeted by cheering supporters. And for the first time since Trump's redistricting push accelerated into a national issue, the Texas House floor was near full capacity when lawmakers convened briefly Monday afternoon.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/ba09a7b4-f15e-4cba-9c7a-852e5518c640?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Republican House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** did not mention redistricting on the floor Monday but promised swift action on the Legislature's agenda.

"The majority has the right to prevail. The minority has the right to be heard," the speaker said. "We are done waiting."

Burrows had previously issued civil arrest warrants for the absent lawmakers under House rules, and his office said Monday that Texas Department of Public Safety officers will follow the previously departed lawmakers around the clock to ensure that they return again.

Cheering supporters greeted returning lawmakers inside the Capitol before the House convened for a brief session.

"We killed the corrupt special session, withstood unprecedented surveillance and intimidation, and rallied Democrats nationwide to join this existential fight for fair representation -- reshaping the entire 2026 landscape," Texas House Minority Leader**Gene Wu** said in a written statement.

Wu has promised Democrats would challenge the new designs in court.

The House did not take up any bills Monday and was not scheduled to return until Wednesday." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/9edc0d7a-9ae6-48c9-ae3f-71006791923a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**" Returning Texas House Democrats put on around-the-clock surveillance," **Houston Chronicle's**Taylor Goldenstein** , **Bayliss Wagner** and **John C. Moritz** \-- "The Texas House is assigning state troopers to monitor Democratic lawmakers who returned to the Capitol on Monday, an extraordinary step as GOP leaders seek to prevent another disruption in their push to redraw the state's congressional maps.

From the dais, House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** on Monday said he would not allow the Democrats to leave the chamber unless they agreed to be released into the custody of a designated Department of Public Safety escort, who will "ensure your return Wednesday" when the body meets next.

He noted that civil arrest warrants were still in place for the handful of Democrats who did not return on Monday from their two-week walkout over the redistricting plan.

The escorts, whom a House official confirmed would be watching "around the clock," represent a major escalation in that effort and test the limits of what can be done to enforce a House rule and civil warrant not directly linked to any state or federal law.

After the House adjourned Monday, dozens of Democrats lined up in a hallway behind the chamber to sign permission slips.

Members were each paired with plainclothes DPS agents. There was a levity to the scene as members and their escorts became acquainted, neither seeming totally clear on the details of the situation.

After a Hearst Newspapers reporter asked who his designated escort was, state Rep. **John Bryant** said, "I don't know."

"I am," said the man standing next to him.

Bryant asked the trooper if he was coming home to Dallas with him.

"They told me I have to stay glued to your hip," the trooper, who declined to provide his full name, said.

Republican leaders have been working to bring down the hammer on Democrats who fled the state earlier this month to deny the chamber a quorum.

In addition to new $500-per-day fines on members who joined the exodus, Burrows had already moved to cut members' office budgets and force members to pick up paychecks in person, rather than through electronic payment. Attorney General **Ken Paxton** filed suits trying to force out-of-state authorities to coordinate with Texas to bring them home (thus far unsuccessful), and Gov. **Greg Abbott** has filed suit to have House Democratic Caucus Chairman **Gene Wu** , of Houston, removed from office." TOP NEWS " Texas Democrats end walkout over redistricting as California prepares to retaliate," AP'sBill Barrow andFernanda Figueroa \-- "Texas Democrats ended a two-week walkout Monday that stalled Republican efforts to redraw congressional districts as part of over President Donald Trump 's desire to reshape U.S. House maps to his advantage. Their return to the Texas Capitol -- which will now involve escorts by state police to make sure the lawmakers don't bolt again -- puts the Republican-run Legislature in position to satisfy Trump's demands as California Democrats separately in retaliation. The tit-for-tat puts the nation's two most populous states at the center of an expanding fight over ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. The battle also has after infighting and frustrations among the party's own voters since Republicans took control of the White House and Capitol Hill in January. In Texas, dozens of state House Democrats left the state Aug. 3 to deny their Republican-majority colleagues the attendance necessary to vote on redrawn maps intended to send five more Texas Republicans to Washington. After spending nearly two weeks in Illinois and elsewhere, they declared victory when Republicans adjourned their first special session on Friday and Democrats around the country rallied in opposition to the Trump-led gerrymandering effort. They pointed specifically to intended to increase Democrats' U.S. House advantage by five seats, effectively neutralizing any Republican gains in Texas. Many of the absent Democrats left Chicago early Monday and landed hours later at a private airfield in Austin, where several boarded a large charter bus to the Capitol. Once inside, they were greeted by cheering supporters. And for the first time since Trump's redistricting push accelerated into a national issue, the Texas House floor was near full capacity when lawmakers convened briefly Monday afternoon. Republican House Speaker Dustin Burrows did not mention redistricting on the floor Monday but promised swift action on the Legislature's agenda. "The majority has the right to prevail. The minority has the right to be heard," the speaker said. "We are done waiting." Burrows had previously issued civil arrest warrants for the absent lawmakers under House rules, and his office said Monday that Texas Department of Public Safety officers will follow the previously departed lawmakers around the clock to ensure that they return again. Cheering supporters greeted returning lawmakers inside the Capitol before the House convened for a brief session. "We killed the corrupt special session, withstood unprecedented surveillance and intimidation, and rallied Democrats nationwide to join this existential fight for fair representation -- reshaping the entire 2026 landscape," Texas House Minority LeaderGene Wu said in a written statement. Wu has promised Democrats would challenge the new designs in court. The House did not take up any bills Monday and was not scheduled to return until Wednesday." " Returning Texas House Democrats put on around-the-clock surveillance," Houston Chronicle'sTaylor Goldenstein , Bayliss Wagner and John C. Moritz \-- "The Texas House is assigning state troopers to monitor Democratic lawmakers who returned to the Capitol on Monday, an extraordinary step as GOP leaders seek to prevent another disruption in their push to redraw the state's congressional maps. From the dais, House Speaker Dustin Burrows on Monday said he would not allow the Democrats to leave the chamber unless they agreed to be released into the custody of a designated Department of Public Safety escort, who will "ensure your return Wednesday" when the body meets next. He noted that civil arrest warrants were still in place for the handful of Democrats who did not return on Monday from their two-week walkout over the redistricting plan. The escorts, whom a House official confirmed would be watching "around the clock," represent a major escalation in that effort and test the limits of what can be done to enforce a House rule and civil warrant not directly linked to any state or federal law. After the House adjourned Monday, dozens of Democrats lined up in a hallway behind the chamber to sign permission slips. Members were each paired with plainclothes DPS agents. There was a levity to the scene as members and their escorts became acquainted, neither seeming totally clear on the details of the situation. After a Hearst Newspapers reporter asked who his designated escort was, state Rep. John Bryant said, "I don't know." "I am," said the man standing next to him. Bryant asked the trooper if he was coming home to Dallas with him. "They told me I have to stay glued to your hip," the trooper, who declined to provide his full name, said. Republican leaders have been working to bring down the hammer on Democrats who fled the state earlier this month to deny the chamber a quorum. In addition to new $500-per-day fines on members who joined the exodus, Burrows had already moved to cut members' office budgets and force members to pick up paychecks in person, rather than through electronic payment. Attorney General Ken Paxton filed suits trying to force out-of-state authorities to coordinate with Texas to bring them home (thus far unsuccessful), and Gov. Greg Abbott has filed suit to have House Democratic Caucus Chairman Gene Wu , of Houston, removed from office." name: Adam Schiff
subject: Weather warnings save lives. Republicans are cutting them.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8917%2E5257348%2EV9EXAs)
Derek,
When it comes to wildfires, floods, hurricanes, and extreme heat, accurate, _timely weather forecasts and alerts can mean the difference between life and death._
But right now, the National Weather Service (NWS), the agency responsible for warning millions of Americans about dangerous weather events, is facing massive staffing shortages due to the Trump administration’s reckless budget cuts.
Just take California, for example: two of the six NWS offices are operating with **more than half of their positions vacant.** These are the offices that issue wildfire warnings, support first responders on the ground, and help farmers plan their crops — and they’re short-staffed in the middle of an active fire season.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8917%2E5257348%2EV9EXAs)
That’s why I’m pushing back hard and using every tool at my disposal to do so.
I blew the whistle on these dangerous cuts and made sure the public was aware of what Trump and his agency were doing. I’ve started to conduct rigorous oversight over this decision – who knew what, when, and why they chose to target my constituents. I’m fighting to get answers.
**I’ve introduced the _INSURE Act_ to help stabilize the home insurance market, and I’m fighting to reverse these staffing cuts at NWS and NOAA, because climate disasters are becoming more frequent. Instead of preparing, Trump and his allies are dismantling the very infrastructure that keeps us safe. I won’t stand for that.**
**[If you believe we should fully fund NWS and NOAA so they can protect our communities from deadly weather events, please add your name to my petition today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202508-nws.Tmg3Py&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=8917%2E5257348%2EV9EXAs)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202508-nws.Tmg3Py&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=6&akid=8917%2E5257348%2EV9EXAs)
---
Protecting life and property from natural disasters shouldn’t be a partisan issue. And yet, somehow, Trump has made it that way.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5307?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8917%2E5257348%2EV9EXAs)

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Caregivers are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113562333/564217177/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250818_FR_HealthCaregivers_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGUxYmY2Ni05NzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zzfj4e0SFNswKy_LMfF1tsBWAzxLZ0CXkGPLLKwF9aA=&emci=d9126a60-977c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a8e1bf66-977c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6108787) | **_Peter — the people who care for our most vulnerable are staring down a crisis._**

The President’s reconciliation law, now in effect, slashes nearly $1 trillion from Medicaid. These cuts threaten the pay, benefits, and stability of **millions** of caregivers who help seniors, people with disabilities, and working families in California’s 19th Congressional District and across the country.

These caregivers are the ones who feed, bathe, transport, and comfort our loved ones when we cannot. They keep people safe in emergencies. They stay through the night. They do it out of compassion, but they also do it to support their own families, many of whom also rely on Medicaid to get by.

They do it out of compassion, but they also do it to support their own families, many of whom also rely on Medicaid to get by. I am fighting in Congress to reverse these cruel cuts and defend the care workers our communities depend on. clean_body: | | | ** Donald Trump just announced he wants to lead a “movement” to end mail-in voting. Friend, we won’t let it happen. Our next chance to show Donald Trump that we will DEFEND democracy is winning Virginia’s House of Delegates elections in just over 70 days - and I’m running in one of the most important red-to-blue toss-ups. Previously, as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates, I passed laws allowing any eligible voter to cast a ballot by mail. Now, I’m running to return to the chamber to defend our work and fight Donald Trump. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I need you with me right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hey there -

We’re coming to you directly — we need you and we need your help now .

Every dollar counts and we need to make sure we have the funds to fight the MAGA agenda, Trump, and his raving cabinet of extremists.

Having fighters in Congress is critical to push back against the destruction of our economy. Can you chip in to help us stay in the fight?

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Aug2025-FR-August?&refcode=E14693-20250818-MidMonth-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25]

In solidarity,

- Team Swalwell
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2025-fr-august?refcode=E14673-20250817-Mid-month-footer-Other&amount=25]
http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP [http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP]
Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. Join Swalwell's Circle, Eric's inner circle of supporters, by committing to a $50 or more monthly contribution today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/esca-14-email-Footer-FR-SwalwellsCircle?refcode=E14673-20250817-Mid-month-footer-Other&amount=50&recurring=auto]
Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd like to receive only the most critical updates, sign up for his Break Glass in Case of Urgency list to receive less email. name: Naomi at Grijalva HQ
subject: Educators for Adelita!🍎📝
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
🚨9 days left until early voting! We need all hands on deck!🤩

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0da979ab26ce/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308841?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=a7cdd0f259&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | | | | |
# JOIN US THIS WEEK
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| | Hi Peter,
There are just **NINE DAYS LEFT** until ballots drop for the Special general election on **TUESDAY SEPTEMBER 23RD** —and we need _all hands on deck_ for our future, **para nuestro pueblo**.
This week is packed with opportunities to show up for **Adelita** , for your **community** , and for your **future self** :
🗓️ **Tuesday, Aug 19 @ 5:30 PM** – [Phonebanking Kickoff | 5:30–7:30PM](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=6ef7277ab5&e=f7c3700ccb)🚪 **Saturday, Aug 23 @ 8:30 AM** – [Canvass in _Tucson_](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=718ee1533c&e=f7c3700ccb)
🚪 **Sunday, Aug 24 @ 3pm (Tucson) / 4:30pm (Nogales)** – [Canvass in _Nogales_](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=07faf41c6e&e=f7c3700ccb)
The stakes are high: our students, our Department of Education, our future. This fight starts with us—**talking to voters, turning them out, and showing them what’s possible when we organize**.
So—will you be joining us? 👊🏽
---
| | **Here’s what’s happening this week:****Canvassing Door to Door!** Help us make phone calls, go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face. We start our phonebanking **tomorrow!** ☎️ We have our **Tucson** and **Yuma** canvass**Saturday**! 🍎📝 **&****Sunday,** we have our Carpool Canvass in **Nogales** _🚙_
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=c47dc8a414&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **Saturday Canvass in Tucson** Saturday, August 23rd @ 8:30 AM2720 E Broadway Blvd. Tucson, AZ
---
| [RSVP to Tucson Canvasses!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=f561388a92&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=4228613ff8&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **FOR OUR PEOPLE FOR OUR PUEBLO IN YUMA****JOIN US!** Saturday, August 23rd @ 4:00 PM
---
| [RSVP for YUMA!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=78e5679198&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=b69f023b0e&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **CARPOOL CANVASS****NOGALES****JOIN US** Sunday, August 24th @ 5:30PM
---
| [RSVP for NOGALES!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=a70b22b5b9&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=ba74471914&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **VIRTUAL PHONE BANK****JOIN US** TOMORROW August 19th @ 5:30PM
---
| [RSVP to VIRTUAL PHONE BANK](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=c8dd762f97&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| | For a smoother experience, please**download MiniVAN ahead of your canvass**. [Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=0239a26a30&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=b2f24afff9&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=8cf412e0a6&e=f7c3700ccb).
---
| | Will you be joining us this weekend? 🤩
Thank you for all the energy you’ve brought so far—your time, your voice, and your presence are making a real difference. As we head into these final weeks, let’s stay grounded in our shared purpose and continue showing up for one another.
This work isn’t easy, but it’s essential. Just like in the classroom, change happens step by step, conversation by conversation.
If you have any questions or need anything from our team, we’re here to support you. Reach out anytime at **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
Let’s keep learning, growing, and building—together.
**Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**
---

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: We know things feel scary right now, but we are not powerless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Three small ways you can take action this week
#
Peter — **we know things feel scary right now, but we are not powerless.**
Here are three small ways you can take action this week:
1. **Check in with your neighbors + loved ones.** The GOP wants us to be divided + isolated. That gives them power. But building connections with everyday people in our communities is one of our best defenses.

2. **Volunteer for a candidate or cause you care about.** Whether it’s protecting reproductive rights, defending voting access, or flipping a key seat, your time and energy can make a real impact.

3. **[Chip in $3 or more today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93908?refcode=em20250818-9293&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9293%2E614464%2EJVG9u6)** Electing Democrats has never been more urgent. Your donation — of even just $3 — will help us recruit candidates, run ads, and mobilize voters in key elections across the country.

Together, we can build an unstoppable movement. One step at a time.
Thanks for joining us.
— State Democrats HQ

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Trump is holding funds for victims hostage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250818&t=1001&akid=1917%2E1088799%2ENTsz8Z ]Rob Bonta

Friends,

Trump and U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi are trying to bully California
into joining the Administration’s cruel and frenzied immigration agenda —
and they’re hurting victims and survivors of crime in the process.

Every year, federal Victims of Crime Act (VOCA) grants provide critical
funding to help nearly 10 million victims and survivors of domestic
violence, sexual assault, hate crimes, and other crimes nationwide. Here
in California, those grants are used to fund resources like emergency
shelters, counseling, sexual assault forensic exams, funeral costs, and
domestic violence services.

These are essential services for people who need support during some of
the most difficult and traumatic moments in their lives.

Now, the Trump administration is threatening to withhold $1 billion of
funding for victims and survivors unless states agree to participate in
his inhumane immigration enforcement agenda.

That’s why today I sued Trump and Pam Bondi to stop this unlawful and
immoral attack. These grants have nothing to do with immigration
enforcement — they exist to protect public safety and help survivors
reclaim their lives after tragedy.

Let’s be clear — only Congress has the power of the purse and the power to
decide how these funds get spent. This administration’s actions are
unconstitutional, dangerous, and wrong — and that’s why we’re taking him
to court, again.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250818-pet/?t=1002&akid=1917%2E1088799%2ENTsz8Z ]If you agree that the President cannot strong-arm California into
participating in their federal immigration agenda by illegally withholding
critical funds for victims, I’m asking you to sign your name on my
petition today.

ADD MY NAME

I’ll never back down when it comes to protecting the most vulnerable in
our communities.

Thanks for reading,

Rob

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1023?t=1003&akid=1917%2E1088799%2ENTsz8Z ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: [ ]Rob Bonta Friends, Trump and U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi are trying to bully California into joining the Administration’s cruel and frenzied immigration agenda — and they’re hurting victims and survivors of crime in the process. Every year, federal Victims of Crime Act (VOCA) grants provide critical funding to help nearly 10 million victims and survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, hate crimes, and other crimes nationwide. Here in California, those grants are used to fund resources like emergency shelters, counseling, sexual assault forensic exams, funeral costs, and domestic violence services. These are essential services for people who need support during some of the most difficult and traumatic moments in their lives. Now, the Trump administration is threatening to withhold $1 billion of funding for victims and survivors unless states agree to participate in his inhumane immigration enforcement agenda. That’s why today I sued Trump and Pam Bondi to stop this unlawful and immoral attack. These grants have nothing to do with immigration enforcement — they exist to protect public safety and help survivors reclaim their lives after tragedy. Let’s be clear — only Congress has the power of the purse and the power to decide how these funds get spent. This administration’s actions are unconstitutional, dangerous, and wrong — and that’s why we’re taking him to court, again. [ ]If you agree that the President cannot strong-arm California into participating in their federal immigration agenda by illegally withholding critical funds for victims, I’m asking you to sign your name on my petition today. ADD MY NAME I’ll never back down when it comes to protecting the most vulnerable in our communities. Thanks for reading, Rob [ ][IMG] Rob Bonta Attorney General of California

body:

| | |
# **Death Spiral 2025**
---
# How This Potential Debt-Crisis Could Financially Cripple Retirees
---
| | |
---
Sean Hannity here, listen up. If you don't understand how this works, your retirement savings may be at more risk than it needs to be. So here’s the big picture:** ** 2008 vaporized $2.4 trillion in retirement savings. We watched good people lose decades of work in weeks. Today the same red lights are flashing - and nobody's paying attention:
---
* 2 million+ jobs on the line...
* Stocks poised for a 25% nose-dive...
* IRAs and 401(k)s vulnerable to 25% losses, or worse.

---
You can’t stop a recession from happening.** ** But you CAN refuse to be its next victim... >>> And millions of Americans have no idea [_**this option is available.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsofrp0c14u7lk6b559g65t3rfo0ird5qn57oht8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clie2o34c9h2bs) If you’re an American citizen, this is available to you now. You don’t have to be rich to use it. And whether you got $50k or $500k in retirement savings, you can elect this option before your next tax filing date. But it may be wise to act sooner. More millionaires are taking steps to avoid a possible 2025 Death Spiral. Billionaires are taking these steps too. In fact, even central banks around the world are taking these very steps to help protect their trillions of dollars from a global crisis. So before the possible Death Spiral**** comes our way, help protect your money any way you can. This may be our best hope.

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: The #1 Washing Machine Hack I Wish I Knew Sooner
body:
Tired of musty-smelling laundry? This simple washing machine hack is going viral — and for good reason. It removes hidden mold, grime, and bacteria that regular detergents miss. Thousands are using it to get fresher clothes and a healthier home in minutes. No tools, no scrubbing, just a powerful clean. Discover the #1 washer trick people wish they found sooner!

| Is Your Washing Machine Making You and Your Family Sick?
---

****
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsecqa82md5mdlioo4g52ki9cvbalmj5ch2hjap8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)
---
**
**

| Don't judge me, okay? But I have to be honest... I'm a 39 year old woman, and I do laundry at my mom's house. I know some people could say that I'm too old to rely on my mother to get my laundry done, but I am a single mother, and I need every bit of help I can get. Plus, when I do laundry over there, it's a great excuse to spend time with her, which she likes, too. But something strange started happening. My laundry started smelling worse and worse, like rot and mildew. And every time I washed them, they smelled worse! I asked my mom if she knew what was going on, but she just shrugged. "It's a new machine, I don't know what to tell you," she said. I decided I had to take it into my own hands, so the next time I went over there, I had a plan. I ran the machine with just bleach, thinking that it could clean the machine and kill the smell. But nope. It smelled worse somehow! I asked my mom again to do something. I told her that my kids are stinking up the place at school, and that I don't want them to get bullied. "Can't you hire a plumber or something to figure it out?" I asked. But she just shrugged, "Why don't you just do your laundry at the laundromat if you want to make such a stink about it." But going to a laundromat? Not a chance. I was going to have to find a solution on my own. Then I had a lightbulb moment: I WOULD go to the laundromat. But just for information- I would ask the workers how they clean their machines. If I cleaned my mom's machine like they did, the stinky smell would be eliminated! When I walked in, I saw a man with coveralls and a name patch, Louis. I pretended like I wanted to do laundry there, then I asked him how he kept his machines clean. "Easy! We use Splash Spotless washing machine tablets," he said. "The dissolve throughout an entire hot cycle, slowly disintegrating," "They professionally scrub every nook and cranny of the machine "It foams up, so the soap can get to the bottom of the residue, washing it away "Leaving our machines clean and smelling so fresh!" I was impressed! These [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfo7a1ced1465n1hi8pbvsnq32sbd5s5q54mir3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) tablets sounded great. I asked him if he used anything else, or just Splash Spotless. "Nope, just Splash Spotless!" he told me, "We tried other cleaning solutions, but Splash Spotless is the cheapest, plus it works the best using surfactant chemistry to eliminate the root cause of stinky machines." I hadn't even thought of the root cause! I asked him why machines start stinking. "Bacteria, ma'am" Mario looked freaked out, "Or as I like to call it--"washateria." They love a damp, humid, dark place, so washing machines are the perfect place for them to set up shop. We even saw on the news a few months ago about a customer getting sick from a bacteria-filled laundromat." "But that would never happen here, since we use Splash Spotless every 30 washes," he said, proudly. "Great!" I said, and started out the door. "Where are you going!?" he said, "Are you going to grab your laundry?" I laughed, "Nope, sorry!" When I got home I looked up [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0erbg51fjj029eqr3iqkpvdd12u3m69lqsko3cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) online to check the reviews. I wanted to double check they worked before I spent my money. And holy reviews, Batman! Splash Spotless had 12,936 5 star reviews!
---
**
**

|
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuu33bus4shdreckrbjvmhce65qt0i6thhvqo3kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)
---
**
**

|
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb5fm2gdrfljk7lv5ss34affvsc6dlc8p6svcc80_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)
---
**
**

| I hadn't ever heard of [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm5pcjq61hkjbthj1tpov4tt7pt86o7gefqnjpb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) before, so I decided to do a little research of my own before I went out and got one.
## What is it?
Splash Spotless tablets are easy-to-use washing machine cleaners that are safer and more effective than bleach. They keep your washing machine and clothes fresh for a whole month! Splash Spotless tablets work by deep cleaning your machine so that it stays clean for a month. Check out this short video to see how Splash Spotless works to clean your washing machine:
---
**
**

|
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd9uklttohth5mgv2lp7vb0gfdf301vfvoctopdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)
---
**
**

| Healthy, Happy, Family Health begins and ends with cleanliness. That's why hospitals are so concerned with being sterile. Splash Spotless tablets keep your washing machine clean, which is a key step. Clean, Fresh Clothes Is there anything worse than smelling bad? It is so embarrassing. [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6rpuo7qrme5av44hspopoh3uonfoq2le438ftpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)tablets guarantee that your clothes will smell great! Mold Preventative Mold is a dangerous and sneaky health hazard. It makes millions of Americans sick every year. Splash Spotless tablets prevent mold from one of its sneakiest home bases. Fresh Linens Throughout The House Your whole house is affected by the way your washing machine works. How can a house truly feel clean if the pillowcases smell like mildew, even just a little bit. There will be no more mildew scent with these amazing tablets. Extend washing machine life It is well known that if you take care of your things, they will last longer. [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7kcbd9pqr1ha3abbkbt2fub0bcagchke3m38bi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) Tablets will keep your washing machine clean and running smoothly for many years to come. How Does it Work?
---
**
**

|
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq0vcin9566ijgree9as1behv55ggfkp4se1p7lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)
---
**
**

| [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9npqm6qijgb5eerp6fcv40cc7dc3tr0rh3269dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) is easy to use every month! The truth is, not everyone can afford a new washing machine or expensive repairmen. That's why Splash Spotless works by simply dropping a tablet into your machine and pressing a button to start a cycle. While the machine runs, the tablet uses surfactant technology too slowly dissolve over the course of the cycle, sending powerful scrubbing enzymes into every nook and cranny. Then, Americans can enjoy life while [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv3h49vrfe9cel563pls9kpm6d41butk9f9h81q0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) keeps your washing machine and home happy and healthy. No scrubbing needed!
## Is It Worth It?
Short answer--yes! Check out the ways that [Splash Spotless](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl98u0mprbto50l8jqgh3ose5qm57jhen2i2r9sg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) saves you money:

name: Shane Cory
subject: Urgent: Help Us Close the Gap on Tom Homan's Protection Costs
body:
Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan? Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all.

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztvu48qm7pd8nv226co8j2k20a85drtookcjs0pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)
[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z67podhhei1vv2635s4gno4okp3ranedcoia6lk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) Dear Patriot,

Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to **protect Tom Homan**?

Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of **real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all.**

On December 23rd, a close friend reached out with a somber request.

He had just received a call from Tom Homan himself--President Trump's newly appointed Border Czar.

Tom was hitting the ground running to secure our borders and keep dangerous criminal illegals out, but **he faced a credible death threat**.

Shockingly, the outgoing **Biden Administration left him and his family with zero protection**.

Joe Biden knew about the evil plot brewing against Tom, **yet he abandoned him to the wolves**. That's not just negligence; it's a blatant abuse of power by a corrupt outgoing administration who chose to leave an American in danger due to petty politics.

As founder of American Liberty Fund, I couldn't stand by.

Our mission is to advance liberty through electoral politics and educate folks on corruption and overreach--**like this exact scenario**. But we had to work quietly and it wasn't appropriate to reach out to the public for support as that would have made the situation more dire. So we bootstrapped the costs and put the best men in place to ensure Tom and his family were safe through inauguration day.

Today, we're left with thousands of dollars in expenses that we simply cannot pay. Flights, hotels, equipment. These bills need to go away and [**I need your help as a patriot to make that happen.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdn21uou1mp1fg6r2s140f04oocn2m1c2ipk5rco_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)

Back in December, we scrambled overnight to fund and assemble a security detail. It was a no-brainer; keeping Tom safe meant protecting the man who would safeguard our nation's freedom from invasive threats. We didn't even think of the expense, **we just had to do it**.

We called on our network of veterans, and seven brave men volunteered immediately. They dropped everything.

Leading them was a Navy SEAL who quit his job on the spot, said goodbye to his family, and glued himself to Tom's side for a full month.

The team included a former Army Special Forces combat medic, three Army vets, and three Marine Corps vets--**all with serious personal security experience**.

One was a tracker, another a retired law enforcement officer, and one specialized in executive extractions.

These weren't polished Secret Service types; they were big, bearded warriors who cleared paths just by walking through crowds. **Mean as hell, experienced, and laser-focused on the mission**.

They racked up over a dozen trips across the country. An advance team scouted ahead, while others guarded Tom's family back home, coordinating with grateful local law enforcement.

If the government had handled this, it would've cost taxpayers hundreds of thousands monthly. But our volunteers pinched pennies, keeping costs low. Still, expenses added up--travel, gear, basics, and that's where you come in. [**Will you donate to help cover these remaining costs?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcp7o6olph0ctkim6aagiff27e7rrb4m8k8v9p98_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)

On January 20th, our SEAL handed Tom over safely at President Trump's inauguration to a new government team.

Mission accomplished. But back in February, we asked for help covering remaining reimbursements and thanking those heroes. Many stepped up, but we're not quite there.

Today, [**we face an urgent shortfall of $5,720**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4el7ugke7ff2cuelhj4tm74pqsl2osgdji43de0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs). One unpaid member of that detail--a dedicated veteran--has been covering these bills out of his own pocket, scraping by to make ends meet. I did the same.

We have just seven days to pay this back and relieve his burden. **[**Can you chip in $50, $100, or whatever you can right now to help these patriots?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z62crk4m2j5asse4ul273ab373bphv6nu292cr40_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)**

[**Your gift will cover the gap and show gratitude for their sacrifice**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrnakqcgmp1leho8g94rnre0kaiup4c8fnogfmk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs) and for keeping one of the most important men in the Trump Administration safe and secure.

Since handing off Tom that day, he's been doing incredible work as Border Czar.

Under President Trump, Tom has led a historic crackdown on illegal immigration.

Apprehensions at the border have plunged 70% since he took over, with Title 8 encounters dropping to record lows--just 12,000 last month.

He's overseen massive deportations, eradicating criminal migrants and boosting ICE morale sky-high.

Agents call him "the best person for the job." I knew that as soon as I met Tom. This is his passion. He's protecting lives. Protecting innocent Children and his drive to eradicate the Criminal Cartels is unmatched - and they stand no chance against this man.

Tom's efforts have sparked self-deportations in droves--illegals are fleeing out of fear of real enforcement.

He's partnered with Trump's policies to smash cartel routes, stop human trafficking, and slash drug smuggling. President Trump himself congratulated Tom and the team, calling it "one of the great success stories in the history of borders anywhere in the world."

This is liberty in action: **a small, effective government protecting citizens without overreach**.

But we can't forget the men who kept Tom alive to make this happen.

That $5,720 shortfall is weighing heavy, [**and our veterans need relief now**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpuqpslpsp3a8tfp737bckiorg39h6o8ejuruffo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs).

**[**Please, donate today --every dollar counts toward closing this chapter honorably**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4kogh1t73m7lf0jjmbb93selc3t625m12tk5ug8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)****.**

Tom's positive impact this year has been praised far and wide. From boosting agent morale to driving down visa overstays by 80%, he's proving that real enforcement works without harming innocents or stealing freedoms.

Media outlets note his "ironclad" results, and conservatives hail him as **a hero making America safe again**. But government corruption like Biden's abandonment to Tom reminds us why ALF fights: **to expose and counter it**.

With just seven days left, let's rally. **[**If you can give $25 or more, it would mean the world to these veterans**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmg7e2pjrunpv44v1uk930kclb6up13gjhd9l3c0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)****.**

Together, we're advancing liberty one step at a time.

With Deep Gratitude,
Shane Cory
President
American Liberty Fund
Veteran, United States Marine Corps

P.S. The threat against Tom was a vetted, organized plot ignored by Biden--infuriating proof of government failure. Thank God for those seven volunteers. They've earned our support, and Tom's successes this year show their sacrifice was worth it. [**Help us pay the final $5,720 in the next week.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhf921dgi4bprpv5t087k07fpfq2lenl0ldnir3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clieeor6c1h2bs)

He had just received a call from Tom Homan himself--President Trump's newly appointed Border Czar. Tom was hitting the ground running to secure our borders and keep dangerous criminal illegals out, but he faced a credible death threat. Shockingly, the outgoing Biden Administration left him and his family with zero protection. Joe Biden knew about the evil plot brewing against Tom, yet he abandoned him to the wolves. That's not just negligence; it's a blatant abuse of power by a corrupt outgoing administration who chose to leave an American in danger due to petty politics. As founder of American Liberty Fund, I couldn't stand by. Our mission is to advance liberty through electoral politics and educate folks on corruption and overreach--like this exact scenario. But we had to work quietly and it wasn't appropriate to reach out to the public for support as that would have made the situation more dire. So we bootstrapped the costs and put the best men in place to ensure Tom and his family were safe through inauguration day. Today, we're left with thousands of dollars in expenses that we simply cannot pay. Flights, hotels, equipment. These bills need to go away and Back in December, we scrambled overnight to fund and assemble a security detail. It was a no-brainer; keeping Tom safe meant protecting the man who would safeguard our nation's freedom from invasive threats. We didn't even think of the expense, we just had to do it. We called on our network of veterans, and seven brave men volunteered immediately. They dropped everything. Leading them was a Navy SEAL who quit his job on the spot, said goodbye to his family, and glued himself to Tom's side for a full month. The team included a former Army Special Forces combat medic, three Army vets, and three Marine Corps vets--all with serious personal security experience. One was a tracker, another a retired law enforcement officer, and one specialized in executive extractions. These weren't polished Secret Service types; they were big, bearded warriors who cleared paths just by walking through crowds. Mean as hell, experienced, and laser-focused on the mission. They racked up over a dozen trips across the country. An advance team scouted ahead, while others guarded Tom's family back home, coordinating with grateful local law enforcement. If the government had handled this, it would've cost taxpayers hundreds of thousands monthly. But our volunteers pinched pennies, keeping costs low. Still, expenses added up--travel, gear, basics, and that's where you come in. On January 20th, our SEAL handed Tom over safely at President Trump's inauguration to a new government team. Mission accomplished. But back in February, we asked for help covering remaining reimbursements and thanking those heroes. Many stepped up, but we're not quite there. Today, . One unpaid member of that detail--a dedicated veteran--has been covering these bills out of his own pocket, scraping by to make ends meet. I did the same. We have just seven days to pay this back and relieve his burden. and for keeping one of the most important men in the Trump Administration safe and secure. Since handing off Tom that day, he's been doing incredible work as Border Czar. Under President Trump, Tom has led a historic crackdown on illegal immigration. Apprehensions at the border have plunged 70% since he took over, with Title 8 encounters dropping to record lows--just 12,000 last month. He's overseen massive deportations, eradicating criminal migrants and boosting ICE morale sky-high. Agents call him "the best person for the job." I knew that as soon as I met Tom. This is his passion. He's protecting lives. Protecting innocent Children and his drive to eradicate the Criminal Cartels is unmatched - and they stand no chance against this man. Tom's efforts have sparked self-deportations in droves--illegals are fleeing out of fear of real enforcement. He's partnered with Trump's policies to smash cartel routes, stop human trafficking, and slash drug smuggling. President Trump himself congratulated Tom and the team, calling it "one of the great success stories in the history of borders anywhere in the world." This is liberty in action: a small, effective government protecting citizens without overreach. But we can't forget the men who kept Tom alive to make this happen. That $5,720 shortfall is weighing heavy, . . Tom's positive impact this year has been praised far and wide. From boosting agent morale to driving down visa overstays by 80%, he's proving that real enforcement works without harming innocents or stealing freedoms. Media outlets note his "ironclad" results, and conservatives hail him as a hero making America safe again. But government corruption like Biden's abandonment to Tom reminds us why ALF fights: to expose and counter it. With just seven days left, let's rally. . Together, we're advancing liberty one step at a time. With Deep Gratitude, Shane Cory President American Liberty Fund Veteran, United States Marine Corps P.S. The threat against Tom was a vetted, organized plot ignored by Biden--infuriating proof of government failure. Thank God for those seven volunteers. They've earned our support, and Tom's successes this year show their sacrifice was worth it. Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21819/6374453/82cad384b3ff601419beebdca4aa8677cbe2eb0d/4854c2babe9c3074c31c9ec6855a830641fb5ed7). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21819/6374453/82cad384b3ff601419beebdca4aa8677cbe2eb0d/4854c2babe9c3074c31c9ec6855a830641fb5ed7).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21819/6374453/82cad384b3ff601419beebdca4aa8677cbe2eb0d/4854c2babe9c3074c31c9ec6855a830641fb5ed7)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

The US Gov has ** _practically BANNED_** what may be the best gun for home defense. **I’m talking about the short-barrel AR-15...** Ya know, the kind of gun SEAL Team 6 used to take down Bin Laden’s compound? Spec Ops love these guns because:

* They’re ** _perfect for close quarters_** ...

* Easy as a handgun to move in tight spaces - but with ** _SUPERIOR stopping power and terminal rifle ballistics_** compared to using a pistol...

* While still ** _retaining_** ** _everything great about the AR platform..._**

**But thanks to the National Firearms Act (NFA) of 1934...** Any rifle with a barrel shorter than 16′′ is regulated like a machine gun. ($200 tax stamp... 18 months of waiting... and your name and fingerprints plastered on every watchlist they’ve got) But here’s the little loophole that PTC Armory is using **to put one in your hands without ANY of that stuff:** When they manufacture your AR-15 as a “pistol” instead of a “rifle”... **_Suddenly it’s just another handgun._** And it can be shipped straight to your FFL (local gun shop) like any other firearm. That’s why customers have been ** _BEGGING_** PTC Armory to make a short-barrel AR Pistol**(since it bypasses all the regulatory barriers).** So now that’s exactly what they’re doing... [**Introducing The Patriot Short-Barrel AR-15 Pistol...**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21820/6374453/5cae94397af92ca6df15c39ec032fb1fb679fae1/7c52ede5fc85b6dade78dbf778f9cf5ae6685809)**all the benefits of a short-barrel rifle with zero NFA nonsense.**

* **Guaranteed to shoot sub-MOA at 100yds the day you get it** (even with a 11.5” barrel, you get test targets as PROOF)

* **Backed by two iron-clad guarantees**(love it in 30 days or get every penny back, plus lifetime warranty on all components)

**** [**Plus... you’ll also get $814 in FREE upgrades if you’re one of the first patriots to grab one.**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21820/6374453/5cae94397af92ca6df15c39ec032fb1fb679fae1/7c52ede5fc85b6dade78dbf778f9cf5ae6685809) **** One small catch though... **** This is a very limited-run to satisfy all the requests PTC Armory has been getting for this gun. **** So we can’t promise how long it will be available. **** Plus, this is truly the ** _ideal home defense gun_** – so I know their production calendar for it will fill up fast. **** [**> > See the ONLY short-barrel AR-15 that’s 100% legal for civilians here...**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21820/6374453/5cae94397af92ca6df15c39ec032fb1fb679fae1/7c52ede5fc85b6dade78dbf778f9cf5ae6685809)
