We hope you stick around but remember you can here at any time. | August 19th, 2025 at 01:33 PM UTC | The US Gov has practically BANNED what may be the best gun for home defense. I’m talking about the short-barrel AR-15... Ya know, the kind of gun SEAL Team 6 used to take down Bin Laden’s compound? Spec Ops love these guns because: They’re perfect for close quarters ... Easy as a handgun to move in tight spaces - but with SUPERIOR stopping power and terminal rifle ballistics compared to using a pistol... While still retaining everything great about the AR platform... But thanks to the National Firearms Act (NFA) of 1934... Any rifle with a barrel shorter than 16′′ is regulated like a machine gun. ($200 tax stamp... 18 months of waiting... and your name and fingerprints plastered on every watchlist they’ve got) But here’s the little loophole that PTC Armory is using to put one in your hands without ANY of that stuff: When they manufacture your AR-15 as a “pistol” instead of a “rifle”... Suddenly it’s just another handgun. And it can be shipped straight to your FFL (local gun shop) like any other firearm. That’s why customers have been BEGGING PTC Armory to make a short-barrel AR Pistol(since it bypasses all the regulatory barriers). So now that’s exactly what they’re doing... the benefits of a short-barrel rifle with zero NFA nonsense. Here’s what else makes this brand new gun so special: Guaranteed to shoot sub-MOA at 100yds the day you get it (even with a 11.5” barrel, you get test targets as PROOF) Stress tested under FULL AUTO before shipping (ensures it’ll stand up to the harshest conditions) Backed by two iron-clad guarantees(love it in 30 days or get every penny back, plus lifetime warranty on all components) ** One small catch though... This is a very limited-run to satisfy all the requests PTC Armory has been getting for this gun. So we can’t promise how long it will be available. # Tuesday, August 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1848, the _New York Herald_ made history by being the first major publication to break the news of the [California gold rush to the U.S. East Coast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8Gd0RwDTYuKF7jLq_d0iLmYrPBJoLrRN6vXyW_sM0Uo9Ho6Hxdp6uLKe7Lf7ehpZCnHV81IRGWicqxPX4w4V7v54ZIc3HzPe7LBAI0F4bLYfIupnNSjbcBEbBt0Mpeaz30puua1SoJ7dDKYfahD743Wgkt59ZpjR2gMk207zdh5CCFUKAuXhrhghtuWurQi5kpgT5SLpfvHHdaMaQzP7Fc5rw1ya5Ej8rafwxGBiOtsXp35rDGSrmc7xGDEQQoBqMwDEb5DncsRyUuBy6NMpxW5Ogq8YSu7JW7Wz7o0y45eV6OujIYm2L94xVTirXrmRLL5mL6YNCf3D0t_AYAAP__zd-Bog). This announcement would spark one of the most significant mass migrations in American history. In our [Whatever Happened To...](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u6yAcxfGnwZsj_oMHhrt4y107Igw_HBqMI8CJ3Kev0rVj96PPkb4fV3t1Kaey_ncbmB53W-DVMvQO1fZ6bI8vyFDa_dwAuq_O31NZLcVUjFiPZLLBpXxaPgQTASiwAQxRQohJaSmHm8EL8wGCjwyTBaTWUihgXE5koYFRGJJ5a1iTiWDMKb8EorGLbloEEVFhjziGkPpeL597Kv0GMZ_7E-rF79uQza33R0PsH6IzovPvCaJzO0pw5-iO9Wh9JGp8PyI6D9WExyvlnJpUiON1cyn_sP1PLZ6GfgcAAP__oiBzQg) section in Sunday's edition, we asked for your stories about 30-minute pizza delivery, and you didn’t disappoint. One reader wrote about skiing weekends in Big Bear, where gridlock meant Domino’s never stood a chance of making it on time—he and his friends ate free pizza every night . Another reader confessed to a college trick: ordering pizza to the 10th floor, shutting down the dorm elevators, and stalling the climb just long enough to score a free pie. Keep the stories coming—we love them. Our sponsor today is [EnergyX](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnTAQhZ_GdCD_Ai5cRFrdbtOmtAwew2Rtg4y5G_L0ETdRXmDbcz7NHH0_3u27w4h5-e4SmBo2m-HziFArFFvLmfbfECEfH1cCqHNx8wfmxXLKVUvHlmnrHcbLysabAMBBNGDYoJTSw9j3zWpmNoRJ-2GSXOrAOdc9BBUo9UGGSY8NmvsaHZlmlEouO89G6oLTk2IqDHQmkoLHupXu54a5rhDitT2hdPOWmmjWWveDiG-EPwh_YH7CUTvIUJbr143cuXicNdljO8sMRLxBchgJ7-8wgcczEfG2O_Tt7krNUI4V93_97NLucMkv4n_JRtoKJexfB2fG6qwQvWADk1qNTTF-_8QY8egHIulyP3ztrV-S_DT8TwAAAP__9i6Rtg), offering an investment opportunity in new lithium extraction technology which will help further America's energy independence.

## Trump, Zelensky Push Peace Talks at DC Summit
President Trump hosted Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky and seven European leaders at the White House Monday in a renewed [push to end Russia’s war in Ukraine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQBeCnwR0REGNMQXEbd7ntlhaBsTMbfiwgibxPv3KkPME204zmaL7zdZkvFgOm9b-NYNqS5wSvGqA1KHMrj7j9QIBU73sEaK5Yd8e0zoIJSdlIuZ69xbDPfefNAiDg3IHhSkqp1TgM3c2cVe-uznI1SPCLvGoltbCWM9U7C1p1aI40NnLNGetFf_J8ZHax-iq5XBRzpGfgseVy-s6Y2g2WsOcnlJPLsQvm1tpWyfkfERMRU9q3XNuxImI6gomY2EjExI_xqPTwETG9bTTgE-hj87ZBpR8pPaiYVuoddQUj0JgLfA67Yvz2whCwDor0bI0Ww_uV9qf-nkb8BgAA__8IW4Tl). Zelensky called the meeting their “best one" yet and said he’s open to future talks with Vladimir Putin, possibly with Trump at the table. A hot mic caught Trump telling French President Macron he believes Putin [“wants to make a deal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAYhJ8GOwwgChYU19jttVcaFn5WbhEN_q7xnv7iJvcE10wzyTf55us23mxMMT8-7QwGwzJmOLYEiFBGLPu8_kCCvD3PGQBdse4Z82MUTLSUacr70duYzlFW3gQAAU0Fhqu2bXulu66ajNcMoOkAROPvSljruJYqNEopLUNQVTQXjWnec8akkLXnmtlg-3vL26CYI5KBj7iU-nuJGScI6VxeUGq3zFUyE-K6keaDiIGI4TiO2uW7u0oihgtNxMA0EQO_4u1E_6ROuj-LjRnoumPMNMUX0H31FmGrJ5xTVYxfj5hS3DpFJHvMNqb3MP7rrZcRvwEAAP__P8h_JQ)." While no formal peace plan was announced, leaders signaled more progress in the past two weeks than in the previous three years. Trump said he’ll call Putin after the summit and hinted at a potential three-way meeting to pursue a lasting deal.
## Hurricane Erin Threatens East Coast Beaches
Hurricane Erin exploded into a Category 5 over the weekend and remains a [dangerous Category 4 storm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdTQoWrSkgkUadS9tSmFNLqXN449Arm0opw-UK6SZZoAPM9-vr_ULKFLefkJCy6GsGT8tIjPWlesrHX8wYm7fZ0JkV8F9U95WrbSRapL9vHqgeK5D521A1Hjv0PajMWYep8ej2-0EwSszYG_Mwz29eU7B4zgrpWY93_3ckb1oaurnXqlBDzffTwoCzE_TmzAqJwaFnrjU2-9CmXcM8SxvrDdXUhftznw0cf8h9CL0ks-jNL4qoZcLLPSiJqGX_opXk9c_oZf9VSs5yCixUm4yUkDJe0VgzJQ3SekAx00etaSDZS6Vd-mglkgZJL7BvYCp5CYbA2OTJUhMWDfM7hR66ar1x4dipPYYxaC2BBT_Teb_8vy2-m8AAAD__4k8lKs) churning off the East Coast. While it’s not expected to make U.S. landfall, officials warn of life-threatening surf, rip currents, and coastal flooding from Florida to New England. North Carolina’s Outer Banks are [under evacuation orders](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuwzAQRE8jdTKWX5EFizTunDalQJNLa2OKEijahnP6QLlCysEAM3jv6zJdPGUqt0-_oGtpnQq-9oytYZ1afSzbD2Ys-_29ILZQfbhTuU0cuBrADMxO0VN-T7KPLiFyFD06Niql7Gi07meXQIG1KkYvlbZSKg1BJI6omZUMQk_uWAPDLAOQXJ4iM-CTt1fFVBohdBIwUlvr6Xul0mZM-b0-sZ7CuvTZza1teyc-On7u-NlvB8BRHaE2Chk7fp4ftVLwBQesVIb10bAOV1_u-5BYkFyj1SJEg0oKESWHmLhI12AM9tXF7UU5067HTsJt8ZT_vtu_hD0d_w0AAP__755-eA), with Hatteras and Ocracoke Islands bracing for 15–20 foot waves and possible road closures. The National Weather Service says conditions will worsen midweek as Erin grows in size, with hazards stretching hundreds of miles from the storm's center. Beachgoers are urged to stay out of the water, as currents could remain deadly through the weekend. clean_body: President Trump hosted Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky and seven European leaders at the White House Monday in a renewed . | | | | | | Tuesday, August 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1848, the New York Herald made history by being the first major publication to break the news of the . This announcement would spark one of the most significant mass migrations in American history. In our section in Sunday's edition, we asked for your stories about 30-minute pizza delivery, and you didn’t disappoint. One reader wrote about skiing weekends in Big Bear, where gridlock meant Domino’s never stood a chance of making it on time—he and his friends ate free pizza every night . Another reader confessed to a college trick: ordering pizza to the 10th floor, shutting down the dorm elevators, and stalling the climb just long enough to score a free pie. Keep the stories coming—we love them. Our sponsor today is , offering an investment opportunity in new lithium extraction technology which will help further America's energy independence. | Trump, Zelensky Push Peace Talks at DC Summit President Trump hosted Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky and seven European leaders at the White House Monday in a renewed . Zelensky called the meeting their “best one" yet and said he’s open to future talks with Vladimir Putin, possibly with Trump at the table. A hot mic caught Trump telling French President Macron he believes Putin ." While no formal peace plan was announced, leaders signaled more progress in the past two weeks than in the previous three years. Trump said he’ll call Putin after the summit and hinted at a potential three-way meeting to pursue a lasting deal. Hurricane Erin Threatens East Coast Beaches Hurricane Erin exploded into a Category 5 over the weekend and remains a churning off the East Coast. While it’s not expected to make U.S. landfall, officials warn of life-threatening surf, rip currents, and coastal flooding from Florida to New England. North Carolina’s Outer Banks are , with Hatteras and Ocracoke Islands bracing for 15–20 foot waves and possible road closures. The National Weather Service says conditions will worsen midweek as Erin grows in size, with hazards stretching hundreds of miles from the storm's center. Beachgoers are urged to stay out of the water, as currents could remain deadly through the weekend. Follow . List: Top Billionaire in Every Country A new list ranks the for 2025, with Elon Musk topping the global list at $342 billion thanks to Tesla’s stock surge and his growing footprint in AI and energy. France’s Bernard Arnault, head of luxury giant LVMH, ranks second at $178 billion, while India’s Mukesh Ambani holds $92.5 billion through his Reliance empire. Brazil’s Eduardo Saverin, Facebook co-founder turned investor, tops South America with $34.5 billion. Rihanna, born and raised in Barbados, represents her home country with $1.4 billion from her Fenty Beauty empire and entertainment career. See the . Fentanyl is destroying families and killing Americans by the tens of thousands every year. The federal government has had laws on the books for years to stop drugs crossing the border, but the Democrats, namely Joe Biden, refused to uphold the law. **In just 200 days, President Trump has reduced the amount of fentanyl coming across the Southern Border to almost zero!** This is what Republican leadership looks like and this is why we need to make sure **Republicans hold every office from the courthouse to the White House! **
One of President Trump’s strongest allies is North Carolina Congressman Addison McDowell, **a proud MAGA conservative** , who is fighting to _secure our border, protect our jobs, and defend our Second Amendment._

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1749, four Apache chiefs [buried a hatchet](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSgyAUheGnwU4HbkC0oNjGLttuyUC4iUxQsnCN8e13klfY6q_OV5yfsz27mOJ6-3YLGnpds11xrwmJsNg5bxUXd8f6u-WyLXkjX9DdswUOquVDK0YbXEyHlU0wnodRNGiEVqrnAgbZzAYuUo5eK1DcKY98EJpr3aOTyvWDV000b4wPYhSCC4AOB9n7sRdwhcsJfWCSY4iUS0czEr5cvaYjP7F0l7w0ycxEj8pOXwwmBtO-7x3V2eU1xRW7XG4Mps-qDe5o_fEOgwlXKu9qdWqKCY89phRrr5nkt8XF9MHpf5c8DfwFAAD__5y8dcU) in a peace ceremony in San Antonio, signifying the tribe's conversion to Christianity in exchange for Spanish protection from Comanche raids. ## Texas House Makes Quorum
The Texas House [made quorum yesterday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAQRp_GdEa-cC1cpKHYVdKmRL4MwYrBWXsIyduv4H-Evxvpk47mnPt1vGof_Pq46QUUfqY4rrDnAIiQxjluGRb9hPxvi2lb4oYmgX7GUTBRU9ZR3o9O-_Adq8Ipw1zPC1C8reuGcdFVxawYtNaZbpLWyG4ynWS15KZlzICZtDSFVweMdbznnHEhSuiqxvQNF5OwEowjFQPnMaYSZ0D46DyFb3xDKm1ciqBmxFcm8kLEQMSw73u55PXYiBhgpVsmYjikiBheMXj09jhPED0NqYMl2qQx0wS4pZVipAEePgeNWzp2G3QC-vYWY_pSPSEk-tOEnkWIGHSilwv_--d-k0VS7rX7EHxuWlKxx6J9OL_F3zV-K_E_AAD__70ulTc) for the first time in two weeks after a sufficient number of Democratic lawmakers returned to the chamber following a cross-country campaign to build opposition to a Republican redistricting proposal. "_We are done waiting. We have a quorum. Now is the time for action_ ," Speaker Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) said. He [insisted](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2O3CAQhJ8G3xhBG_8dOESKfNsotxytNjQetNhMoL2z8_aR5xVyLn2lqu_Px_KBMcVj-4U7Wf4OeTnoWRMxU1nu-ay04yfVv2cu555PXgvhZ15AQSfVKPW0eIzptZjG21X5STdk9dB1vdIwmuZuNUEIJvTYAhIOvh0DuKE1wSvVeXJNtFeZGvWktdIANxpNv069hgCupdULo8hHzuXGd2L6xhrSK39Rubm8N8nemR9VtD8EzAJmXN314LblKxYw_84pcnRVwPyGpac9u4JcZSE-yyErI5N0ibDEY5MHPaXLx1ao1pgPTHLHx4VXzuUl2jl60f7UYAbT9ZNuivWPZ0wp1n4QRm07xvSexv8n9MvCvwAAAP__pYyNUQ) that while "_the majority has the right to prevail, the minority has the right to be heard_." Democratic Caucus Chair Gene Wu said his colleagues "killed the corrupt special session" and "rallied Democrats nationwide to join this existential fight for fair representation." Wu said [Democrats intend to](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI7sARJTuNjG3dt2SzTYQ2LF4Kw9PMLfr4i0X_DqGZ17z_3zNX5hTHG9_8aFLL_nPK6010TMVMZH3iot-KT6d8tlW_LGUyF85hEU9FIZqYcxYEzH2DXBTioMuiGrb31_VRpM1zzspKbBYActdt7rCdXsDakWevBzC0Y10Z4wZfSgtdIAFzLddRquGmbwLU1BdIpC5Fwu_CCmN9Y5HfmbysXnpUn2wfyqov0lwAlw-75ftoqcAx7ngwBXOZdDgDvNBLgPotA95lWAO8MFOGUEOG3-n-VHXQZasi_IVRbiraySs_T4ipyTxJmpyEIhVi7Rc1zvcsf0zBsLcKa_adDQKnUT4Jpiw2uPKcV6vYlO3ReM6VOffzb6t4V_AQAA__8bXZdb) "build the legal record necessary to defeat this racist map in court." The House will convene again tomorrow, and members who participated in the quorum break during the first special session will be [monitored closely](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLsO4yAURL8Gd1hw_QguKNK4ibJtSgvDdYyCwcsjTv5-5fzCdiONdDRnHvfprqyz_vlHbSjzZwmTxyM5zBnjtIaScFMvTH9LiGULJc8R1StMwKCjTFA-TEZZ953aysiZmYFXKPml63rGQbTVKg1bOiMa0TbLoBaDQmsu2g7ExTDVdFBZecKY4APnjAPUKNp-HnoOC-gGZ0NahsbmEOu8YsaPSov7hjfGWoetcnLNeU-kuRIYCYzHcdRb8mdHYERPSyIwnlIExj04m60-Y8Rcorf-SX9I-nOlBrego8qJ7iXT4KmKoXhD84pUu6BfNJX4Ruuc8hoJjCrS65Xfbo8uVFGa_bDO2dRfSMuem7LutzH_37NvCf8CAAD__xQGkL0) by state troopers to ensure their attendance.
## Lesser Prairie-Chicken Stripped of Protections
The U.S. District Court for the Western District of Texas has [removed federal protections](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3y2yAUBPDToA4NPH2ACoo06pw2pQbBwxAjoQCy7Ntn7Cv865357ez-uS03HWLY77_1hqq-XFp2vErEWjEvPp0FN_3A8u9M-dzSWdeM-pEWYDBQJimfFqtDfC99Y9XK7MQbVFwMw8g4yL7xylnOpJVgjDROyJENYnBCCOYkH3tkTVAfjEk-cc44QIuyH9dp5ODAdLha0jO0oabcVo8VX7q4-E5PzK1JWxOVr_UopPtFYCYwX9fVGp_T_kkJzJ85BGadazARCcxfgf497R3pkXXIAanxwTxwp1Ff5QyVApPAu463hz-arOxxhRhDGQXp2X3TIX6r688Oeyr4HwAA__9JMICd) for the lesser prairie-chicken, ruling the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service erred in listing its regional populations as either threatened or endangered in 2022. Texas, Oklahoma, and Kansas sued the agency after the listing was finalized in 2023. In a statement, Attorney General Ken Paxton said the "change in classification puts many of Texas's conservation efforts at risk, all while bringing immeasurable harm to Texans' property rights." In January, the Fish and Wildlife Service [retracted its earlier identification](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ_GZEZ28x84uIRsLr0QNbgHWmNszjbDzNuvZqV9gg1LKpXq-_7dphuyY7_-xZ1Mft3D5OlKjnKmOG3hTLTjg9L_M8RzD2eeI-EjTKCgkaqXepgssntPdWHNrOygCzK6a5pWaejrYjNKWYROVYPtVdfbeWhANZUe-hqgaWEp2HzGVK8HrZUGKKmv23loNdxhqWi2olZkOYdY5o0yvTDd3Ts8KZZL2AtntpyPJKo_AkYB43Vd5f7eeN0Oh-zTpyRg_FAJGF1Y0MmfQClRlEdEjkxy2Xh5kJfkLfqVIlnpOGX2q3zigpmsgLGIxh4XO8ep7USt1h3ZfR_Jv9P3NPAVAAD__2NMhoo) of two distinct population segments, removing the justification for the different classifications under the Endangered Species Act. U.S. Rep August Pfluger (R-San Angelo) [praised the decision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu4yAUheHV2B0RELBNQTGNuzftlBaGaxsFjId7SV52P8ps4fVHR7--P1_Ll4spnvtvl8HS91aWE16YgAjqcpSGkN0D8G8rteXSaK3gHmWRXGrGJybMElxM70X1wa48GNGDFaPWAxdyUv1htREyiM1vLshx1Ybr-2RGGOU6GRUg9NF-zvgkjBBcSHmDSQ2rGYTcpL_DGjrFIUQq9UYHEHw73NK7PKHefMl9sgfRhd39VyfnTs45huTOQDEDfgadnJFKjYCdnIdRqUkLrZkvrRJ7Ou8IkCVAhMqu6mKNwPwR_QNOBmdw5w4VAkNy1JBVuNi1pbZDZS9IvmRAVttHsK82XK-YUsRh7BTfs4vpfyL9DPZp5b8AAAD__6NKkTc) as "a major step forward in ending the years-long attack on farmers, ranchers, and energy producers across Texas." The agency will conduct a new review and issue a revised finding by November of next year.
## Houston Police Investigate Graffiti Artists
Police are looking for the individuals who painted the message “Be Someone” on an I-45 railroad overpass in Houston earlier this summer. Three anonymous Instagram users [shared videos of their deed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQRp8GM6aAUdHAYBOzu-mGViONdl0EF9r5efut2Ve48Vf11Tnnz9fyBRQpbb_hwIlfIS8JnzUiM5Zlz1fFA76x_r1yuY58sSsI33kxynRSDVKPiweK76Vt_OSUH3WDk7Zd1ytthrbZJxdsP4RReehMr4Pv9d3qwQ3WrsFaUA1NnzM16FFrpY254dD2buy1CWa9o_OiVeiJc7nxjowvqCG-8wPLbc1HE6ed-azi_kuYWZgZ3Krvn0WY-cyVhZmvRDnJE1YKtMozR1pRUnpgZdqAKW0yAmNlWfOBOaGstCX5seecpCvkN5Qn5jOidLhT8rIilHWXTygFEssK7yrMrG3XKtNqYeamTP58UoxUeytatR1A8T8x_6zzYzL_AgAA___aqJUl) in June, and authorities have asked the social media platform for access to their data. The bridge is a graffiti magnet and has [displayed various messages](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZlHdmPABASXkO2lF6LGbg_WGLxnN8Pu35-4X9i4pFK9-vOxfGBM8Xj-xp0m_gp5OeiqiZipLFs-K-34ovr3zOXc88lrIXzlBRR0Ulmpx8VjTN-Lafy0Kj_qhiY9dF2vNFjTbFOPIayI3hhtPLlRu161ltzqRjOEITRxusuU1aPWSgM8yJp-HXsNAVxLqxdGkY-cy4M3YvrCGtJ3flN5uLw3adqYP6tofwmYBczXdT1eWz7vUMCMhaNLJGC-XQLmlB0mAfNKsuad8kHyZnI-5LNgCJGj3M-CSRaqnAt5GY83VY5P5JgPATPYToLygwNrZYe6lcZiJ21rOzm05HprXDe22JTJf14xpVj7QRj13DGm_6P5Z1e_J_gXAAD__zNXk5g) over the years, but it is known for the recurring “Be Someone” message. Prior to the latest repainting, it read “Mog Coin,” a cryptocurrency reference. "_I was chilling in my bed one night, and I got pissed off that I saw 'Mog Coin' on this bridge. So I went to Home Depot and got some rollers_ ," one of the users [previously commented](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SsyAYha8GOx14_QkUFF9jl6_d0gF5USYgLmBM7n7HzOwVbH1-5jzn6z7dlfNuW_6rgLK8bJw2PLPHUjBNazwyBvXA_H3EdIR4FJ1QPeIEFPqa8pqJySjn31NXGampEaxCyW59P1AGvKtWqQZqzNz1ojUWZq4FCg1MW0BulLK2cvIqo5wJxigDaJB3gxYDAwtzi9qQjqJxJaamrFjwpbL17_jE1MwxVF6upeyZtP8IjATG8zybeU1xu1QC44VDYLxQStzqT57AqFJxs0cCo8Y6x4Bxw1onZxasf71AOeMC2mZf9ypJs5_Oe5eHG-noEpTznwHlb7c9JfwEAAD__9GuhCY) to a local news outlet. Earlier this month, a Harris County judge [signed a warrant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGynDAMRb_GdGZsLbCmcJGG7qVNyRgsQLMGE1ssb_8-40z-IJ0Kzbnn3l9f45ejQMf60-1o-XuJ44F3DsiMadzilXF3L8y_r5iuPV48JXSvOIKCViojdT96R-EzNpW3k_K9rtDqZ9t2SoNpqs2aZcF2cdg9fKs7b0zvsdVGdc8WHRpXkS0wZXSvtdIANZqmm_pOwwLzAycvGoWeOKaaN2T8dnkJn_jGVM9xr4LdmM8sHj8EDAKG-77rOdD8gmLP8ShfAoZSS8AQ4uyCgKFkChiUETDocp0x0IySjjdmptUxyjXF65S8OZYJT0cHo5f_qFlOKHPcMR4op0R-RVmcJMmm4Kpk_XlTCJS7p2jUujsKf4X5_2Z-W_gTAAD__5p3k70) for police to obtain the requested information from Instagram. Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Texas House Makes Quorum The Texas House for the first time in two weeks after a sufficient number of Democratic lawmakers returned to the chamber following a cross-country campaign to build opposition to a Republican redistricting proposal. "We are done waiting. We have a quorum. Now is the time for action ," Speaker Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) said. He that while "the majority has the right to prevail, the minority has the right to be heard." Democratic Caucus Chair Gene Wu said his colleagues "killed the corrupt special session" and "rallied Democrats nationwide to join this existential fight for fair representation." Wu said "build the legal record necessary to defeat this racist map in court." The House will convene again tomorrow, and members who participated in the quorum break during the first special session will be by state troopers to ensure their attendance. Lesser Prairie-Chicken Stripped of Protections The U.S. District Court for the Western District of Texas has for the lesser prairie-chicken, ruling the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service erred in listing its regional populations as either threatened or endangered in 2022. Texas, Oklahoma, and Kansas sued the agency after the listing was finalized in 2023. In a statement, Attorney General Ken Paxton said the "change in classification puts many of Texas's conservation efforts at risk, all while bringing immeasurable harm to Texans' property rights." In January, the Fish and Wildlife Service of two distinct population segments, removing the justification for the different classifications under the Endangered Species Act. U.S. Rep August Pfluger (R-San Angelo) as "a major step forward in ending the years-long attack on farmers, ranchers, and energy producers across Texas." The agency will conduct a new review and issue a revised finding by November of next year. Houston Police Investigate Graffiti Artists Police are looking for the individuals who painted the message “Be Someone” on an I-45 railroad overpass in Houston earlier this summer. Three anonymous Instagram users in June, and authorities have asked the social media platform for access to their data. The bridge is a graffiti magnet and has over the years, but it is known for the recurring “Be Someone” message. Prior to the latest repainting, it read “Mog Coin,” a cryptocurrency reference. "I was chilling in my bed one night, and I got pissed off that I saw 'Mog Coin' on this bridge. So I went to Home Depot and got some rollers ," one of the users to a local news outlet. Earlier this month, a Harris County judge for police to obtain the requested information from Instagram. A statement from Union Pacific said the suspects were "putting their lives and the lives of motorists passing underneath at risk." | Flying together with our sponsor If you enjoy The Flyover’s quick updates, you’ll love . name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Kathy Hochul is vowing to gerrymander New York
body:
We must take immediate action to hold the line.

| | | | |
---
Friend, Governor Kathy Hochul revealed how she plans to deliver the House to Democrats next year: **_Gerrymandering the Empire State!_**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0mG/?__vbtrk=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Let’s be clear, Kathy Hochul and New York Democrats aren’t interested in a fair fight. After the 2020 census Democrats across the country tried to erase as many Republican districts as they could in states where they have one party control.
I led the fight against Hochul’s shameless power grab and we won the legal battle to give voters in New York a real choice on the ballot.
**[Thanks to our work justice prevailed in New York and because of that victory we were able to preserve our current majority in the House that is working with President Trump to deliver his America First agenda.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0mG/?__vbtrk=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
But unfortunately that majority is RAZOR THIN because despite our tremendous victory last fall most Democrats run states from Maryland to New Mexico were able to implement their rigged maps.
In Illinois, the state that Texas Dems fled to in protest of their state’s current redistricting process, Democrats ensured that Republicans would only be favored in THREE of their states congressional districts.
In the home state of Abraham Lincoln, our nation’s first Republican president, over 2.5 million votes were cast for House Republicans in last year’s election.

That was 46.9% of IL's congressional votes, yet Democrats rigged the game so that they would still secure 14 seats from a delegation of 17.
Honest Abe would be shocked...

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0mG/?__vbtrk=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Kathy Hochul, the WORST Governor in America, wants to try again to replicate this strategy because she knows that her party has failed New York and wouldn’t win a fair fight.
NY voters already said "_NO_ ". The courts already said "_NO_ "_._
But that isn’t going to stop her from trying again.
Why? Because this isn’t about Texas.
This is about the Democrats’ plan to regain control of Congress by rigging elections against America First candidates in order to silence the American people who reject the Left’s radical agenda.
**_[That’s why this time, they’re pulling out all the stops - an emergency redistricting scheme designed to erase GOP seats before we can even get to Election Day.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0mG/?__vbtrk=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
Patriot, she’s counting on your silence.
She’s counting on you to be exhausted and think that _this is someone else’s fight_.
But I know that I have been able to count on patriots like you before to stand with me. That’s how we held the line before and with your continued support we’ll do it again.

**_[I’m asking you to chip in right now to the House GOP Battleground Fund to support my efforts to defeat Hochul before it’s too late](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0mG/?__vbtrk=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0mG/?__vbtrk=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[STAND WITH ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0mG/?__vbtrk=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyMDIyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Right now, Democrats are dumping cash into legal teams and dark money groups to help Governor Hochul prevail in this fight.

clean_body: We must take immediate action to hold the line. | | | | | Friend, Governor Kathy Hochul revealed how she plans to deliver the House to Democrats next year: Gerrymandering the Empire State! Let’s be clear, Kathy Hochul and New York Democrats aren’t interested in a fair fight. After the 2020 census Democrats across the country tried to erase as many Republican districts as they could in states where they have one party control. I led the fight against Hochul’s shameless power grab and we won the legal battle to give voters in New York a real choice on the ballot. But unfortunately that majority is RAZOR THIN because despite our tremendous victory last fall most Democrats run states from Maryland to New Mexico were able to implement their rigged maps. In Illinois, the state that Texas Dems fled to in protest of their state’s current redistricting process, Democrats ensured that Republicans would only be favored in THREE of their states congressional districts. In the home state of Abraham Lincoln, our nation’s first Republican president, over 2.5 million votes were cast for House Republicans in last year’s election. That was 46.9% of IL's congressional votes, yet Democrats rigged the game so that they would still secure 14 seats from a delegation of 17. Honest Abe would be shocked... Kathy Hochul, the WORST Governor in America, wants to try again to replicate this strategy because she knows that her party has failed New York and wouldn’t win a fair fight. NY voters already said "NO ". The courts already said "NO ". But that isn’t going to stop her from trying again. Why? Because this isn’t about Texas. This is about the Democrats’ plan to regain control of Congress by rigging elections against America First candidates in order to silence the American people who reject the Left’s radical agenda. Patriot, she’s counting on your silence. She’s counting on you to be exhausted and think that this is someone else’s fight. But I know that I have been able to count on patriots like you before to stand with me. That’s how we held the line before and with your continued support we’ll do it again. . Right now, Democrats are dumping cash into legal teams and dark money groups to help Governor Hochul prevail in this fight. We can’t afford to blink. There is not a moment to lose to ensure that we have the resources to continue fighting fire with fire. . Together we can preserve the GOP House majority and FIRE HOCHUL in 2026. For America, Elise Stefanik Proud New Yorker | | | | | | | | | | | _ | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Jim Himes is Hip-Deep in Adam Schiff's Intel Leaking Scandal
body:
| | | | |
---
| \-- Reporting from the Political Front --
---
---
| | August 19, 2025
Just in case it slipped by the citizens of CT-4, we need to recognize that Jim Himes is hip-deep in the Adam Schiff classified intelligence scandal. He served on the House Intelligence Committee for a decade with Schiff. And in so doing, he yet again revealed himself as premier despicable member of congress, willing to lie to maintain power. I made the case today in an article published in The[ Connecticut Centinal](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-2qvy9lV_rmsXMsn6dO6kwxhsqM5vnrJTyiZgOm4LFPNuH3Q-OY9RSjLhH3euO2nOaV1qtpC6_TaIYDRkJ-JeGXgsg_HGw9jf1O1_gPcBz5R4W-tZdTL4qJ4atmH0m9__&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==). The article also appears below:
Hey Jim Himes - What did you know, when did you know it, and what did you DO about it?
* Himes was on Adam Schiff's House Intel Committee since 2013, and Ranking Member since Jan. 2023

By Bob MacGuffie
Word of California senator Adam Schiff's long-coming reckoning with the law has been spreading through the media for a week. What many of us oxygen-breathing observers have long deduced has been confirmed by a whistleblower - a former Democrat staffer for the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence. The whistleblower has been notifying the FBI since 2017 and documenting Schiff's leaking of classified intelligence to no avail, but under Kash Patel's leadership, the whole illegal and possibly treasonous affair has been revealed to the public. And the whistleblower's contentions are backed up by the FBI releasing the 302 notes documenting the many FBI interviews with the whistleblower. See John Solomon's news-breaking report [here](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-LEXZvB8U2ax1YuB3rpZlemLQbSv-34HTaSzctGlVKkzT1BYHHurN3A9ZbN-bgT8uXK7KrTP3UpHe5gjuRdly7O5ubvgKkIel7bf5d5H-2XGoL99awaZRzn1Cbjyn9XZGTpMLflNzj2QISpOAztSjnYaFH0W9F6Dy4TTjMHR-wiydSJOLhE7GyDxuTpWAUYk38ZWZk-62HC8IM137hSciUxrg4SN08hgO&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==). The blockbuster revelation is that Adam Schiff arranged for Democrat members, most assuredly notorious leaker Eric Swalwell, of the Intel committee to leak to the media selected classified information, designed to smear Trump and his campaign as "colluding with Russia" to win the 2016 election for Hillary. The whistleblower staffer personally attended a meeting where Schiff planned the release of classified information. Quoting the FBI 302 notes, "When working in this capacity, (redacted staffer's name) was called to an all-staff meeting by Schiff. In this meeting, Schiff stated the group would leak classified information which was derogatory to President Donald Trump. Schiff stated the information would be used to indict President Trump. The whistleblower told the FBI that he "stated this would be illegal and, upon hearing his concerns, unnamed members of the meeting reassured that they would not be caught leaking classified information." It's all in the FBI notes, [302- Dec 5, 2017](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-6An9bXonBYPUb3IrouvBIUqui0BI37zspMW0PZsi22uBu3JEUSFAobAzBJweZgbae2icnonh5MSeSuTWkPNe2ZVnrWjiB0ewdhZKwnf8sy3M-8O9XED968EjW7KNT0N1mMxM9Dp35bIAJFLa_5USaD03aCRoG-mRTqYDcObeCy1JMyIJDlKsZ4dPBmLc3Z8Hq5Ij1E8nfE9UYt6HrAkkzCwwcHpMAiJaBWTw5sWRoi522ueX7IJcxA==&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==). Enter Jim Himes and his knowledge and role in this highly illegal conspiracy to defraud the citizenry. Himes, a staunchly loyal Pelosi lieutenant, was placed on the House Intel Committee by Pelosi in 2013. Slick talker that he is, he soon became Schiff's right hand - Schiff had been on the Committee since '07, was Ranking Member, and became its Chair in Jan.'19. As Schiff began to unfurl his collusion media strategy to paint Trump as a Russian asset, he regularly took to the microphones in the U.S. Capitol to hold impromptu press conferences as the Democrats exited the hearing rooms. If you watched these performances at that time, as I did, Jim Himes was always at Schiff's side or right behind him. The picture below is typical of dozens of such pop-up pressers (Himes to the right, Swalwell to the left).
---
|
---
Himes never looked enthusiastic at these pressers. In fact, he looked extremely uncomfortable, with his Adam's apple bobbing throughout, as he swallowed nervously. He KNEW Schiff was lying. But he wouldn't stop Schiff, he wouldn't resign from the Committee, he wouldn't publicly disavow Schiff's statements. No - being Jim Himes, he wouldn't do anything of integrity or honesty, or bravery in any form. Instead, reptilian cultivator of power and influence that he is, he regularly sat right next to Schiff on the dais, as Schiff chaired hundreds of committee meetings as in the below, while he deceived and lied to both congress and the public.
---
|
---
|
---
Here's a linked [video](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-wfI9Ii1luv1ysisJFgFj3uLmKKcVqaPhB-bPTv_NgNLsHABgjzU3gXThl3aNkCAp5xXUdNOlGa8qvmUhtbMjmnvbYSUPM9M008DvGx_L67kfTgabv_mhHRcWOYwJ-48B&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==) of Schiff making the collusion claim from the Committee dais. Interestingly, though cable news has been showing clips of Schiff's pressers with Himes over the past week, they are suddenly "video unavailable" when I tried to access those specific videos for this article. There are videos available of Himes insinuating Russian collusion, charging Russia with election meddling, referencing the classified leaks, and labeling the fraudulent Steele dossier a mere 'distraction' in his following linked media appearances: [NBC](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-2gZstND3PIJv15fqk1RwJIV7MaA17pAi4UP3W5PRV3v-3sIGytMEVdDqdaJyCO05a6vOAKoffYsioOCRriDKHdAzHzGuZZCh6nLTf71tmTaz02G6oIO2n1dz9a_gfgFuG5kDJAeAxhasaVj2Nd_AnCsAmmX2ZX0x-TZqE8M0GfLIX3XqyQW47YV29ODFgxor-pmtetTO0VpukbvHFc3DqH7t2yzgdHiYq1gAqvorDNULsx7uxsR-6Q==&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==) \- [C-SPAN](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-N0X6l80Nb_TFzquWWOZjUx5MTqhN2IAa9U8d-DnLegiVh4-jAeq7u-Zls7cZWKGjQLkGFM6dGxQXLnsW2_4ESusoc1z-dq7f9bngCJvFEH2LM4CvjRupPfyo3hWmuEwfo0Ru4qXvdJA0bE8gWiimjowHgnfDmiSe-pFcvCVUfzadwAle_q_wJykvH6WpbkTZg8dVh4dqVqiSn9qe4jc3Ew==&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==) \- [MSNBC](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-1j5va1Xb372Of2ZBKGvBe5gkhZto8XG1Qx3tx2ejyguT1XAGSdiV5tWZiIsZLC5sjmT0dpclBbZV5sXurBRVc_kTNNEcePxGA7cszy1SbaPECFY2wGw-AOBBzxf3QGcUaqoYstVGMxvLsdwKGcxX_moWNSaM9UISNsL8J_7pau_Bo95xiVy0KPdjpt187ZqQW7YDXHChe2U=&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==). Each interview wreaks with insincerity, putting on display his patented word-smithing, verbal jujitsu, and straight-up gaslighting - all with the intent of misleading his constituents and the general public. Himes was too clever to visibly enmesh himself in Schiff's web of seditious lies about what the classified intel showed. But being joined at the hip with Schiff on the Intel Committee during all the critical years, until Himes himself became Ranking Member in '23, Himes had first-hand knowledge of all aspects of Schiff's extensive operation - and it's documented in this recently declassified [302- Dec 5, 2017](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-6An9bXonBYPUb3IrouvBIUqui0BI37zspMW0PZsi22uBu3JEUSFAobAzBJweZgbae2icnonh5MSeSuTWkPNe2ZVnrWjiB0ewdhZKwnf8sy3M-8O9XED968EjW7KNT0N1mMxM9Dp35bIAJFLa_5USaD03aCRoG-mRTqYDcObeCy1JMyIJDlKsZ4dPBmLc3Z8Hq5Ij1E8nfE9UYt6HrAkkzCwwcHpMAiJaIZz9TAJqf0kPzNo42Y_o1w==&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==). On page 11, while Schiff is briefing the Committee Democrats on his scheme, Himes asks Schiff, "what is your strategy, why are you going after Trump?" See 302 notes [Page 11.](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcHGedqT3dJ1-6An9bXonBYPUb3IrouvBIUqui0BI37zspMW0PZsi22uBu3JEUSFAobAzBJweZgbae2icnonh5MSeSuTWkPNe2ZVnrWjiB0ewdhZKwnf8sy3M-8O9XED968EjW7KNT0N1mMxM9Dp35bIAJFLa_5USaD03aCRoG-mRTqYDcObeCy1JMyIJDlKsZ4dPBmLc3Z8Hq5Ij1E8nfE9UYt6HrAkkzCwwcHpMAiJaQ5vaiOFDeDNcuwHmB0RMnQ==&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==) Before that meeting was over, Schiff acknowledged to the Democrats there was nothing in hand that would warrant impeachment. Himes' challenging of Schiff indicates he well-knew there was no evidence of collusion, and that Schiff's public statements, made standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Himes, were lies designed to cripple Trump and his Administration. But Himes made a calculated decision to stand with Schiff for six years, until it all culminated in Schiff's disgrace, as he was formally Censured by Congress on June 23, 2023 - a very rare congressional chastisement. And just before that Censure, Jim Himes took one more opportunity to bold-face lie to the Congress and the public when he stated to the entire House, "I sat next to Adam Schiff for years. He is a man of integrity and dignity." For Himes, lying through his teeth is just another day at the office. As I've noted in many previous articles, Jim Himes has been lying to his 700,000 constituents consistently for the 16+ years he's been in office. And his lies have become increasingly consequential. For years he lied to us about Joe Biden's mental impairment, then a year ago when Biden's reelection bid became untenable, he lied claiming it was the first he knew, when he publicly called for Biden to step aside. Now this treacherous episode of vouching for Schiff's veracity by standing with him as he lied for six years straight. Mr. Himes has long ago broken the public trust, and has so much for which to answer. But his much-deserved reckoning cannot be brought about from this corner or this publication alone. He is protected by the Fairfield County based, progressive-owned local electronic media and [Hearst Connecticut Media Group](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcH5SJNHaBaJPae2SaxCU714F8jw2aNV0XC7BCC0vSuGnaA5FkVBWSIVrl0m2MbHwIVMzZi4Qonvi79UeAk_pA6vtsFgWGJZboYHAAl1h7jKQMI2CdTus5-a0UFy8Jrdb8-n_MVz7HuIJ-Z3AbsFuUpf0FT7V17-5Mjb7Y6ki1L_FPyYpTxcEOZ-J7RGH4F-SxK3TeCjxwminGJ77R1fj3IEYjn3hQNybzOg2x3LPyMwx&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==) which owns 13 of the 17 town papers in the Fourth District. These outlets serve as a protective cloak for him, keeping average citizens in the dark, and effectively keeping him in power. Let us hope that this election cycle the Republican party nominates a solid candidate who will not flinch, and will take the fight to Himes, vanquish him from the public stage, and finally provide some desperately-needed representation to the citizens of the Fourth District.

---
---
---
| In Liberty,
Bob MacGuffie bobmac@rightprinciples.com
---
| |
---
| Read [The Seventh Crisis](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018rniRewTxX2yuozXPvavRI6_7p4Xl-L6_A7Fax2XSGZ0UrV5iYVzcOw7ogUi3rc8rvjHYTPTIQM3C8xF5QdQnowynQ7ZOhvXUZ4GI4QR1elnqXBbipobO6u4r1EZfyl4iEIqg0WntQqwq3hrpoHX8w==&c=7gNibp6_qCAPakGmMjRJ2h_Rjc97S5QN0Qd-Gy99W7Ik2dDXdhRmHA==&ch=rchBjUbJJ2n4Lp84Tc3__7geFY5ajpZrQyrZOHpA2P7R8gyDT0514w==)

Himes' challenging of Schiff indicates he well-knew there was no evidence of collusion, and that Schiff's public statements, made standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Himes, were lies designed to cripple Trump and his Administration. But Himes made a calculated decision to stand with Schiff for six years, until it all culminated in Schiff's disgrace, as he was formally Censured by Congress on June 23, 2023 - a very rare congressional chastisement. And just before that Censure, Jim Himes took one more opportunity to bold-face lie to the Congress and the public when he stated to the entire House, "I sat next to Adam Schiff for years. He is a man of integrity and dignity." For Himes, lying through his teeth is just another day at the office. As I've noted in many previous articles, Jim Himes has been lying to his 700,000 constituents consistently for the 16+ years he's been in office. And his lies have become increasingly consequential. For years he lied to us about Joe Biden's mental impairment, then a year ago when Biden's reelection bid became untenable, he lied claiming it was the first he knew, when he publicly called for Biden to step aside. Now this treacherous episode of vouching for Schiff's veracity by standing with him as he lied for six years straight. Mr. Himes has long ago broken the public trust, and has so much for which to answer. But his much-deserved reckoning cannot be brought about from this corner or this publication alone. He is protected by the Fairfield County based, progressive-owned local electronic media and == which owns 13 of the 17 town papers in the Fourth District. These outlets serve as a protective cloak for him, keeping average citizens in the dark, and effectively keeping him in power. Let us hope that this election cycle the Republican party nominates a solid candidate who will not flinch, and will take the fight to Himes, vanquish him from the public stage, and finally provide some desperately-needed representation to the citizens of the Fourth District. | In Liberty, Bob MacGuffie bobmac@rightprinciples.com | | | Read == | | | | | LibertyLine | Fairfield | Fairfield, CT 06824 US | | | | | | |

subject: A modern day slave trader is working to turn PA red
body:
The proceeds of an alleged violent human trafficking network are being invested in taking Pennsylvania so far to the right that it will be unrecognizable.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sorSxQOZv7car-3YGfAE3mvJxFQP-03aiXM5pTuY-bQIYXxy1hYeukC8vpMWzxdnznEdsgArOVdLFXKJSB1gf7WxJqdDFpbGIl3xifE1hfxOAKhTHepSfR-QacnoEYEutGE3tir-aUqd_Rkku01l6astw45AM_btKks71Y8Bat3adFNhNfYI32p2zH7psqE_J0Y8l4TO1iXV7YayL4qtscWKnhM1muRn&c=xOMvj1pgCxHVdKQE81tBhxHPQtAE2XDvaV4yBaW6i3gJOBxsxxef4A==&ch=tFr2AJXR9EJzuDtk7LkodGgK66WgFn_Y_tJTBca788GeRDTlu7o7yg==)
---
| Peter,
Yesterday, we wrote to you about the far-right PAC, Early Vote Action, that is the spearhead of the GOP's efforts to remove the Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in an obscure upcoming November 2025 election.
Removing these justices means clearing the way for a GOP redistricting that would remove all of Pennsylvania's blue congressional seats and zero election accountability for MAGA in 2026 and in 2028 when Trump seeks a third term.
Unless Dems can make a rapid course correction a GOP victory in this race is all but assured. Which begs the question: how did Early Vote Action accrue so much momentum so quickly? The answers lies in the PAC's dark money backers:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sorSxQOZv7car-3YGfAE3mvJxFQP-03aiXM5pTuY-bQIYXxy1hYeukC8vpMWzxdnznEdsgArOVdLFXKJSB1gf7WxJqdDFpbGIl3xifE1hfxOAKhTHepSfR-QacnoEYEutGE3tir-aUqd_Rkku01l6astw45AM_btKks71Y8Bat3adFNhNfYI32p2zH7psqE_J0Y8l4TO1iXvFXruHydbgzzrgWcfEEIj&c=xOMvj1pgCxHVdKQE81tBhxHPQtAE2XDvaV4yBaW6i3gJOBxsxxef4A==&ch=tFr2AJXR9EJzuDtk7LkodGgK66WgFn_Y_tJTBca788GeRDTlu7o7yg==)
---
| | | | The PAC's funders include Elon Musk (who gave a million dollars!), Turning Point USA, and General Michael Flynn's PAC. Flynn is notorious for using his military psychological warfare acumen to bolster the insidious Q-Anon narrative that claimed people like Obama and Hillary Clinton were murdering children.
Also amongst the PAC's backers is Tristan Tate who has been making frequent $5,000 donations to the PAC since the beginning of this year. Tristan is the brother of notorious 'masculinity' influencer Andrew Tate. The brothers were arrested last year on rape and human trafficking charges when the network they were running was uncovered by authorities. They are accused of being literal slave traders.
Utilizing a tactic they referred to as the 'loverboy' method, the brothers would travel to impoverished countries seeking out attractive young women, flaunt their wealth and feign interest in their targets getting them to become their girlfriends, and once enmeshed in their web and with nowhere to run, the brothers then allegedly trafficked the women forcing them into a life of prostitution.
The proceeds of this alleged violent human trafficking network are being invested in taking Pennsylvania so far to the right that it will be unrecognizable -- and so far, they are winning.
Defend Our Courts, one of the only Democratic orgs ringing the alarm bell about this looming disaster, is rapidly building up a counterforce to salvage things for Dems, but we are outnumbered and outgunned.
[To have any hope of keeping up with the troves of MAGA blood money flowing into this race we will need support from every small dollar donor in the nation. Can we count on you to chip in $50, $25, or even $5 to save PA and keep us in the fight? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sorSxQOZv7car-3YGfAE3mvJxFQP-03aiXM5pTuY-bQIYXxy1hYeukC8vpMWzxdnyDjNuP9GW3V8qWeXzW0ZLfGQxugy9sP6Lscy3yAD559fgthaL-iuKBuHYugWd2twMYaJINXDlOZdGDab60FYXrI2Eo31zXuYTPh1UPAHnkGG_LAA0rCKxpMZURohhNY2bJ-zaJlv0xhm2aGwTX0tzzzamBpGpkyQ1MEqC514-pc=&c=xOMvj1pgCxHVdKQE81tBhxHPQtAE2XDvaV4yBaW6i3gJOBxsxxef4A==&ch=tFr2AJXR9EJzuDtk7LkodGgK66WgFn_Y_tJTBca788GeRDTlu7o7yg==)

| | |
# [Stop Trump’s Authoritarian Takeover of DC.!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfcc56c1c-8945-43ad-933d-fa66a1d0ef85/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd768fc4-fcc4-49b1-b422-e628d2754cac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump has ordered an unprecedented federal takeover of D.C.'s Police Department. And now he's pouring in federal and National Guard troops -- primarily from deep red states like [Mississippi](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21a1e023-d3fe-4d17-9eb0-2fa6da6c5e01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and South Carolina, in an obvious effort to maximize tension. This is not about safety. DC crime rates are at a thirty year low, and falling. And the troops Trump is sending are not trained for fighting crime. Worse yet, he is diverting actual policing resources away from fighting crime for asinine ego projects like his parade. **This is about power. And a wannabe dictator who is trying to seize it, city by city.** This is an attack on democracy — and a dangerous step toward authoritarian rule. [**Add your name, and demand that Trump reverse these moves, and focus on real efforts to fight crime -- something he knows well, given his 30+ convictions.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te213e6c0-6e35-4f52-9f4f-4ad4039f613c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3c04026-9653-4aba-a6b1-0cb1cc20d6ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb68fe98a-c70d-40e2-b0f3-251a26b17173/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8a9b06c-f3f5-473b-95b9-5543da94e56b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

# OTC Ivermectin is Now a House Priority!
| |
---
| After the untimely death of HB 3219 during the 89th Regular Legislative Session, Team TFVC immediately went to work to keep the fight for OTC Ivermectin alive in the minds of Texans. We quickly launched a petition urging Governor Abbott to add the issue to the First Special Session call, and more than **7,000 of you signed on!** Despite hand-delivering these signatures to the Governor’s office, and despite **Rep. Joanne Shofner swiftly refiling her bill** and working tirelessly to gather majority support from her colleagues, the issue was not added to the call. Then, thanks to Democrat legislators intentionally breaking quorum, the First Special Session ended almost as quickly as it began. Governor Abbott immediately called a Second Special Session, which gaveled in at noon Friday. In a powerful moment, House Speaker Dustin Burrows publicly recognized Rep. Shofner’s persistence and announced that he would be giving the Ivermectin bill a **low bill number** —a clear signal that this legislation is a priority! This is proof positive that **your voices were heard**. Thousands of grassroots medical liberty supporters made it impossible for leadership to ignore this issue. The importance of making Ivermectin available without a prescription has now been acknowledged at the highest levels, and the Texas Legislature has a **historic opportunity** to make Texas the fifth state in the nation to enshrine this policy into law. Stay tuned—HB 25, Rep. Shofner’s priority bill, is **officially on the move**. As it progresses, TFVC will continue issuing **Action Alerts** so that you can keep influencing the outcome and help secure this critical win for Texas.

Joanne Shofner swiftly refiling her bill and working tirelessly to gather majority support from her colleagues, the issue was not added to the call. Then, thanks to Democrat legislators intentionally breaking quorum, the First Special Session ended almost as quickly as it began. Governor Abbott immediately called a Second Special Session, which gaveled in at noon Friday. In a powerful moment, House Speaker Dustin Burrows publicly recognized Rep. Shofner’s persistence and announced that he would be giving the Ivermectin bill a low bill number —a clear signal that this legislation is a priority! This is proof positive that your voices were heard. Thousands of grassroots medical liberty supporters made it impossible for leadership to ignore this issue. The importance of making Ivermectin available without a prescription has now been acknowledged at the highest levels, and the Texas Legislature has a historic opportunity to make Texas the fifth state in the nation to enshrine this policy into law. Stay tuned—HB 25, Rep. Shofner’s priority bill, is officially on the move. As it progresses, TFVC will continue issuing Action Alerts so that you can keep influencing the outcome and help secure this critical win for Texas. | | | | Vax Views | | | | | | Sound off! | Thanks to our engaged supporters from across the state, TFVC stands as the most effective medical liberty organization in the nation. With that in mind, here is this month’s question: | | | | | | Have you volunteered with TFVC, attended one of our events, or taken action through one of our alerts? | | | | | News | | | | | |

We are still dealing with the consequences of Joe Biden’s open border. Sleeper cells are here. They brought fentanyl. Women and children were trafficked in plain sight. Our cities are overwhelmed. The border may be closed now—but it’s too late.

**The damage is already here.**

**And what’s the Uniparty focused on?

_Sending billions to Ukraine._**

They want you broke. They want you distracted. They want you to comply while they fund foreign wars and leave our nation undefended.

This country belongs to us, not the lobbyists, not the foreign oligarchs, and not the political class.

Let’s take it back.
**Royce White**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3deed5b5bee44c37bd6a6cbce07e3432&_e=E24hB4kOYGYo51k5nemEhsN-RKGrWniT092mWTy6wcwBAajDEuHelHvg4J7nBckiNSVWGJvm0RiKydS3JiTws6w9fSvt09kpE9CSd76Q7yt3jEmKvONTK5tuw_pi-hOZ1dV821xyXaIpBWtfksSNYzJ5RcjZe7Rp2FteqYiBC2ohi8QYke0G0Ov0O9bHM5Q_f2ItT481fC9ECrseCmcIs2cM6J_Vx9ea1WT6g_Y-S4wS5mYHeOKsAHFgZVHn4TU4UJ96PHnujRlOPvQ8YZjWk_5taGSjKAMBsRGjmu4tglB7THpWmPSx9gK7MBaAATqgF8f9k0UJN1dtPxLPnDUilkCWZSh0CiAiVyU4t7Ll3Xla2r5K4VAbc6OBcDQpMG6LNl0AqqOr4F4TOQIFjL8Gi-fLCIq5g4cJPtseQYgL-ERtz7fcTCBpvliao0kzzc41TXVLE-yJMV1wuvynbt5CDkP5PH8bJFcQ4xK4w3EJMnTsF-gdP9IySrZ_1pNVOSQkt94ChX32nev_xai6EOglAXDb5PjpcQi8hMo1hrvZKyjtO-u3R1m-i48QAaJOtEP-)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

_Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9067250-b339-4e34-9058-e5b4c66f35a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

"The problem is not that people are taxed too little, the problem is that government spends too much." Ronald Reagan
While lower taxes have consistently driven economic progress and opportunity, higher taxes deliver clear and damaging consequences, twisting incentives and obstructing growth. Economic principles and historical records show that steep tax rates deter productive labor, savings, and bold entrepreneurship, resulting in economic slowdowns and widened inequality--paradoxically aggravating the very problems their advocates aim to fix. Elevated marginal rates serve as an outright punishment on drive and achievement. As Milton Friedman insightfully noted, "Whenever you try to do good with someone else's money, you are committed to using force."
Taxes inherently compel wealth redistribution, eroding voluntary giving and stifling innovation that thrives in free markets. Empirical studies confirm that high income taxes shrink gross domestic product by curbing investment, with corporate taxes inflicting particularly severe blows to expansion.
President Ronald Reagan, who dismantled years of oppressive taxation, cautioned, "The problem is not that people are taxed too little, the problem is that government spends too much."
His landmark 1981 Economic Recovery Tax Act reduced the top marginal rate from 70 percent to 50 percent, breaking the grip of stagflation and igniting a surge in prosperity. Unemployment, which had soared to a peak of 10.8 percent in late 1982 amid the recession's depths, fell dramatically to 5.3 percent by 1989, underscoring how tax relief fuels job creation and restores economic vitality.
By contrast, the 1930s demonstrate the folly of tax increases during downturns. Under Presidents Hoover and Roosevelt, measures like the Revenue Act of 1932 hiked the top income tax rate from 25 percent to 63 percent, expanded the tax base, and reimposed excise taxes--policies that prolonged the Great Depression by crippling businesses and heightening uncertainty.
Economist Murray Rothbard decried this coercive nature of taxation, declaring, "Income taxation reduces every taxpayer's money income and real income, and hence his standard of living."
Burdensome taxes invariably swell government bureaucracy, sidelining private initiative and enterprise. Britain's 1970s ordeal highlights this: a top income tax rate of 83 percent--escalating to as high as 98 percent on investment income--sparked a "brain drain" of talent and entrenched economic decline. Relief came only through Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher's reforms, which lowered the top rate to 60 percent in 1979 and further to 40 percent by 1988, revitalizing investment and growth.
Economist Arthur Laffer's renowned curve illustrates how exorbitant rates often backfire, diminishing revenue through evasion and reduced activity, while emphasizing that excessive government spending undermines prosperity.
In post-World War II America, top tax rates exceeding 90 percent correlated with sluggish growth until President John F. Kennedy's cuts in the 1960s reduced them to a range of 14-65 percent, catalyzing a vigorous economic expansion.
Nobel laureate Friedrich Hayek linked high taxes to the erosion of liberty, arguing, "The idea of social justice is that the state should treat different people unequally in order to make them equal."
Progressive tax structures breed dependency, evident in welfare-heavy nations where high rates correlate with diminished social mobility. Contemporary cases reinforce this: France's 75 percent "supertax" on incomes over one million euros in 2012 triggered an exodus of entrepreneurs and generated far less revenue than projected--merely 260 million euros in its first year and 160 million in the second--due to capital flight and economic drag.
Conversely, Ireland's competitive 12.5 percent corporate tax rate has drawn global tech firms, propelling GDP per capita upward through increased investment and job growth.
Moreover, elevated taxes exacerbate inflation and debt, prompting governments to resort to money printing for deficits. In the end, history unequivocally shows that higher taxes weigh down economies, eroding incentives and shared prosperity. Adopting lower taxes, as championed by these visionary thinkers, honors human initiative--rewarding diligence and cultivating a vibrant society where growth lifts everyone.
Mississippians, urge your representatives to prioritize tax cuts that empower families and businesses. Stay informed on fiscal policy and support efforts for limited government and greater freedom.

name: Marialana Kinter
subject: First Volunteer Call - Kinter For Congress
body:
Good afternoon!

First, I want to say thank you so much for signing up to volunteer. I've
been so inspired by the number of people who are ready to be a part of our
"Community First" movement. You are the foundation of this campaign, and
I'm so excited to get to work with you.

I'm writing with an exciting announcement and an invitation: our very first*
Weekly Volunteer Call is happening tomorrow!*

This is our new central meeting place for all volunteers! Join us every
week virtually to get updates on the campaign, help us plan our next
community projects, and get trained on everything from phone banking to
social media. This is where we build our movement, together. *Since it's
virtual, you can participate from anywhere you are, whether that's
California or right here in Florida!*

*Sign up for tomorrow's call here:*
https://www.mobilize.us/marialanakinterforcongress/event/830268/
*Other Upcoming Events*

We also have a fantastic lineup of in-person events for August if you're in
the Central Florida area.

-

*Coffee & Convos (In-Person):* I'm hosting a series of casual coffee
meet-ups all across the district. There are no speeches or formal
agendas—just a real conversation about the issues that matter to you. Come
by, grab a coffee, and let's talk about the future we can build together.
Currently scheduled: Oviedo, Deltona, New Smyrna, Port Orange. *Find a
date and location near you and RSVP here: KinterforCongress.com
<http://kinterforcongress.com/>*
-

*Pups & Politics (In-Person):* Join me and fellow dog lovers for a fun
and casual social at the park! This is a great chance to let your furry
friends play while you connect with me and other engaged members of our
community in a relaxed setting. *Find a date and location near you and
RSVP here: KinterforCongress.com <http://kinterforcongress.com/>*

This is what a people-powered, community-first campaign looks like in
action. I can't wait to see you at an event soon.

In solidarity,
--
Marialana Kinter

*U.S. Navy Veteran | Congressional Candidate, FL-07*
‪321.247.8403‬
KinterForCongress.com

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Stop ICE Agents From Wearing Masks When Conducting Arrests
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Stop ICE Agents From Wearing Masks When Conducting Arrests](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b8efca1-341a-4879-9ea0-be4245aa6ec5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1724755-2bb9-4c94-828f-a6215afefc18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers are increasingly hiding their faces behind masks when they take people from their homes, workplaces, and communities. And in many cases, they are refusing to identify themselves or show a badge, leaving terrified onlookers to wonder who the hell is taking their loved ones -- including American citizens. [**This practice is unacceptable, and it must stop now. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbfbd872-b545-4996-9a4b-64ab44287a3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **No other branch of law enforcement routinely hides its officers' faces during standard operations. ICE should not be allowed to operate in the shadows.** We call on the Department of Homeland Security and ICE leadership to immediately end the use of masks by ICE officers during enforcement actions, except in rare, specific circumstances where genuine health or safety risks require them. Government must be transparent, accountable, and humane. Masked raids are none of these. [**Add your name to demand that ICE stop hiding behind masks**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdec2f9a0-b1d6-4678-892c-d7ec45de4ebb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5918f6b8-0d94-4ae9-8ec1-0d5c1517c335/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39353983-44ab-4295-987e-ff2f880771d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

# [Liberals laughed at RFK Jr's COVID warning... until THIS happened](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1d665e-f458-49e9-98e0-2dc433170885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1d665e-f458-49e9-98e0-2dc433170885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
When RFK Jr warned that COVID 19 originated from a lab leak in Wuhan, China... liberals laughed and called him a conspiracy theorist.
NOW the FBI, CIA and Department of Energy all agree that Covid-19 most likely originated from a Wuhan lab leak...
Once again Kennedy was proven right.
But **[RFK Jr.'s next WARNING](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1d665e-f458-49e9-98e0-2dc433170885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be far worse for millions of Americans.

Before the deep state's smear campaign really revs up--**[see it here for yourself.](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1d665e-f458-49e9-98e0-2dc433170885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/4b1d665e-f458-49e9-98e0-2dc433170885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Thug who threatened to kill Trump arrested
Nathalie Rose Jones **[was arrested and federally charged](https://substack.com/redirect/9aecbde1-9e93-44b5-a00a-c873eca880a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with threatening to kill President Donald Trump after traveling from New York to Washington, D.C., and posting threats on Facebook and Instagram calling for Trump to be "eliminated."
* **U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro[announced the arrest](https://substack.com/redirect/968b45c1-1023-48ca-87bc-b1a56bfabfdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as part of the federal crackdown on crime in D.C., stating Jones continued calling the president a "terrorist" and "was working to have him eliminated" while promising full prosecution.
* **The arrest is part of broader law enforcement success since Trump federalized D.C. police in August** , with nearly 400 individuals arrested overall and 137 arrests made over the weekend alone, along with seizure of 21 illegal guns.
* **The federal takeover followed high-profile violent crimes in 2025** , including the fatal shooting of congressional intern Eric Tarpinian-Jachym, two Israeli Embassy staffers, and the brutal beating of a DOGE staffer during an attempted carjacking, amid ongoing concerns about Trump's security after two assassination attempts in 2024.

* * *
# RFK Jr vs Pete Hegseth pullup contest challenges Americans to get fit
HHS Secretary RFK Jr. and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth competed in the "Pete and Bobby challenge" at the Department of Defense, attempting to complete 50 pullups and 100 pushups in under five minutes as part of promoting fitness across America.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1e0e396e-fff6-45b1-89dc-c1bf61a7ef01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Hegseth won the competition with a time of about 5:25 minutes, narrowly beating the 71-year-old Kennedy** , while some Marines present completed the challenge in under four minutes and one finished in under three minutes.
* **The challenge supports Trump's "Make America Healthy Again" movement** , with Kennedy promoting whole foods over processed meals and Hegseth working to improve military fitness standards after declaring it "completely unacceptable" that two-thirds of the military is overweight.
* **The pair challenged Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy to join the competition** and emphasized that President Trump inspired the fitness initiative, which includes Trump's reinstatement of the Presidential Fitness Test for schoolchildren after Obama had retired the program.

* * *
# Chicago crime out of control as Trump threatens city takeover
A 31-year-old woman, Gabriela Ochoa, **[was fatally shot in the chest](https://substack.com/redirect/ac66c931-5bff-49fb-9bef-d2a17e20deee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a botched robbery on Chicago's South Side Saturday night, with the suspect driving a dark-colored sedan and still at large with no arrests made.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/877a7245-3c47-451d-8084-82c23bcab60d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The area is experiencing "escalating violent attacks" according to Alderman Nicole Lee** , who cited recent incidents including burglars targeting senior citizens and promised increased police patrols while expressing concern about "disgustingly bold and violent crimes."
* **The same week saw two separate robberies at The Dandy Crown bar in River West** , with one suspect using a knife to demand money and steal purses, and another bodyslaming a female employee after rifling through belongings in an employee-only section.
* **The violence occurs as President Trump has threatened federal intervention in Chicago** , similar to the federal takeover of Washington D.C. police, with local businesses calling for more city action while authorities continue searching for multiple suspects across these incidents.

Peter,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.

_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Peter, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.

| | Charlie Kirk took the stage and stared down the media and the ENTIRE radical leftist indoctrination regime and DEFIANTLY declared:

**_“YOUR TIME IS SOON UP! YOU’VE AWOKEN A SLEEPING GIANT!”_**

You see, Charlie Kirk is the leader of Turning Point USA – a group that President Trump called one of the most influential youth organizations in American History! He’s spent his entire career working with young people on college campuses, providing an opportunity for students to hear about CONSERVATIVE values for the first time. He’s helping to SAVE America’s youth from becoming the most RADICAL leftist generation ever. **_[And if YOU want to be a part of the SAVING America from the radical left’s INDOCTRINATION REGIME, we need your help as soon as possible...](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_** Charlie knows all too well that the radical left’s indoctrination of America’s precious young people starts LONG before they walk onto a college campus. **It starts in Kindergarten, and it doesn’t relent for ONE MINUTE until they end their schooling career.** Charlie Kirk: _“You have 10s of millions of people going to government-run schools, and you act as if liberty can continue._**_It’s not going to happen._**_If you have 18 years of indoctrination that you’re up against, then of COURSE they’re going to turn to the administrative state. Don’t be shocked when a bunch of kids become LEFTISTS when they were raised in the LEFTIST machine.”_ **_“The system is corrupt to the CORE. The incentive structure is to indoctrinate.”_** Make no mistake – the radical left’s **PRIME OBJECTIVE** is to **DESTROY** America from within by indoctrinating an entire generation of children. **EVERY STUDENT IN AMERICA.** The RINOs in charge of the GOP for the last few decades were ASLEEP at the wheel while the radical left took over nearly every “Educational Institution” in the country. **_But now Charlie is issuing a CRITICAL call-to-arms._** He realized that working on college campuses is CRITICAL... But in many cases, it’s TOO LATE to reverse the lifelong leftist brainwashing effort they experience in schools. Charlie Kirk: “ _Try to start local!_**_School boards_** ___are very important.... Remember when we were in the dark winter of 2021... Where did our movement focus? On school boards. We focused on school boards through 2021 and 2022. It was a great restart for our movement when we were in oblivion. It was a BOTTOM UP reset and we helped rebuild the movement in a really positive way.”_ [**_And WE at the 1776 Project PAC were on the forefront of that movement to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS, one school board at a time!_**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) But, even as we’ve flipped 270+ school board districts and liberated 4.5 MILLION students from radical leftist leadership in schools – we’re JUST SCRATCHING THE SURFACE! Charlie Kirk:**__****“Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state – likely even your district!”** **_That’s why, THIS NOVEMBER, we’re launching the LARGEST school board campaign operation that this nation has EVER seen._** **We’re coming to HUNDREDS of school districts with MASSIVE resources.** [**_And we need YOUR help to provide all the necessary support._**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) You see, our team isn’t backed by billionaires or special interests.******_The 1776 Project PAC is 100% GRASSROOTS funded._** We’re already**LESS THAN 80 DAYS AWAY FROM ELECTION DAY!** **_And Charlie Kirk is ON BOARD with our plan – he said THIS about the 1776 Project PAC:_****_“I LOVE IT!”_** **_[Patriot, we’re humbly requesting your immediate support. We don’t have much time to prepare before we go into battle against multi-billion-dollar radical leftist organizations who will spend whatever it takes to maintain their IRON GRIP over our education system and our nation’s school boards.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_** **_We’re asking you for just $17.76 to help out before time runs out on the most CRITICAL elections of 2025._** **_Sincerely,_** **_1776 Project PAC Team_** **_P.S. Our team has been SO successful that we’ve received the overwhelming support of some of the best and brightest minds of the Conservative movement!_** **_Just see for yourself!_**
