name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I need you to see this update on the data here in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Wishful thinking won’t save us, Peter.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93926?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth)
Peter, too often when campaigns face cold, hard data showing a tough road ahead, they turn a blind eye. It’s one of the reasons Democrats are where we are today.
I’m determined not to repeat the mistakes of the past. So I’m going to share with you the truth about what the data is showing about our race here in New Jersey. I’m also going to share my plan for how we overcome the obstacles and win. And then, if you’re all in on beating Jack Ciattarelli and preventing New Jersey from falling into the hands of a MAGA loyalist, I’m going to ask you to **[split what you can between my team and State Democrats Committee to help me put that plan into action.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93926?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth)**
**Here’s an unvarnished look at what the data tells us:**
**→Polling.** Since the general election began a few weeks ago, one poll after another has come out showing me with a small lead (often just 3-6%) over Jack Ciattarelli — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the outcome either way.
And that’s not even taking into account the possibility that the polls could be underestimating Republicans, Peter, as they have in several recent elections. We need to campaign like we’re behind — _because we may well be._
**→Recent elections.** The 2024 presidential race in New Jersey was decided by less than 6% The last governor’s race here? Decided by just 3%. Recent election results and recent polls all tell the same story: _New Jersey is a battleground state._
**→Attack ads.** Ciattarelli’s super PAC has announced plans to spend over a million dollars attacking me across New Jersey, with plenty more planned in the weeks ahead. One recent poll found that after undecided voters heard these false attacks without a fact-check, _they swung heavily in Ciattarelli’s direction._
**Here’s what this all means, Peter: we are in an incredibly competitive race, and we will only win it if we work night and day to get our message out all across New Jersey. And that’s exactly what my team and I plan to do.**
We need to get out of the usual Democratic comfort zone and show up everywhere so that voters can actually hear what we have to say.
We need to blanket the state with our plan for lowering costs and making daily life easier for New Jersey families.
We need to reach out personally to undecided voters — and make sure every single one of our supporters shows up to vote this fall.
And it won’t be enough to fight Ciattarelli and his dark-money machine to a draw. We need to outhustle, outwork, and outsmart them every step of the way.
**[Peter, I’m all in on winning this race for the people of New Jersey. I’ve spent my life running toward tough fights, and I won’t hesitate to run toward this one. If you’re with me, I need your support. Please split whatever you can between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us win what is shaping up to be a nail-biter of a race.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93926?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93927?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93927?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93927?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93927?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93927?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93927?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93926?refcode=em20250819-9294&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9294%2E614464%2EFPiIth)
---
Thank you,
Mikie

name: Her Bold Move
subject: Re: Fwd: “Women are the kind of people that people come out of.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113588634/564280304/862233165?refcode=EM_F_250818ClintonB_N_HBM_NO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiOTIyMzllLTAwN2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=28fky_JnO8tEFA7jyFzAWQRSr215XP5eaLvUEtA3534=)
---
Peter,

In case you missed it, _CNN_ recently aired a profile of a pastor named Douglas Wilson and the influential movement he leads. The piece revealed that his movement preaches that women should not be allowed to vote or hold leadership positions...

One of the most appalling moments of the interview was when Wilson said, _“Women are the kind of people that people come out of.”_

We find that statement chilling.

But here’s the thing: While many are sharing the interview because it is flagrant and disturbing, **Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reposted it in support of Wilson... and subsequently revealed that he is actually a member of Wilson’s church.** We know far too many others in our government subscribe to this ideology, too.

At Her Bold Move, we know the best way to block these men from writing harmful laws is to **elect more women lawmakers.** Women have been left out of conversations about our own bodies, safety, and rights for far too long. **At Her Bold Move, we’re ushering more women into the rooms where decisions and laws are made by offering game-changing support to their campaigns.**

If this video and Douglas Wilson’s movement make you angry and frightened – channel that anger and fear into ACTION. [**Help make sure that when men like Pete Hegseth put forth harmful policies about women, they are always forced to contend with women lawmakers. Rush $20.25 or more to help us elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women to office who will block sexist lawmakers across the country. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-women/?refcode=EM_F_250818ClintonB_N_HBM_NO_8_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

Together,

Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
---
_“Women are the kind of people that people are meant to come out of.”

“I would support the 19th Amendment to be repealed.”

“Families should vote as a household, with the husband and father casting the vote.” _

**These are all quotes from a massively influential pastor and self-described Christian nationalist named Douglas Wilson. In a recent interview with _CNN_ , Wilson admitted that he would like America to become a patriarchal society where men are dominant and women are expected to submit to their husbands. The interview has been shared widely, and we’re linking to a clip below so you can see it for yourself. **

But while many people are sharing the interview because it is flagrant and disturbing, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reposted it with the text, "All of Christ for All of Life."

Chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell told _NPR_ that Hegseth is a "proud member of a church affiliated with the Congregation of Reformed Evangelical Churches," **which was founded by Wilson.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113588636/564280306/862233165?refcode=EM_F_250818ClintonB_N_HBM_NO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiOTIyMzllLTAwN2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=28fky_JnO8tEFA7jyFzAWQRSr215XP5eaLvUEtA3534=)
---
We have been sounding the alarm, as many of Trump’s appointees and policymakers in the MAGA movement have made it clear that they support these ideologies. These aren’t just comments by random trolls on the internet. These are the strongly held beliefs of powerful men who are the ones writing policy about our bodies, our safety, our well-being, and our _**_rights_**_.

But here’s the thing: **The _best defense_ against this anti-woman movement is to elect pro-choice, pro-women women to political offices across the country. **

When Wilson was asked if he believes women should be allowed to have leadership roles in government, he answered, “No.”

What other policies should we expect to see from the men in power who follow the teachings of this church? At Her Bold Move, we refuse to wait around and find out...

[**We MUST continue to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women up and down the ballot to block chauvinistic, misogynistic officials from threatening our hard-fought rights as women. If you are as disturbed by this interview as we are, chip in $20.26 or more today to join us in this fight. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-women/?refcode=EM_F_250818ClintonB_N_HBM_NO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.26)
---

Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3nqm32hag3ih1vnjjdtkfhmjh1gg7qqrkoql25g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh68p72cjh2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zppbk24mp8aba683a6vl6ua8eqbjqmn9ic6iar6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh68p72cjh2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,

subject: When can we talk?
body:

| | This can't wait.

This is Trump-endorsed, battle-tested MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds -- and the Radical Left has declared WAR on my campaign for Governor of Florida.

>From the moment I announced I was running for Governor of Florida the Democrats have been relentless in their _**[attacks against me.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmd7k4r09p1avr03371qjupt9q18g9rrq1bkb9ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh64o75cjh2bs "attacks against me.")**_

They've teamed up with their buddies in the Fake News, launching _NATIONAL smear campaigns_ , hit pieces, and relentless lies to destroy my reputation.

_But they aren 't just attacking me. They are attacking my family, my friends, my allies, and the MAGA movement._

The same Democrats who wasted **$45 MILLION** trying to flip Florida Blue are gearing up to dump MILLIONS MORE to crush this campaign. They're BEGGING me to back down and surrender.

But let me make this clear: I won't back down. I won't fold. I won't sell out.

_Thankfully President Trump chose me for a reason_. I'm a fighter, period. With every attack from the Left I become stronger and more determined to maintain the American First way of life for Florida.

**Mandami has Founded a Chapter of Students for Justice in Palestine, the Organization that is Leading the Antisemitic Riots on College Campuses**
As Jewish Americans that happen to be Republican we find it unbelievable that the majority of Jewish voters vote Democrat.
This is despite the fact that the Democrat party and its leadership are supporting the antisemitic riots in our cities and our college campuses. Democrats have been equivocal at best in their support of Israel and are quick to blame Israel for the plight and starvation of the Gazans. Almost half of the Democrat Senators voted against weapons sales to Israel.
Yet these Democrats get re-elected. The Jewish alignment with Democrats can be historically traced to the Kennedy Democrat movement which is nothing like the modern day Democrat/ Democrat Socialist party. The Jewish acts of charity and service aligned with the Kennedy mentality of "Ask not what your country can do, ask what you can do for your country." The modern democrat mantra is what are you giving me?
Hamas is a Terrorist Organization that is depriving the Gazans of food. They are stealing and selling relief food with total disregard for the civilian population. They have used their population as human shields and committed barbaric Nazi-like war crimes against Jewish civilians. Their Covenant calls for the killing of all Jews. They are not fans of Christians either. They are still upset with the Christians for the Crusades. This misplaced blame the Jews rhetoric, while ignoring the barbarism of Hamas, is symbolic of Progressive Left Wing Antisemitism.
**Unfortunately the liberal sector of the Jewish population doesn 't get it. There are even Jews For Zohran as a Group**
These Jews are "Liberal" at any cost to prove their loyalty to the woke liberal cause they are supporting the Communist, Antisemitic Mamdani for Mayor of New York City because he is "standing up" for the downtrodden while he is an elitist.
Mamdani has called for spreading the Intifada, a holy war against Jews and Christians to the US. **He is one of the founders of a Students for Justice in Palestine chapter at Bowdoin University**. This organization has been a leading force in the Antisemitic riots on college campuses. He also subscribes to the "From the river to the sea" phrase which calls for the elimination of the Jewish population of Israel.
Our reaction to this Jewish Liberal support of Mamdani is unbelievable shock. _**Jewish voters need to get their head out of the sand and wake up to what a post-election New York would be like under Mamdani**_. College campus rioting would escalate and the police will not intervene. Other anti-Israel protests and Antisemitic riots will become commonplace.
The solution is not for rich Jews to simply have an exodus from the city to Florida.
This is the line in the sand and the most vocal supporter for Jews has been Mayor Adams telling New Yorkers to stand up and fight.
**History repeats itself with a vengeance.**
Remember under Mayor Dinkins there were Antisemitic riots in Crown Heights leading to death and destruction with no police intervention.
Don't be surprised if those riots return and they are already happening. With a defunded police force, and social workers at the front lines, violence will go unchecked. What will New York turn into other than a lawless chaotic disaster?
A mayor can change the curriculum in schools, change school holiday, change parking and zoning regulations. This can all be done to harm his enemies, including Jews. He can also grant zoning waivers, choose locations for homeless shelters and prisons.
He can issue permits for protests that block city roads during rush hour. He can alter building codes and send inspectors to unfavored neighborhoods to look for violations that can be fined.
There much more that a mayor can do to advance his social and antisemitic agenda.
Jewish voters need to learn that Antisemitism of the 21st century is a repeat of the Antisemitism of the 1930's in Germany under Adolph Hitler.
_**Many wealthier, educated Jews supported Hitler 's platform except for the Antisemitism. They believed that Hitler's Antisemitic remarks were just rhetoric.**_ The Association of German National Jews openly supported the election of Adolph Hitler. They supported the abandonment of Jewish identity and opposed Zionism. Sounds a lot like the progressive liberal platform of today.
Despite their extreme nationalism and loyalty to Hitler the Association of German National Jews was dissolved on November 18, 1935 and its leader imprisoned and sent to a concentration camp. He was eventually released but died of cancer in May, 1939.
Jewish liberals should take a lesson from what happened in 1930's Germany. Antisemitic candidates like Mamdani do not disregard their beliefs. Even if you agree on many issues Antisemitism trumps. Assimilated and Orthodox Jews were gassed to death in the same concentration camps by the Nazis.
If Mamdani gets elected he will implement his beliefs and it will be too late to stop him.
_**Liberal Jews must learn from the Jewish experience in Nazi Germany that antisemitic protagonist do not abandon their beliefs and when they are in a position to implement them they do.**_
Every voter of conscience must not allow Mamdani to get elected. Liberal Jews you will suffer the same religious persecution of more religious Jews. Your liberties are at stake and it is time to wake up and stop the election of Mamdani. Don't make the same mistake of many 1930's German Jews.
Don't let history repeat itself.
Don't vote for Mamdani. The future of the City of New York will be determined by this election.
Your vote counts, let history be your guide.

name: Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones
subject: Science, democracy, and truth are under attack. Join me in this fight.
body:
From whistleblowing to climate justice, I need your support today.

| |
---|---|---
|
# Science, democracy, and truth are under attack. Join me in this fight.
### From whistleblowing to climate justice, I need your support today.
| | Aug 19
---|---
Dear Friends -
I've written to you before.
You may have supported me during [my run for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/62761b79-e07a-473f-8640-254c0414496e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), stood by me as [Governor DeSantis tried to uproot my life for my whistleblowing](https://substack.com/redirect/08e2e90e-3493-46aa-b157-28f24bcc07e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or fought alongside me as we demanded accountability for [climate change](https://substack.com/redirect/b8bb753d-eb6d-4df6-8b8a-2cb54b6e767e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWVzb3NjYWxlbmV3cy5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MTM3MDE5NywicyI6MjgzNDQ5LCJmIjpmYWxzZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTYxMTYzNiwiZXhwIjoyMDcxMTg3NjM2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.9YmbirUgL65e_pvkMnmAmyA8fL4ZcIHHMN2LXTRBV2E?)
Today I'm emailing you from[ Mesoscale News](https://substack.com/redirect/1376de9e-0681-4d35-bded-823b3ee9f952?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), my best-selling disaster science, climate justice, and[ pro-democracy ](https://substack.com/redirect/e2d1598b-ea05-4a79-92b8-bbdf42d225b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)newsletter that I've built from the ground up.
As the Trump regime[ guts critical science initiatives](https://substack.com/redirect/1faf6af9-b9f0-4323-b70a-382056c5cf49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [denies the reality of climate change](https://substack.com/redirect/4902e439-ab9a-49db-aaee-a217773e2053?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [rewrites books in Orwellian horror](https://substack.com/redirect/dcebbdc9-bc17-456a-895d-269cdedfdf31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--I've built this platform to ensure every person I can reach is informed, safe, and empowered to act.
As corporate media bends the knee to Trump and too often refuses to report accurate science information (if they cover it at all), I am asking for your partnership to ensure our community remains informed.
For years now, I've stood in the path of disaster, trying to track it, understand it, and--where possible--push back. During the COVID-19 pandemic, I [defied threats from the state](https://substack.com/redirect/08e2e90e-3493-46aa-b157-28f24bcc07e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to make data public--because truth is oxygen, and people were suffocating without it.
Later, when I ran for Congress, it wasn't to climb a ladder--it was to stand firm for science, community, and the [fragile threads of democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/1cc08ffd-c22e-4fd3-bfc3-54558f18e7b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I later took a position with the federal government to put my expertise and experience to use building AmeriCorps' climate justice program - only for the [entire program to be cut during DOGE's war on science in April.](https://substack.com/redirect/ca43132b-122a-4299-b52f-2ef0c315d3dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Now, I write to you through this newsletter, and I once again am asking for your trust and support.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWVzb3NjYWxlbmV3cy5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MTM3MDE5NywicyI6MjgzNDQ5LCJmIjpmYWxzZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTYxMTYzNiwiZXhwIjoyMDcxMTg3NjM2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.9YmbirUgL65e_pvkMnmAmyA8fL4ZcIHHMN2LXTRBV2E?)
It's not just commentary; it's an effort to trace the fault lines between people and planet, to explain how those fractures became chasms, and how we might yet build bridges across them.
I've also used this space to help [other whistleblowers bring the truth into the light](https://substack.com/redirect/ab8c6a9a-8b3d-4421-bbb7-bb37e1e71094?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to[ expose politicians for lying](https://substack.com/redirect/1014dfb6-c322-4c7f-8457-d79c6db3e7db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and to break important [climate and](https://substack.com/redirect/3ed96a02-21a2-46f7-b8b2-21796e841fc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [disaster news.](https://substack.com/redirect/3e9639f0-c72a-4262-9d3d-380d0dc5ab4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
My hope is that you will see the value in this work and upgrade to a paid subscription to help me continue this public service. I have never been one to sit silent, and I am not about to start now.
Join me by subscribing, as a free or paid subscriber. We cannot leave our fate to a corrupt President and a complicit media. Let's continue to fight for science, for democracy, and for each other.
Sincerely,
**Rebekah Jones**
[ Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWVzb3NjYWxlbmV3cy5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MTM3MDE5NywicyI6MjgzNDQ5LCJmIjpmYWxzZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTYxMTYzNiwiZXhwIjoyMDcxMTg3NjM2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.9YmbirUgL65e_pvkMnmAmyA8fL4ZcIHHMN2LXTRBV2E?)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f8a10f6e-2ab9-47ab-91f4-d5b0f77d7258?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
About Rebekah:
_**Rebekah Jones**_ is currently the lead Climate and Ocean Science Advisor for [Project Zero](https://substack.com/redirect/199b2d8a-5543-415e-adcf-6e482c9f2faf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a UN-backed NGO, and an Advisory Board Member for the Maryland Clean Energy Center.

Since 2020, Rebekah has been named:
Whistleblower of the Year
Forbes' Technology Person of the Year
Fortune 40 Under 40
John Maddox Prize Nominee
Samuel Lawrence Prize Winner
DAMA International, Data Management Excellence Award Finalist
Whistleblowers of America Martha Mitchell Pillar Award Recipient
And much more.
(C) 2025 Rebekah Jones
PO BOX 3371, Silver Spring, MD 20918
[Unsubscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWVzb3NjYWxlbmV3cy5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.fFTZKr0FUFK6vX52nd09OBMatGCoh1vG9WBz2d4KJ7s?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/be824216-3e96-4689-8520-cb6ce96f4c46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..0zKFc_XWLIAzpsCXU0izvULQpNBfPRtTjMvbyx_1pOg?)

body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb4j7qe7c9gl3rh282mhfjkf5100rocli4q40vs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh64o76cdh2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zae8qubkejcvbq1ceflnpddjp1vsqgbcciqd8cs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh64o76cdh2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq23q4jerm7f8dp9df751vpm31r66o60t2t6dbtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh64o76cdh2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc1gip780mkl75t6dub2k93udbg78d5gnchb1vpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh64o76cdh2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza

name: Becky Edwards
subject: Big Primary Wins for Governing Group
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
Good governance starts with strong local leadership, and we are excited to share the success of our primary candidates.

| | | | | [|
---](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=edd0deb80b&e=6484bb6dd5)
| | | | | Dear Friend,We have big news to share:**in this year’s primaries, 30 out of 33 of the candidates we supported advanced to the general election.** That’s 91% of our candidates!This success spans mayoral, city council, and school board races across Utah. Each of these wins represents more than just a candidate moving forward—it represents a community choosing leaders who will listen, work across divides, and keep politics focused on real solutions.When good-governance-minded leaders win, our cities are more responsive, our schools are better supported, and our local governments deliver results that people can trust. That’s the kind of politics voters are asking for—and together, we are proving it can be done.As we head into the November general election, we need you to engage! In most counties, fewer than 30% of registered voters showed up to participate in their elections. We can only make the change we want to see locally if we show up to make it happen.
* **Vote** for principled candidates dedicated to good governance
* **Volunteer** for candidates in your community, including by knocking on doors and spreading the word on social media
* **Donate** to organizations and candidates who are in alignment with your vision for local leadership

Thank you for being part of this movement for better leadership. We are so proud of the candidates who have put their names forward to serve at the local level–because that’s where change starts. With gratitude,Becky Edwards Founder, Governing Group PAC

The numbers don’t lie. Democrats just hit their lowest approval rating in 35 years.

| | | Friend, The numbers don’t lie. Democrats just hit their**lowest approval rating in 35 years.****A staggering 33% approval rating** shows the American people are fed up with their radical, big-government agenda. _This is our time._ But conservative victories next November don’t happen by accident. The Left will pour millions into propaganda, lies, and attack ads to claw back support. If we want to protect and grow President Trump’s House Majority, we must keep our foot on the gas pedal **NOW.** [**Will you match our average donation of $31.78 to keep the pressure on?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcscgs0nfdec5v2qgqfvvutrsk1omckc76mqgju8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh66ob0cdh2bs)

Don’t give them the opening they need. [**Step up today and help deliver the knock-out blow next November.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfct58mfb9ah4q64eidl8gcm5jcdrc2i34dnel40_rp22sh2s8i6epb5cdh66ob0cdh2bs)

| | The GOP knows that their far-right agenda is unpopular. But instead of trying to earn votes by changing the way that they govern, they’re doing everything they can to cling to power by bending the rules. Want proof? Just look at Georgia, where Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is preparing to purge almost half a million people from the voter rolls in just five days — with support from the state GOP and MAGA extremists. Before the August 20 deadline to take action to stay on the voter rolls, our team is trying to reach as many people who may be affected as possible. Meanwhile, Texas Republicans just unveiled a new gerrymandered congressional map that would steal five U.S. House seats for them next fall — at the order of the Trump Regime. While the far right tries to dilute our voting power, we must protect our freedom to vote in free, fair elections — here in Georgia, throughout the South, and around the country. [**Republicans are working relentlessly to disenfranchise voters for their own political gain, and to fight back, we need your help. Will you donate to help defend our voting rights from the Trump Regime and its MAGA allies?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113592976/564294859/-666756594?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250819_T1_MidMonth_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc3ZmYxMC0wNTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8hjXhl4PoqvwWadAo80k7RjT4dlHlucTSsUulD1q5Hg=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113592980/564294864/-666756594?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250819_T1_MidMonth_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc3ZmYxMC0wNTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8hjXhl4PoqvwWadAo80k7RjT4dlHlucTSsUulD1q5Hg=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113592982/564294866/-666756594?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250819_T1_MidMonth_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc3ZmYxMC0wNTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8hjXhl4PoqvwWadAo80k7RjT4dlHlucTSsUulD1q5Hg=)

---|---
It isn’t surprising to see Republican efforts to suppress the vote — particularly right now. In Congress, Republicans just passed their massively unpopular budget bill that denies many Americans access to health care, food assistance, and other essentials. Now, Republicans are afraid of losing in the 2026 midterm elections. Attacking democracy in the South is a big part of their strategy to avoid accountability and hoard power, and Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff is one of their top targets to unseat.
Clearly, MAGA Republicans are afraid of a truly inclusive and representative democracy where _everyone’s_ voice is heard.
But we deserve a democracy that works for every American, where every vote counts, and where the promise of free and fair elections is real for us all.
[**Fair Fight works every day to make that a reality. We help elect voting rights champions, get voters the information they need to cast their ballots with confidence, and fight for equal access to the polls. clean_body: Will you chip in to help stop GOP voter suppression? | | | The GOP knows that their far-right agenda is unpopular. But instead of trying to earn votes by changing the way that they govern, they’re doing everything they can to cling to power by bending the rules. Want proof? Just look at Georgia, where Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is preparing to purge almost half a million people from the voter rolls in just five days — with support from the state GOP and MAGA extremists. Before the August 20 deadline to take action to stay on the voter rolls, our team is trying to reach as many people who may be affected as possible. Meanwhile, Texas Republicans just unveiled a new gerrymandered congressional map that would steal five U.S. House seats for them next fall — at the order of the Trump Regime. While the far right tries to dilute our voting power, we must protect our freedom to vote in free, fair elections — here in Georgia, throughout the South, and around the country. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- It isn’t surprising to see Republican efforts to suppress the vote — particularly right now. In Congress, Republicans just passed their massively unpopular budget bill that denies many Americans access to health care, food assistance, and other essentials. Now, Republicans are afraid of losing in the 2026 midterm elections. Attacking democracy in the South is a big part of their strategy to avoid accountability and hoard power, and Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff is one of their top targets to unseat. Clearly, MAGA Republicans are afraid of a truly inclusive and representative democracy where everyone’s voice is heard. But we deserve a democracy that works for every American, where every vote counts, and where the promise of free and fair elections is real for us all. = = In solidarity, The Fair Fight P.S. If you’re a Georgia voter, you can check to see if you’re on the purge list and find out how to protect your voter registration by visiting: = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Trump-Endorsed. Born in a Foster Home. Fighting for Ohio. |
---
Fellow American

Democrat Sherrod Brown is a dangerous extremist who spent more than 30 years in the Senate as one of Bernie Sander’s closest allies. He spent more than **$100 MILLION in 2024** to defend his seat and failed.

Now he’s back for Ohio’s open Senate seat and Democrats are already rushing millions into this race. _**That’s why I’m asking you to take a minute and read this email from the Republican candidate for this seat Jon Husted.**_

He has my full support along with a full-throated endorsement from President Trump. [**Now we’re asking you to take a minute to read his message to America and make a small contribution to his fight for Ohio’s Senate seat.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=5eea2a385cc04bf7b408d90c16e65455&_e=zx2UKFq3houKssIx5QWhTfq1EAmxZnK5CWVUNsn68NOZ6Lcd2rvh9OigKN0IcihflLMDXLo7d032tl2LctUb5A44cwpQUBwCDCADYZMkaWzFnyBJjoiC4KwKlvjRZvoY6tqyQwqpbz0uY7FCNtLXh6NDpYHt0HHORdA14uZTScqnaE31MwtRldmMiw6L01hkU85d0xAoVtT_Zuy1-FAfpKbHMDdzbKyzfyi361tqoANARKiXvvLXwnCmNu9MbIW8P0wADd0k5yaHuM-J7RjZNFRuZ2aPhgC64onayliKHzcCHVjoPra3lxtuJ94TT2vZUT5fFXnQaDK9L4sGoiBcmJh-3is6RbncGFS9uncYComHx2rd6Jlq3Dq-stJlCpDvHi03c0RabSkGeHMbBS2kHjusZvFZpi6el5c8_Za7FDWtTnExnQwA1Bqmu6djDYMLeAg7g9fUs8e7F99dUJ9JT5_9jSUt4P4zGSwFisY8-GuiuALv0s-9-hroYe8qHJb6MTOIMC8x6306amWS5j9w3SvmV35gTyuGda8aa-NKoE2gRl0ckmcTbNITl9Knrjf9LLKngnQrzD11YMpYfOjAquyVrYxR4sa0SJ1J3HGm8miiIO0xbRON_iYZNih7AjyUxL8_u9EjW3vbI-hAbFUYcLFQxi6jTO8Kd9X5Qr6d7qLPP_O6JVsE7AZZgIDPP5auZTKrRKp6sV3Z16-wAFllF1K4cXoJfscMvDqQRMZ3ybc%3D)

- Senator Steve Daines

* * *

Fellow American,

**I’m Jon Husted, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for Ohio’s hardworking families and defend the values that built this country.**

My journey began in a foster home, where I was raised by faith and determination to seize every opportunity that America offers. Growing up, I learned the value of hard work on the football field at the University of Dayton, where we won a National Championship. _Those lessons of grit and perseverance have driven me every day in public service._

[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=5eea2a385cc04bf7b408d90c16e65455&_e=zx2UKFq3houKssIx5QWhTfq1EAmxZnK5CWVUNsn68NOZ6Lcd2rvh9OigKN0IcihflLMDXLo7d032tl2LctUb5A44cwpQUBwCDCADYZMkaWzFnyBJjoiC4KwKlvjRZvoY6tqyQwqpbz0uY7FCNtLXh6NDpYHt0HHORdA14uZTScqnaE31MwtRldmMiw6L01hkU85d0xAoVtT_Zuy1-FAfpKbHMDdzbKyzfyi361tqoANARKiXvvLXwnCmNu9MbIW8CMfwrdN7fkPa3ovJpfgwNYOlXWvMCjgSfsoqnW1CcKfS3-bW9HH8VFFcjV7pYUtAJVR5Zk-Q3FfAL0yvjWEigoQZLLivDL9rZVXwMR3t6j0qoDDYpW9Rf2dHgbA22x5om9krj9zcvk-RlOnozmUdei0P5B3zAd3Nd901t9llV5cat5gQfX_8EeLskrj6j5u-P_c-HjDNUjrBgl2rkbrNatpa7ivMq9BkZ_fNitkLPc_RA0UYYGvezMeKpHzvOvgmLntz98zI_3l_KTMo5_jwKdxsyFNHWyXGptSY5QJKIrzmR4Ui081LqxVaoEmrlffJ8FlidtVCQeFco8BlhMQR7EiQJ3dGTXRiHlt3dlkvMy20E8BOyZzGgon8glyCSynK8P1yNpsiMLtDghLjERRiLB_j3vmxyroVoOLELFtfRECgpLp1_K6HuTgK6hNNH5thLBhVApV3vSMzaX6Aqr0KJNBoS8XEIel8gArQQk5VRHI%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=5eea2a385cc04bf7b408d90c16e65455&_e=zx2UKFq3houKssIx5QWhTfq1EAmxZnK5CWVUNsn68NOZ6Lcd2rvh9OigKN0IcihflLMDXLo7d032tl2LctUb5A44cwpQUBwCDCADYZMkaWzFnyBJjoiC4KwKlvjRZvoY6tqyQwqpbz0uY7FCNtLXh6NDpYHt0HHORdA14uZTScqnaE31MwtRldmMiw6L01hkU85d0xAoVtT_Zuy1-FAfpKbHMDdzbKyzfyi361tqoANARKiXvvLXwnCmNu9MbIW8vTEbFi7Mj1-Y1l4fFGL-fMwAyd7CrNhCPIgFEtwVRBbEBEhPwblRWYfHgH5_DzTLM03eh8q--RlU5oDgTh7sCSDzqXnV_yJHoxCpvEB4pl-hKzzvWkrk4o4UGK3nwVc0H_F2lnOi5735YqAxF3dYR4XyUR7I2bKpUubR4dw7ZXf83_KGBpdH4IY9l9jcD0-_Fs9vomcaoQ7O3CzWNhYUBh5ph4HNd3_hCZvkFZ2xPGogGdgvxzifP1WrWJxdtA5wKRKMprALJaF-Z6_oEUSHBFbJIcXo9WZDJQgxzjoC-Il4O864Zgc2o-hxxO2FRJtgbtQmReqKSY44j9-kjIlWrflsSeMXGKGWYnVvmPrUtjoxFPrv1as0TYx9X5EtG-4WZ4wh444RJeTm_t_3oZ28HBKnepgPEOSyh7G94D2IPaL9X33HpEROx8rGn9RR_3Zx-OT07WHaAGG7HbCEAvdMVUm9FyfmMO67o_FlS-tCd-A%3D)
I’ve served Ohio as Secretary of State and Lieutenant Governor, fighting for election integrity, job creation, and protecting our freedoms.

Now, I’m stepping up to fill the Senate seat opened by President Trump and J.D. Vance’s victory - _a seat that’s critical to Ohio’s future_. But Sherrod Brown wants to keep his grip on Washington and push his **radical, liberal agenda** that’s been **hurting** Ohio families for years.

[**JOIN ME IN THIS FIGHT >>**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=5eea2a385cc04bf7b408d90c16e65455&_e=zx2UKFq3houKssIx5QWhTfq1EAmxZnK5CWVUNsn68NOZ6Lcd2rvh9OigKN0IcihflLMDXLo7d032tl2LctUb5A44cwpQUBwCDCADYZMkaWzFnyBJjoiC4KwKlvjRZvoY6tqyQwqpbz0uY7FCNtLXh6NDpYHt0HHORdA14uZTScqnaE31MwtRldmMiw6L01hkU85d0xAoVtT_Zuy1-FAfpKbHMDdzbKyzfyi361tqoANARKiXvvLXwnCmNu9MbIW8SDABO5ZLiGckprb93y05B3KFHJsdRO765RVj4-U5c75Ekhfa5bnkOqGnYlg8Lee1pL0oXTrrzGPLngru2NBZkAxA1gfqtR6NLWE4mIWQelK40-mW8B6BE8386ry6nYR-xNwIxzIn3bU98xYCbZhCJWKQmUgDkKnmLoAQi8W1cxrRQMPNKeuCvQzeXKYWlvQLA0UoTDsAEgkRXt1Vll6qDhPBkyH_SCfcDUybjPLlwFbaaGWYyXoX8Iz99rKxoMeTT5i0pcTz9PRY9qj3cVRB1DG7kE0ZBS5swYBSeZQfgIAl1ghvl_dRufE4IweEZzGsFllsl7Q0fXXRccN2_DUtkk3R7zQGL2YygY0jyX7jPWk3obfIrRuADE0nRxrZz_XmmACWp8VzS5azC6XfG5X-jBLIE8QUWHLEnRXsZ5gAhW4XeHL6m4j3Utj5a29TeO4_A-Vbl-EQbsch-sPiJZ06bsERM8Au_uf7u8LTUfdyv2U%3D)
Brown supports open borders, sky-high taxes, and reckless spending that’s driving inflation and killing jobs. He’s been part of the problem in Washington, siding with Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer instead of hardworking Americans like you and me.

President Trump has entrusted me to lead this fight and hold this seat for Republicans. **But I can’t do it alone.** _We need patriots like you to stand with me now._

clean_body: Trump-Endorsed. Born in a Foster Home. Fighting for Ohio. | Fellow American Democrat Sherrod Brown is a dangerous extremist who spent more than 30 years in the Senate as one of Bernie Sander’s closest allies. He spent more than $100 MILLION in 2024 to defend his seat and failed. Now he’s back for Ohio’s open Senate seat and Democrats are already rushing millions into this race. That’s why I’m asking you to take a minute and read this email from the Republican candidate for this seat Jon Husted. He has my full support along with a full-throated endorsement from President Trump. - Senator Steve Daines Fellow American, I’m Jon Husted, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for Ohio’s hardworking families and defend the values that built this country. My journey began in a foster home, where I was raised by faith and determination to seize every opportunity that America offers. Growing up, I learned the value of hard work on the football field at the University of Dayton, where we won a National Championship. Those lessons of grit and perseverance have driven me every day in public service. I’ve served Ohio as Secretary of State and Lieutenant Governor, fighting for election integrity, job creation, and protecting our freedoms. Now, I’m stepping up to fill the Senate seat opened by President Trump and J.D. Vance’s victory - a seat that’s critical to Ohio’s future. But Sherrod Brown wants to keep his grip on Washington and push his radical, liberal agenda that’s been hurting Ohio families for years. Brown supports open borders, sky-high taxes, and reckless spending that’s driving inflation and killing jobs. He’s been part of the problem in Washington, siding with Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer instead of hardworking Americans like you and me. President Trump has entrusted me to lead this fight and hold this seat for Republicans. But I can’t do it alone. We need patriots like you to stand with me now. Your donation sends a clear message: Ohio is not Washington D.C.- and we’re going to KEEP** it that way. Together, we will defeat Sherrod Brown’s radical agenda and protect the future of our families, our freedoms, and our state. For Ohio and America, Jon Husted Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Endorsed by President Donald J. Trump | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

body:
We need your help to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California this November. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvjOwVVJZNPUmuIseTYcx1DvLvtYS_Kfgzzjyxy97-hIGiZlJEY4unXOFRlXGLvRiEEcqwsbEX88voEeVK0cRKFei376CjmUQnoiZBWYjbYtRDTUORblLlRllihw6npXWw1OJ7PvzJH5yEa4FgO9Yo5s9ClUt2gNwj0T5jdGRduvQl7gHYRXZIUyTdy2aHSWDBz47sg8rCmGuDPTmxfixsIZqUum5EfYneVOtVmpJYxto_4omObo5V1NK7eneGmNGZeS4S4FKFl69kyEAwc_DRoMjV_5VdQiBcU8DIhDk1hmLgCYJPBhjprvg4Y2L9RzgbTTtVL3H85_UTUqti86HEy/4j6/RUPzN90hT5Wg6LnED3Aywg/h0/h001.mOSiGrWOx_5CNdAuR3cpg27myXryv2qbWRVYjPVladY)
---
Team, it's Gavin Newsom. Reaching out to supporters of No Dem Left Behind to let you know: **We're doing this.** This November, California voters will have a chance to fight back against Trump's efforts to rig the election by voting on new congressional district maps in response to what Texas is doing. This election will not be easy. It will be expensive. It will be close. And we will only win if everyone understands they have a role to play in this fight. If that's all you need to hear, please make a contribution to help us **pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California this November:** **[https://actblue.com/donate/ndlb-california-redistricting](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvjOwVVJZNPUmuIseTYcx1DvLvtYS_Kfgzzjyxy97-hIGiZlJEY4unXOFRlXGLvRiEEcqwsbEX88voEeVK0cRKFDBYTgqUXswcnn2zgmG5vzGiOGW9hED5HBSmHZOi5hhyC0b4BxG709dmKuE0lo6ppUcXbQdW7xBp_oi-Y-U9E3b-U0pgLn89jflc14FIUR0Qx8qT37YT7AVTPUC5qNp1W_RrFyy7bLDHxO8W-zAIzFOQ_LIWt4PAPQXb3UVIAvvutqt4LryvMExMd_YKJEmcXmDflPjxp3FRNTqffP_5H6bBdT30hAjzItoK5td2GgZ__uXwo-l63bxSfs7Bmrzzm/4j6/RUPzN90hT5Wg6LnED3Aywg/h1/h001.6pO5ZLSxmQCgADWnkMVg3LGrcVva5LOUeN8JbrkIN3w)** I've long supported independent redistricting. I can't stand these gerrymandered districts. But Democrats can't just sit there and act holier than thou while we watch our democracy be totally degraded. Democrats try to play by a higher value system, but it's a different day. So if Greg Abbott and Donald Trump want to find five seats in Texas, then the blue state of California is going to get darker blue. **So I am asking you to donate to help us win.** $5 to help California neutralize Texas' redistricting. $5 to send a message to Donald Trump and the Republican Party that we will now allow their attacks on our democracy. $5 to make sure Trump can't rig the election to prevent Americans from electing a Democratic House of Representatives. [**Please use this link to contribute $5 or whatever you can afford to my campaign and No Dem Left Behind today. We are looking for a huge number of donations today as we launch this campaign.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvjOwVVJZNPUmuIseTYcx1DvLvtYS_Kfgzzjyxy97-hIGiZlJEY4unXOFRlXGLvRiEEcqwsbEX88voEeVK0cRKFSnKv0Ncct3wtTXxkhuy1Kgva3kWviIaIr4lKNEwBl6IbuQLUTfrhkW-3_lni8KDBjdumSekG5Bf_qa8lagVo0CCyPpXyeE01hHihd5Wu1_R7vTZb5OOgZrxVyffj0W2o5x1M7o16MJtSUtkCUI0Iwf6WsyZHygvkAWFwSrVkrAqp6hnyEx3OmNTXoGnHUGZlpSL0OmZ73cIKil179dqf-l9nWXMgz4dyICsFRfBmNaomm4Ar8vT2asIlxJVpgaqJ/4j6/RUPzN90hT5Wg6LnED3Aywg/h2/h001.ox5DcyJDn5ODad_tiH-k3il3LDVBqg8-Q9cj8jqKR4Q)

clean_body: We need your help to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California this November. | | Team, it's Gavin Newsom. Reaching out to supporters of No Dem Left Behind to let you know: We're doing this. This November, California voters will have a chance to fight back against Trump's efforts to rig the election by voting on new congressional district maps in response to what Texas is doing. This election will not be easy. It will be expensive. It will be close. And we will only win if everyone understands they have a role to play in this fight. If that's all you need to hear, please make a contribution to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California this November: I've long supported independent redistricting. I can't stand these gerrymandered districts. But Democrats can't just sit there and act holier than thou while we watch our democracy be totally degraded. Democrats try to play by a higher value system, but it's a different day. So if Greg Abbott and Donald Trump want to find five seats in Texas, then the blue state of California is going to get darker blue. So I am asking you to donate to help us win. $5 to help California neutralize Texas' redistricting. $5 to send a message to Donald Trump and the Republican Party that we will now allow their attacks on our democracy. $5 to make sure Trump can't rig the election to prevent Americans from electing a Democratic House of Representatives. Thanks for joining me in this fight. It won't be easy. Gavin Newsom | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: President Trump Shares Poll, Mace Leads Race for Governor of SC
body:
resident Donald J. Trump shared new polling last night on Truth Social showing Nancy Mace in the lead for Governor of South Carolina | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/president-trump-shares-poll-mace-leads-race-for-governor-of-sc?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| |
**PRESIDENT TRUMP SHARES POLL, MACE LEADING RACE FOR GOVERNOR**
President Donald J. Trump shares new polling showing Nancy Mace in the lead for Governor of South Carolina, just three weeks after her announcement.
---
|
---
| The poll, conducted by Meeting Street Insights, shows Mace leading the Republican primary field. President Trump amplified the results on his personal Truth Social account.

“President Trump knows what it takes to fight and win,” **said Congresswoman Mace. **“He was the first to say it: “she’s a fighter.” Like him, I will never back down, and I will always put South Carolina and America First. President Trump is going to need an America First governor he can count on, and that’s exactly what I’ll be.”
---
| [NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=782597a8db&e=ddc57b5ede "NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR")
---
|
---
| The poll, conducted August 11–12 among 600 likely GOP primary voters, shows Mace as both the best-known and best-liked candidate in the field. Eighty-three percent of Republican primary voters have heard of Mace, with a +29 net favorable rating, the highest of any candidate tested. On the ballot, Mace now leads the five-way race with **25%** , ahead of Attorney General Alan Wilson at **17%,** Congressman Ralph Norman at **10%** , Lt. Governor Pamela Evette at **6%** , and State Senator Josh Kimbrell at **3%**. When “leaners” are included, voters who were initially undecided but indicate a current preference, Mace’s support rises to **30%** , expanding her lead over Wilson (**20%**), Norman (**12%**), Evette (**7%**), and Kimbrell (**4%**). Mace holds double-digit advantages among the most critical voting blocs for winning a statewide GOP primary: **Trump Republicans:** +17 over Wilson (30%–13%)
**Conservative Republicans:** +12 over Wilson (28%–16%)
**Base Republicans:** +10 over Wilson (27%–17%)

“These results prove that our record and our plan for South Carolina is resonating with Republican voters across the state,” **said Congresswoman Mace.** “We’ll keep fighting every day to protect our South Carolina values, push conservative common sense policies forward, and deliver the best results. South Carolina first and always.” Mace is best positioned to consolidate support as voters tune in. Her momentum with grassroots conservatives and strength across nearly every demographic and regional slice makes her the most likely candidate to win a Republican primary next June.

“Mace is winning where it matters: with the base, with Trump supporters, and with voters who will decide the primary. No one else is even close,” **added Austin McCubbin, a senior advisor to Mace in her campaign for Governor.** The field remains wide, but the message is clear: Nancy Mace is leading the pack. The survey was conducted by Meeting Street, a pollster with a long history of statewide races including in South Carolina. The poll has a margin of error of ±4.0%.
---
| [DONATE](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=26b9441a78&e=ddc57b5ede "DONATE")
---
| **TEAM MACE**
campaign@nancymace.org

---
| |
---

Nancy Mace for Governor295 Seven Farms Dr Ste C-186Daniel Island, SC 29492-8001

You can [update your preferences](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&e=ddc57b5ede&c=e11d1acb6d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&t=b&e=ddc57b5ede&c=e11d1acb6d).

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: HUMILIATING setback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I asked you on Saturday.
I asked you on Sunday.
I asked you yesterday.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: The GOP is coming for marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,
A decade ago when the Supreme Court finally recognized marriage equality as the law of the land, it affirmed the dignity of countless LGBTQ+ families across America.
Now that very ruling is under threat.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-partner_ms_cp_em_kaine [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-partner_ms_cp_em_kaine]
If the Court overturns marriage equality, loving couples could lose protections overnight. Families would be torn apart. Lives uprooted.
This isn’t hypothetical. It’s real — and it’s personal to me, my husband Vann, and so many Granite Staters.
Elections have consequences. The Senators we elect have a say in who sits on the Court, and those justices will shape our freedoms for generations to come.
Trump has stacked the Court with hardline conservatives — and right now extremists are determined to erase hard-won rights for LGBTQ+ families.
I can’t promise this fight will be easy or that the road ahead won’t be hard.
But I can promise you this: I will never stop working to protect the rights and freedoms of every Granite Stater.
Split $30 between my campaign and Tim Kaine to win this Senate race and keep fighting for our rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-partner_ms_cp_em_kaine]
With pride and determination,
Chris Pappas
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-partner_ms_cp_em_kaine]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

For years, Elizabeth Johnston has been known as the Activist Mommy, leading a grassroots movement to protect innocent children and
call out media lies and ungodly entertainment. Now, this homeschooling mama to 10 kids is also a published author and the host of
the Elizabeth Johnston Podcast. Elizabeth is inspiring a new generation of parents to reclaim the culture. On the Moms for America
Podcast, she discusses surviving infidelity, feminism, and so much more. Listen in. Like, subscribe and share.

AI is Here to Stay - But Is It Healthy for America's Kids?

The future is here, and artificial intelligence is changing our world at a pace few of us can keep up with. Along with dramatic
achievements in technology, medicine, and more, AI also brings some more troubling developments. Some say our growing dependence
on AI will diminish our ability to engage in critical thinking and lead to loneliness. It's also an avenue for questionable
content that could be harmful to our children. Are we ready for what's coming? Are our kids?

clean_body: Elizabeth Johnston is the Activist Mommy, on a mission to protect innocent children. We're talking about what she has been up to and taking a look at the dangers of AI. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] August 19, 2025 • Newsletter Elizabeth Johnston: Infidelity, Family and Raising Strong Kids Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] For years, Elizabeth Johnston has been known as the Activist Mommy, leading a grassroots movement to protect innocent children and call out media lies and ungodly entertainment. Now, this homeschooling mama to 10 kids is also a published author and the host of the Elizabeth Johnston Podcast. Elizabeth is inspiring a new generation of parents to reclaim the culture. On the Moms for America Podcast, she discusses surviving infidelity, feminism, and so much more. Listen in. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] AI is Here to Stay - But Is It Healthy for America's Kids? The future is here, and artificial intelligence is changing our world at a pace few of us can keep up with. Along with dramatic achievements in technology, medicine, and more, AI also brings some more troubling developments. Some say our growing dependence on AI will diminish our ability to engage in critical thinking and lead to loneliness. It's also an avenue for questionable content that could be harmful to our children. Are we ready for what's coming? Are our kids? Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

body:
I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93740?refcode=em20250819-9275&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9275%2E614464%2EPxzhOb)
Hi, my name is Abigail Spanberger. I'm a three-term congresswoman from Virginia, a former CIA officer, and the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025.
**My opponent has launched over $1 million in ads.**
Soon the floodgates will open. The same billionaires who got Trump elected will come after me and everything we've built together.
_But I'm not intimidated by far-right extremists._
In 2018, I won a seat in Congress held by Republicans for fifty years, and I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side.
**[Will you split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to help us run our own ads and win tough elections all over the country? Our election in Virginia this November will set the tone for Democrats in 2026 and beyond, so it's critical that we raise enough money to win decisively.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93740?refcode=em20250819-9275&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9275%2E614464%2EPxzhOb)**

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=10&akid=9275%2E614464%2EPxzhOb). clean_body: I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side. Hi, my name is Abigail Spanberger. I'm a three-term congresswoman from Virginia, a former CIA officer, and the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025. My opponent has launched over $1 million in ads. Soon the floodgates will open. The same billionaires who got Trump elected will come after me and everything we've built together. But I'm not intimidated by far-right extremists. In 2018, I won a seat in Congress held by Republicans for fifty years, and I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for doing your part, Abigail Spanberger | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.

_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._

My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._

I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**

We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.

That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.

With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✓ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✓ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✓ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Did you see this, folks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081925_1&amount=25]
Our time in the barrel has come, Team .
President Donald Trump said just 24 hours ago that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha.
We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081925_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081925_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081925_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [] Our time in the barrel has come, Team . President Donald Trump said just 24 hours ago that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud. Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. " How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha. We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court. We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump . We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy. Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? Peter, Next year’s midterms are going to be critical, but we’ve got races we need to win before we even get there. Right now, Minnesota has three special elections coming up in the State House and Senate. If we want to protect our DFL majority in the Senate and keep Republicans from taking a majority in the House, we need to ramp up our efforts now. This is an all hands on deck moment. We need your support now so we can win the special elections this September and November — and deliver victories up and down the ballot next year. According to our records, you can still take advantage of the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program which allows Minnesotans to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the state. Right now, Minnesota has three special elections coming up in the State House and Senate. If we want to protect our DFL majority in the Senate and keep Republicans from taking a majority in the House, we need to ramp up our efforts now. This is an all hands on deck moment. We need your support now so we can win the special elections this September and November — and deliver victories up and down the ballot next year. name: Jane Fonda
subject: I’ll fight for this until the day I die
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Because our future depends on it.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113601578/564321801/1328794144?refcode=ea.96bcae01-0f7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.96bcae01-0f7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2YmNhZTAxLTBmN2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HU-h3BEeWtNSXiSlHeuSwLHUKCkpUubRxIrcVxqkl7Y=&emci=4207bf45-687c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=96bcae01-0f7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=4823105)
---
I've always believed that if you want to go fast, go alone. But if you want to go far, go together. That belief is what drew me to activism more than 50 years ago, and it’s what keeps me going today. Because no one wins these fights alone. I’ve marched, I’ve protested, and I’ve been arrested. I’ve sat across from people in power and demanded change. And after all these years, I can say without a doubt that there has never been a more urgent moment than this. The window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast, and Trump and Big Oil are stepping on the gas. They’re auctioning off our environment to the highest bidder so they can line their pockets. Their unchecked greed is poisoning our communities and fueling a public health crisis while driving up rates of illnesses like asthma and cancer. But I refuse to sit back and let them destroy everything we love. That’s why I started JanePAC: to elect leaders who will fight for bold climate action and put people before polluters. We don’t have their billions of dollars, but we have something stronger. We have a grassroots movement that refuses to back down. And right now, this movement needs you. **If you’re just as fired up as I am, now is the time to act.[Every dollar we raise goes straight into electing climate champions at every level of government, from city councils to Congress, who will fight back against Big Oil’s influence and stop Trump’s dirty agenda. clean_body: Because our future depends on it. | I've always believed that if you want to go fast, go alone. But if you want to go far, go together. That belief is what drew me to activism more than 50 years ago, and it’s what keeps me going today. Because no one wins these fights alone. I’ve marched, I’ve protested, and I’ve been arrested. I’ve sat across from people in power and demanded change. And after all these years, I can say without a doubt that there has never been a more urgent moment than this. The window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast, and Trump and Big Oil are stepping on the gas. They’re auctioning off our environment to the highest bidder so they can line their pockets. Their unchecked greed is poisoning our communities and fueling a public health crisis while driving up rates of illnesses like asthma and cancer. But I refuse to sit back and let them destroy everything we love. That’s why I started JanePAC: to elect leaders who will fight for bold climate action and put people before polluters. We don’t have their billions of dollars, but we have something stronger. We have a grassroots movement that refuses to back down. And right now, this movement needs you. If you’re just as fired up as I am, now is the time to act.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s fight like hell for our planet. xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States
