Right now, House Republicans hold one of the slimmest majorities in history. Democrats only need to flip 4️⃣ seats to take back the majority in 2026.

| Peter, let’s break down the numbers.

Right now, House Republicans hold one of the slimmest majorities in history. Democrats only need to flip **4️⃣** seats to take back the majority in 2026.

Last year, Republican Ryan Mackenzie won in PA-07 by just _**1️⃣ ****percentage point.**_ It was one of the closest races in the country, making him one of the most vulnerable Republicans on the map.

Republicans spent **_over $ _**_**1️⃣ 1️⃣**_** _ million_ **to flip this seat, and they’re preparing to spend even more to keep it red. Donald Trump has already endorsed Mackenzie, and they’re sending in big names like Speaker Mike Johnson to rally their dark-money base.

This race is winnable. But if we’re going to flip it and take back the House for Democrats, we need serious grassroots support. That’s where you come in.

subject: Fighting back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump may have the city of Washington, DC under his control, but he doesn’t have the people on his side.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1767%2E791427%2EYsULRz)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250819-1-180&t=2&akid=1767%2E791427%2EYsULRz)
Friend — Trump may have the city of Washington, DC under his control, **but he doesn’t have the people on his side.**
Regular folks are joining the fight to resist the police state that has taken hold of their city because they can clearly see that Trump’s show of force is creating far more problems than it solves.
**[There is a movement growing every day to fight back and oppose Trump’s dictator-tactics. Please, rush a contribution to Ilhan Omar right now and help us continue to build and organize nation-wide.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250819-1-180&t=3&akid=1767%2E791427%2EYsULRz)
**[CHIP IN HERE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250819-1-180&t=4&akid=1767%2E791427%2EYsULRz)**
It’s been a week since Trump sent federal law enforcement into DC and took control of the local police force.
What we’ve seen has not been a crackdown on crime, but rather constant harassment and brutality against vulnerable communities and especially immigrant communities.
In fact, initial data shows that immigration-related arrests are by far the most common kind of action taken by Trump’s thugs. They’re not stopping some huge wave of violent crime, as Trump and Fox News would like you to believe. They’re ripping innocent people away from their families under the lie of “public safety.”
**Friend, it’s clear that Trump didn’t invoke his emergency powers for a real emergency — he did it so he could go around DC’s local laws and move forward with his extreme deportation regime.**
**Now more than ever, we must stand united against Trump’s hateful agenda and authoritarian police state. Trump has already said that more cities may be next — even Minneapolis.
**[That’s why we are asking you to send a message that we will not back down by making a contribution today. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us go up against the far-right and win the tough fights ahead.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250819-1-180&t=5&akid=1767%2E791427%2EYsULRz)
**[DONATE TO ILHAN OMAR](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250819-1-180&t=6&akid=1767%2E791427%2EYsULRz)**
— Team Ilhan HQ

Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=1767_791427_YsULRz&akid=1767%2E791427%2EYsULRz)**.

# [How Gavin Newsom Got His Groove Back](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171378490&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzc4NDkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU2MTgzNjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODIxMDM2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uMSHv_fXapMTavosf3zHoYoFy8w1dXTZGcqvwcqqo6k)
### It's a hell of a glow-up. But it's not a coronation.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Aug 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171378490&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzc4NDkwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTYxODM2NywiZXhwIjoxNzU4MjEwMzY3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IRmhxFWBtytxtnh-VZMdxzT6apKpuZoso_S7q0XGYfU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171378490&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzc4NDkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU2MTgzNjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODIxMDM2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uMSHv_fXapMTavosf3zHoYoFy8w1dXTZGcqvwcqqo6k&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171378490&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzc4NDkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU2MTgzNjcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODIxMDM2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uMSHv_fXapMTavosf3zHoYoFy8w1dXTZGcqvwcqqo6k)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvZW5kbGVzc3VyZ2VuY3kvcC9ob3ctZ2F2aW4tbmV3c29tLWdvdC1oaXMtZ3Jvb3ZlLWJhY2s_.83v5W2Ujak30bSLnQjXkLU0txiAeENvMmsZwG4qZAi0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/how-gavin-newsom-got-his-groove-back?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

By now, I'm sure most people reading my Substack have seen the social media blitz coming out of Gavin Newsom's camp over the last two weeks. It's bold, it's sharp, and honestly, brilliant.
I've __ never been Gavin Newsom's biggest fan--I've said as much plenty of times--but even I have to admit: some of these posts are absolute bangers. The video with Brian Tyler Cohen, where Newsom reads off those Trumpian shitposts from his own team? Great stuff.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/9ee18700-1de8-4fa3-af27-f7344091eaac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/9ee18700-1de8-4fa3-af27-f7344091eaac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's been fun to watch and to an extent, refreshing to see a Democrat not be afraid to reflect the same ludicrousness back at the Republicans. It kicked off a wave of enthusiasm from the lefty influencer crowd (some of whom I firmly believe are being paid for this engagement, but all's fair in love and war).
Newsom is already seeing this strategy play in his favor--he's gained millions of new followers and had a billion impressions _in the last_ _week_. Suddenly, a lot of people are saying Gavin Newsom is the frontrunner for the Democratic nomination. Suddenly, every Democrat should be copying this exact playbook, say people in my social feeds.
But let me just pump the brakes a bit. Yes, the content is good. His digital team should be proud. But let's not lose sight of who this is for: extremely online Democrats. Not median voters in battleground states who decide presidential elections.
I'm the target demographic. You, reading this, might be too. But I spent time this weekend with some friends who don't live and breathe politics like we do, and I asked if they'd seen any of it. A couple had. Most hadn't. And the ones who did? They thought it was weird. Not compelling. Just... weird. And it didn't make them more likely to vote for Newsom because they didn't know what he stood for, or how he was going to help them.
That's not unique to Democrats either. Republicans have the same issue: their digital content is aimed squarely at their own base. Just look at the White House's social feed--some of the most grotesque, culture-war-drenched garbage I have ever seen. All that "defending our culture" nonsense? We know what that really means.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/9ee18700-1de8-4fa3-af27-f7344091eaac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/9ee18700-1de8-4fa3-af27-f7344091eaac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
To be clear, this isn't me knocking Newsom or his team. Frankly, I'm envious. As someone who's done digital strategy for 20 years--including working for Newsom in his first election for Governor--I wish more of my clients had given me the kind of leash his team clearly has. It's working in ways even they have to be surprised about--firing up the base, building intensity, creating momentum, drawing a crowd.
And yes, he's shot up in a few early primary polls. That's not nothing. But to me, that says more about how unsettled the Democratic electorate is. People are frustrated. They want someone--anyone--who looks like they're ready to throw not just one punch, but multiple. And Newsom's doing that. He's stepping into the ring, pushing past the early mistakes he made at the beginning of the year with his podcast, and throwing punches.
That said, we need to stop pretending that going viral with "Very Online" content means you've cracked the code with swing voters--or voters who just don't care about politics until the last possible second. Or simply Americans who are tired of the narratives that sow continued division in the country. As a society, we have never been so politically divided as we are now; people are sick of it, and if I had to guess Newsom's content isn't helping with that issue.
Not every Democrat should try this style. Social media strategy has to match the person, the audience, and the moment. What works for Gavin Newsom, governor of the most liberal state in the country, is not going to work for a Democrat in a battleground House race. It's not going to work for Sherrod Brown in Ohio, where the audience will be very different in that race. That kind of snarky, swaggering online presence that's geared to inspire online liberals and anger conservatives? It ain't gonna land, and it would be wildly off brand for him.
It would have also been off-brand for Barack Obama, Kamala Harris, AOC, Gretchen Whitmer, or many other Democratic leaders. In fact, I would argue it works for Newsom specifically because he's acting like a blank slate Democrat in the middle of a highly partisan fight with very little actual policy meat on the bones at a time when people are desperate for solutions.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/9ee18700-1de8-4fa3-af27-f7344091eaac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/9ee18700-1de8-4fa3-af27-f7344091eaac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
To build a coalition big enough to win back the House, hold the Senate, and win the presidency in 2028, Democrats will need variety. Different strategies. Different voices. Be interesting, of course, but say something real that resonates with your core audience. Take a risk. That's what people want. That's what they reward. Trump does it. Newsom's doing it well enough for his own political gain today. But again--that doesn't mean copy-paste his playbook.
After you've fired up your base, what comes next? How are you going to build upon that, evolve, and engage with others outside of your base, your bubble? How are you going to articulate a vision for the future of this country?
I'm still skeptical of Newsom as a general election candidate. I don't believe voters in swing states like Michigan and Wisconsin are going to love his record or style. I question his vision for moving this country forward and his yet-to-be shared proposed solutions to help people pay their bills or buy a house. But that's a conversation for another day. For now, he's playing a valuable role in this gerrymandering fight and in giving Democrats something to believe in ahead of the midterms.
That ain't nothing.
But let's not confuse momentum with inevitability. In this primary, you're going to keep seeing moments where someone gets hot, says something sharp, picks a fight with Trump and his hand-picked Republican primary candidate, finds their lane, and climbs in the polls. That's going to happen again and again--ask AOC, Cory Booker, and a few others who have popped in the polls. Just don't put blinders on. There's a lot of time left before we choose a nominee.
We don't even know what the nomination calendar will look like. We don't know who's officially in. We don't know who's going to raise the money, build a great team, etc...
So yeah, enjoy the content. It's good. It's for you (and me!). And it's good for our health to have some comic reprieve. But don't mistake good tweets for the path to the presidency. Just because one tweet goes viral in _your_ feed, doesn't mean it resonated with anyone beyond your own algorithm. There's a long road ahead. And with Trump back in the White House, the stakes couldn't be higher. You never know who's going to rise to the moment--or who's going to collapse under pressure.
One last thing: I've said before that the Democratic Party is very hijackable right now. Same way Republicans were in 2016. Trump took it over and never gave it back. The same could happen here if Democrats don't rally behind someone who's exciting, relatable, and has a _real_ vision, beyond online clout. That's why you're hearing people float names like Jon Stewart, Stephen A. Smith, or Mark Cuban.
Could Newsom ride this momentum and win the nomination? Sure. Would he struggle in the general? I think so, but maybe we can build a coalition I can't yet see. Part of it is what Newsom decides to do with this new momentum and how he continues to serve the people of California, his constituents, who elected him. Anything can happen. That's why anyone thinking about 2028 needs more than vibes. You need vision. You need connection. You need a plan. And you need the operation to pull it off and deliver. Otherwise, we're ripe for a hijacking similar to what Trump did to the Republicans--and that might not end well, even if we win.
Look at the GOP. They got their man (twice now), and now they're stuck with him and his cadre of grifter losers--flailing through a second term that's already a disaster, especially on the economy. It'll get worse. Everyday Americans are already beginning to pay for it. And the GOP will pay the price in the long run.
So take this moment for what it is. Newsom's digital game is top-tier. But all it really proves is how hungry people are for any bit of fight and how fluid this moment is--for the party, for the country, and for 2028.
Eyes on the ball, folks.

It's been fun to watch and to an extent, refreshing to see a Democrat not be afraid to reflect the same ludicrousness back at the Republicans. Newsom is already seeing this strategy play in his favor--he's gained millions of new followers and had a billion impressions in the last week. That's why I’m counting on your support. Can you rush a donation of any amount before midnight to help us hit this critical milestone? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jjr_aug_midmonth](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113603543/564326558/-844697811?refcode=em_JJR_FR_MM3_081925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1OTYwZDQtMTM3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eKhj5ppeMM86hrAq8Jbryjt6ZA_EW_k0sjphMOMmj4w=)** Look, my opponent and his corporate backers have already made it clear that they are ready to throw everything and the kitchen sink to keep the Attorney General's office in the hands of corrupt special interests. body:
The work to win next year has to start right now. | | | |

Hey friend,
I'm going to be direct: everything is on the line next year — for Nevada and for our nation’s future.
**Republicans are already zeroing in on Nevada.** Pundits marked our House races as some of the most competitive in the country and the NRCC put all three of our Democratic incumbents on their top targets list.
**GOP megadonors are pouring millions into Nevada to hold onto control at every level.**
We can’t afford to fall behind — every victory we’ve achieved has been through grassroots supporters like you, and it’s why we will win again.

clean_body: The work to win next year has to start right now. | | | | Hey friend, I'm going to be direct: everything is on the line next year — for Nevada and for our nation’s future. Republicans are already zeroing in on Nevada. Pundits marked our House races as some of the most competitive in the country and the NRCC put all three of our Democratic incumbents on their top targets list. GOP megadonors are pouring millions into Nevada to hold onto control at every level. We can’t afford to fall behind — every victory we’ve achieved has been through grassroots supporters like you, and it’s why we will win again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for standing with Nevada, Jacky The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Invoking Jan. 6 Falls Flat
body:
A. Benjamin Mannes | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Why invoking January 6th doesn’t work**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2101dd8243&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| ''As the Trump administration makes headway on campaign promises on crime and immigration, Democratic pundits have again **invoked the U.S. Capitol riot** on January 6, 2021, in an **attempt to** **shift the narrative**.

Democrats, particularly their leaders, have continually used the chaos of that day, in which one person died, as a rhetorical club to counter Republican policies on crime and immigration.

By painting President Trump and his supporters as “**insurrectionists** ,” Democratic figures argue that the moral authority to govern rests with those who “**protect democracy**.” Yet, this strategy is beginning to show its limits, marred by selective outrage, historical amnesia, and political hypocrisy..."
---
| [Read Article Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=06126301a4&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")
---
|
---
|
## About A. Benjamin Mannes:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b1067d228c&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
_Based in Philadelphia,**A. Benjamin Mannes** is a_ [**_consultant_**](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2ab6a372b7&e=b7b3eddce2) _ and **expert witness **in security, premises liability, and criminal justice reform based on his own experiences on both sides of the criminal justice system. He is a compliance executive who previously served in federal and municipal law enforcement, and as the former Director, Office of Investigations with the American Board of Internal Medicine._
---
|
---
| | We at [_Broad + Liberty_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0c214232df&e=b7b3eddce2) are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government.

Read more columns on [w](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=735e8d19cd&e=b7b3eddce2)[ww.broadandliberty.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=29653aba35&e=b7b3eddce2) — updated daily and as news breaks.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have some breaking news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team:

**Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a far-right DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250819-AdamSchiff-SchiffInvestigationTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250819-AdamSchiff-SchiffInvestigationTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21019%2E9716520%2EDNjaPE)
Ed Martin, if you don't remember, was the interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.

Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived "enemies" of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts.

Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He appeared with and praised a Nazi sympathizer who he referred to as "a great friend."

_Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin's dangerous nomination._

When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a "weaponization" task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.

**And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president's political retribution, but his own, as well.** **But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day.**

This is going to get ugly, and that's why it's crucial that we retake our Senate majority to put a check on Trump and restore the rule of law in America. [**Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and the DSCC to help us fight back by flipping the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21939?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250819-AdamSchiff-SchiffInvestigationTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250819-AdamSchiff-SchiffInvestigationTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21019%2E9716520%2EDNjaPE)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Adam Schiff for Senate and the DSCC.

| I’m back in West Michigan during the August in-district work period. I’m meeting with folks across West Michigan, listening to your concerns, and bringing your voices back to Washington.

Unfortunately, the contrast between that kind of constructive engagement and what we’re seeing in the House couldn’t be sharper. Just before this work period began, House Republicans broke their own record for the longest vote in history because of infighting over cryptocurrency legislation. While they were mired in political games, I was focused on solving problems and delivering results.

**But here’s the truth: progress on the issues that matter most to our community won’t happen as long as extremists control the House.**

If we want to move common-sense legislation forward and stop the chaos that keeps us from getting things done, we need to hold this seat and help elect the allies who will work with us to deliver.

name: Team Rob
subject: Rob's NEPA Rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
Wedding & BBQ 🤵♂️👰

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fe0f8e8c0b77/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| Good Morning,
This weekend was one Rob will never forget. He and his Chelsea celebrated their wedding with a beautiful ceremony surrounded by loved ones. While many would take this time for a honeymoon, Rob chose to stay right here at home, focused on serving the people of Northeast Pennsylvania. Yesterday, we also welcomed friends and neighbors to our 2nd Annual Bresnahan BBQ in Swoyersville. From cheesesteaks and burgers to Arcaro & Genell pizza and Finn’s Café 99 wings, it was a true community celebration, and we’re so thankful to everyone who came out to share it with us.
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | On Saturday, Rob and Chelsea were married in a beautiful ceremony surrounded by family and friends. The day was filled with joy, love, and celebration, followed by a wonderful reception where loved ones came together to honor the happy couple and the start of their new chapter together.
---
|
---
|
---
| Yesterday we had such a great time at our 2nd Annual Bresnahan BBQ in Swoyersville! Rob and the team were behind the grill flipping burgers, cheesesteaks, and hotdogs, and of course, we had some hometown favorites like Arcaro & Genell pizza and Finn’s Café 99 wings. It was an awesome day to relax, eat, and catch up with so many friends and neighbors—we’re already looking forward to next year!
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=d32884f526&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is The Historic Dimmick Inn in Milford. Be sure to support local businesses!
---
|
---
| The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth.
**Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**
---
| [Click Here to Donate ](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=6ec31b6ca1&e=131e83a3c2)
---
| \- Team Rob
---

clean_body: Wedding & BBQ 🤵♂️👰 | | | | | | | | | | | | Good Morning, This weekend was one Rob will never forget. He and his Chelsea celebrated their wedding with a beautiful ceremony surrounded by loved ones. While many would take this time for a honeymoon, Rob chose to stay right here at home, focused on serving the people of Northeast Pennsylvania. Yesterday, we also welcomed friends and neighbors to our 2nd Annual Bresnahan BBQ in Swoyersville. From cheesesteaks and burgers to Arcaro & Genell pizza and Finn’s Café 99 wings, it was a true community celebration, and we’re so thankful to everyone who came out to share it with us. Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | On Saturday, Rob and Chelsea were married in a beautiful ceremony surrounded by family and friends. The day was filled with joy, love, and celebration, followed by a wonderful reception where loved ones came together to honor the happy couple and the start of their new chapter together. | | | Yesterday we had such a great time at our 2nd Annual Bresnahan BBQ in Swoyersville! Rob and the team were behind the grill flipping burgers, cheesesteaks, and hotdogs, and of course, we had some hometown favorites like Arcaro & Genell pizza and Finn’s Café 99 wings. It was an awesome day to relax, eat, and catch up with so many friends and neighbors—we’re already looking forward to next year! | | Our Small Business of the Week is The Historic Dimmick Inn in Milford. Be sure to support local businesses! | | The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth. Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026! | | \- Team Rob | | | | | | [Paid for by Rob for PA]() | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Rob for PA. All rights reserved.

body:
| Folks: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. **That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $15 or more now – split between Seth Moulton and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113606764/564338591/473596456?refcode=250819_MFC_Sherrod_SpecialNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFjNmVmMy0xNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCcqZUyK9VKyyWaHrTZZY5WRpHa1xnpvcvJ1DYvXqOc=)** I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do. This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to. When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won. Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one. **Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.** [**I’m personally asking, folks: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $15 now – split between my campaign and Seth Moulton – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113606765/564338592/473596456?refcode=250819_MFC_Sherrod_SpecialNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFjNmVmMy0xNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCcqZUyK9VKyyWaHrTZZY5WRpHa1xnpvcvJ1DYvXqOc=) Thank you for standing with me. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113606766/564338593/-619769051?refcode=250819_MFC_Sherrod_SpecialNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFjNmVmMy0xNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCcqZUyK9VKyyWaHrTZZY5WRpHa1xnpvcvJ1DYvXqOc=)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: AIPAC is attacking me
body:
God commands me to walk in truth
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9154150/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVXRFWEM5cENmcA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29Beg/qP2hpZHM9bmM3eVpTNm9qY2daMzVscw/gaKSksg/s8k52109777)
| | | |
---
Patriot, the floodgates have opened.
I’m officially under attack from AIPAC for saying **"the most truthful and easiest thing to say that Oct 7th in Israel was horrific and all hostages must be returned, but so is the genocide, humanitarian crisis, and starvation happening in Gaza".**
The genocide, humanitarian crisis, and starvation in Gaza aren’t political issues for me, they are issues of my Christian faith. **God commands me to walk in truth and love.**
He commands me to walk in truth of the Gospel, that Jesus was fully divine and fully human, died for our sins, and was resurrected in victory over death.
He also commands me to walk in love, by obeying His commandments, including to love one another.
What is happening in Gaza is a violation of God’s commandments and a travesty of humanity, and I refuse to bear false witness for my own political benefit. What is political about this is that AIPAC is going to bring their immense power to bear against me.
**_[I’m one of the only members of Congress that doesn’t take money from AIPAC and who never has](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_.**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
I don’t think it’s right. The truth is AIPAC needs to register as a foreign lobbyist by U.S. law because they are representing the __secular government__ of nuclear armed Israel 100%!!!
Look at what just happened, as soon as Congress was let out on recess and supposed to be working in our districts, AIPAC just took a bunch of members of Congress to Israel to make sure they don’t step out of line.
**While AIPAC is lying to their donors about me claiming I’m "betraying my American values" the REALITY is AIPAC serves and lobbies for a foreign country, Israel!!**
Patriot, I’m as AMERICAN as they come!
**_[I can’t be bought and I’m not backing down](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_!!**
I’m fighting for my children’s generation and for AMERICA ONLY!!!!
_If AIPAC has a problem with that, I have one message for them:_
**[BRING. IT. ON.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
I’ve always had the support of the conservative grassroots in my fight to force Washington to put America First, and now I’m up against the most powerful lobby in the history of our country.
**_[If you’ve been waiting to donate until something really important happened, now is the time to get back into the fight](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_.**
I will need it when they unleash their war chest in my primary.
_For AMERICA,_
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9154150/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTk/LbmNsV0dLQ29Beg/qP2hpZHM9bmM3eVpTNm9qY2daMzVscw/gaKSksg/s7pddbe8c0d)

name: Candace Owens
subject: Candace Owens: This is why I chose PreBorn!
body:
I’ve spent years listening to the abortion debate. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/qgkDg1jeoq8nUjhJVGcTM10FWaFojylrF6QRY02EyGPfOF4-fbDqH-notOJEZa55wLzvII-H3OLnLSGgDTpJ0ES1DMiHe-05bGpNs8ABLJhZx5owAyYot8LPe8BskBTOebQmcrp8zm0DqpRpc3d0TS1B_lqYSIKKzvkQ-wz67ACiBpc55NX-1VXo/rNdPMbFL61Bn727ENCxv2mFAnzCL6qLZ/12)_
| | Fellow American,

I've spent years listening to the abortion debate. I've heard the pro-choice arguments. And I've rejected them.
But I've also heard a lot of voices on the conservative side, loud voices that haven't sat right with me either. Too many are angry. Too many are performative. And too few are actually doing something to help women. That's why I chose to stand with PreBorn! _[**Because they are not just talking about life. They are showing up for it.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/_Sr0OjzwsxhEvtHEFWMF-oeO6hT_UG-15elem0IVUuct1_ZoaXzJcnoSS8sY3-QahzRomEgUFN2dPjxqWhELAuvE_LU4vejyhz9TNCOMOcLcx1riUXSjRw2fjG2x9RdtcH317meeXFrjHY6kegPZhBJl-B0FsL-xhuLWEClr4Fvgf4UQOv4bCziO6tAVRbV9g67Y2zpHzp7sdSVmMKLBwZV_WFcMMrHheBKA1Dq4XTVJWeHb0KGyzUFm5fZ8boiWwI5zKNhTjQ2g-69D3CMehynwIM-jAiKzn5EWY9iOL2VMfNyc2BEYd0cHNyDenjLrrBX2g_j3DFZI84lRbtjVg0-eu0yvsSAxZb1XvRqjwK7pwKGAvs2tN8MpKKw7gvx-QuRZMnyN8qvrWPdPxbBDL6UYyqFH6YUv7fEr0IejhTG0L1a2OzREM2VioKkjji53yCHMI6vOqf2UsvjLiYCChZiM6TY3Z3kGglZCuOkBh-LnPx2ws-DIYnQ-w25OWT30cVqi-hZkd_gGvFhn7_x4fcV3Kn4a6-6ZUKaxBhtS4KDI4fGMqxh8D2IebrWJrhfJRmnhedj7BdlWs2EFCf8xlylI8kcUvefdhA_2l3_QyDUYLNXKVNZ9gH9eu0q_qeLulW1iVZO4Ro9SchiXkY9DVs7jdeRHUypi0MKtK9_ZNp2qsWA/fkiJa-S16LopMmm9AyOuKddhpG46jpg0/12)_ They meet women who are scared and alone. They offer them a free ultrasound. They help them see the truth . . . that there's a living child inside them. And they do it all with love, not shame. But they don't stop there.

PreBorn! stays.

They walk with that mother for up to two years, providing real support, material help, and a relationship grounded in dignity and faith.
---
**This is the kind of voice I 've been waiting to hear in the pro-life space.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/WdFlbxksX69KsTPOVN7w1F3-EdRAI-E7auwt_KrVrd0A1h91Li9MxS6waB4dnzhuz87i-oB_2lUVJr8rP6ccJ09t_bqIoxWYSnHo0J58YwQygvt2CY_liQtqCz0DGQ6rRug4qd5QFkswixngt6eaWREf0K7BCXxpqbWMrK4vMthAaZ3Ak1u4C52DTxddGr8NpKQesa4vGrM6Qzy8481VzyWd7L36HZkSCZh9FGsigfWI3Y9itLGTIQf0IO_dduaZBMKPweJLm7MsFxHHqyOICkM0klh-qWmYaRxwA_5qE4E7Nfnq42NNrB_LQIx9emSInl5nTesiVai08h-XYEpUHmHnANEehTmqnaeIWb9k_n7unmY4sGV9zGYsVhD8wj1sMN2qdYyGsnqyVK0eIay3tpjAhI9ruu1CcIOvqFfeWl4ima2SH5jt20nHbmUhS4E8vRMkBgir7kzmNa7WZ5zSq7adxJq6uZeJmOHIMLmJ-TNQtDIFU4PzjjH5aQlHY3n-PFQSBlEIy95FrUWp6XTSOFxT6MaIppCpbjU4-yXQmZ5QSAgapi9yYo-squpCQa3PRs6N_GR6dPA8rR3AyLJAlgo7McKZDD2nMXTdyBbKYQHYYjKyKAO9nTxL81GbvUREZwu1iW9AqSdACtbgtUCrIVcIO09CTM1LcmDjcxRhLWL9wAw/WsbzzHEj1rzOCA-1NB1F2Qx_39BBGV0D/12)
---
And this is why I've partnered with them. Now I'm asking you to join me. Just $28 provides a life-saving ultrasound.
It could be the moment a mother chooses life for her baby and opens her heart to a new future.
---
[_**Give to PreBorn! Today >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/OR6L-8Q2PyIg_WqspcdUNWTIj6T5aaiOc2b8Lr5ln8jBkFZB10V6TFc7kZNsME-WiQ0vljpwIOYm5AZvB5F23KM8dVEwqqW3DxQXl-Epiwj8RqE_HJkuZg7hXJ8eoUvvpVVC9vMwbd8U_LE3ULWTIlyxI89Z_FgfDcyMQNaiqf9Mb6Jgd1CYRCDOjJ5BH4pu5HdG602qJRWTC14HS0CtUuxqzCtSShAqcrrbjqFjn-FkA09dh0T-n3xmmvPo-ska5FTrEdPaqCXv1WCLEOcR0mXGUPn9weMorpSCZvUsHw7HBg5bSnqNYLfBZzpwAZkhI0uBRJiNmB1ia0uMGvyZCp2WQwkSn9Ym3lbCcIi_5sC8IQlygTvy5Dtg8LLpHwOLN-w3uUKWyhqAtv4lijEpFzfgQWO-B6Ry2cLLX-zWr0Ri735mE0zqg2snoIYYqhRJP_LdK67E4Nh2NFkEwg0MIKs6KU4Pe_Y3yezpXzP7nq2yLYp8HMYztars25Y-3BVadUFFD6bibwiWfbQNYZzszMbikajiSWzGIgJVECPxP8eMCar9rXvd5puWqm6aIjmYZrJeQrP_Pt5QGh9kQwGcan1PvpbWRhgjqHwwANzEFGQK5WoUztO63LkvAjwofT9eaA3BDuPfEl6QlpLvbP9y14OR-3wgov2IU1UfpehBQvJpl8I/vamtE_6rQ4W62MwFukkrIeRdzWswXgnN/12)
---
I don't lend my voice lightly.
But I've seen what PreBorn! is doing.
They're saving babies. They're standing with mothers. They're doing the work that matters. And they are not stopping. Let's support the people who are actually making a difference. For Life,
Candace Owens
Supporting Partner of PreBorn!
---

body:

---
Friend,

We just got word that you may have switched your voter registration to Democrat.

Please tell us this isn't true. Please. Our America-First movement is counting on you.

If you've abandoned Republicans, then everything we've been fighting for is at risk.

We can't stress this enough: every single patriot matters.

There's not a single name that goes unnoticed.

We know how long you've been with us, and how you've fought to Make America Great Again.

Please, if you're still with us, take this America-First Loyalty Poll right now. It's the only way we'll know if you're still standing with us... or if you've dropped out of the MAGA movement for good.

Please, don't let the Democrats win.

If you don't complete this poll before midnight tonight, our office will have no choice but to assume you're no longer with us.

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.

IL GOP Governor Hopeful Ted Dabrowski Steers Clear of Trump at Illinois State Fair (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/il-gop-governor-hopeful-ted-dabrowski-steers-clear-of-trump-at-illinois-state-fair.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3cb3e2c0b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/il-gop-governor-hopeful-ted-dabrowski-steers-clear-of-trump-at-illinois-state-fair.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3cb3e2c0b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ted Dabrowski, president of Wirepoints, speaks to reporters after telling fellow Republicans he plans to announce a bid for governor soon. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Jerry Nowicki)
By Illinois Review

At the Illinois State Fair last Thursday, GOP gubernatorial hopeful Ted Dabrowski steered clear of President Donald Trump – sticking to a strategy favored by party insiders.

“Illinois’ problems have nothing to do with Donald Trump,” Dabrowski told a Republican crowd at the state fair. “He can’t fix the property taxes. He can’t fix the gas tax. He can’t fix our out-migration. We have to fix it.”

For years, Dabrowski has maintained his distance from Trump, carefully avoiding any hint of an endorsement.

Dabrowski, a close ally of state central committee member Jeanne Ives and Naples-based Chicago radio host Dan Proft, is president of Wirepoints, an organization that offers commentary on Illinois’ finances and economy.

The Wirepoints president frequently appears on Proft and Ives’ radio shows. In March, he joined Ives and former Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau – who lost his re-election bid in a landslide – for a pension-focused town hall.

| Tammy’s been on the road on her Fighting for Wisconsin Families Tour.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4932%2E35263%2EQUInF5)
Hey Peter — Tammy has been on the road on her **Fighting for Wisconsin Families Tour** , where she’s talking to Wisconsinites about the impacts of this administration’s disastrous agenda. Trump’s trade war will be devastating to our communities; everyday goods will be more expensive, and Wisconsin’s farmers and small businesses are bearing the brunt. And while Trump pushes through tax breaks for his ultra-wealthy allies, his cuts to Medicaid and Medicare will push millions of seniors and vulnerable people off of their healthcare. **[Tammy is going from county to county to spread the word and hear from her constituents. subject: The data is crystal clear: Donald Trump is disproportionately harming women
body:

Most Americans, and especially women, reported facing financial hardship in their daily lives and feeling bleak about their futures. Among voters who are struggling,**82% want candidates who will fight for them** and work to make their lives better.

**Women make up the majority of the electorate in midterm elections, and if Democrats want to be successful in 2026, we need to respond to the hardships women voters are facing — _and_ the issues they care about.**

The Democratic pro-choice women EMILYs List recruits and supports are uniquely positioned to connect with voters, and we are committed to electing leaders in the tough races **critical to taking back power** — because our candidates will deliver _real results_ for women and families.

We've endorsed candidates who embody the leadership voters are demanding, but now we need the resources to carry this momentum through to the midterms.

clean_body: Here's what the results tell us → | = Peter, Americans deserve leaders who will fight for them — but right now, Republicans in power are failing their constituents, and voters know it. EMILYs List Action just ran a national poll with Impact Research, and the results are crystal clear: Americans are feeling the painful fallout of the reckless Trump-GOP economic agenda, with women struggling most acutely. Most Americans, and especially women, reported facing financial hardship in their daily lives and feeling bleak about their futures. Among voters who are struggling,82% want candidates who will fight for them and work to make their lives better. Women make up the majority of the electorate in midterm elections, and if Democrats want to be successful in 2026, we need to respond to the hardships women voters are facing — and the issues they care about. The Democratic pro-choice women EMILYs List recruits and supports are uniquely positioned to connect with voters, and we are committed to electing leaders in the tough races critical to taking back power — because our candidates will deliver real results for women and families. We've endorsed candidates who embody the leadership voters are demanding, but now we need the resources to carry this momentum through to the midterms. name: MAGA Judges?
subject: These three are responsible for saving abortion rights in PA
body:
The stakes of PA’s supreme court elections are astronomically high — but we have three absolute rockstar judges for people to vote FOR. They need our help right now to win.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ehfepkN31bQiqBD3BdEhKQfj4dcIBFH5G12I2uB-H0KrcQD7IGCsi-bHKHd9i7IMuucRWc0--1IVoy4AmTtH_o9CHKEY2ci_hQpxWXvOOOPAhJEPGflKpckT4Ofcsa_e9OpPnFOjd7-OH7QvnxvBdMmSIqLapWUW8XVDNnqOc7IvDG4oha39zHAJrcIq7yympA_uQ3wI8NXzyivpJ_t_241wMhwWVvSrZm3ikH97JyA=&c=daG6z-mf9w6i4rYDsE-kIq_6sZLGtXLBz6Ox4qgxcXfdAa849Flu6Q==&ch=7Tw6Hscovv2RlloAZZa6KvMzG9N3KOIrRTPFvBwoPJsFyQiy19NYsg==)
---
| Peter,
The stakes of PA's supreme court elections are astronomically high -- if Republicans flip these three state supreme court seats, Donald Trump can simply reach out and take PA for himself in 2028.
If Dems fall down on the job here and lose, there will no longer be an independent judiciary in place to check Trump's darkest ambitions and turn back MAGA's wildest dreams of permanent power.
Thankfully, we have three absolute rockstar judges in office already that we can keep in November: Justice Christine Donohue, Justice Kevin Dougherty, and Justice David Wecht. All three judges are champions for justice, abortion rights, and fair elections -- giving people something to vote FOR instead of AGAINST the lesser of two evils.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ehfepkN31bQiqBD3BdEhKQfj4dcIBFH5G12I2uB-H0KrcQD7IGCsi-bHKHd9i7IMuucRWc0--1IVoy4AmTtH_o9CHKEY2ci_hQpxWXvOOOPAhJEPGflKpckT4Ofcsa_e9OpPnFOjd7-OH7QvnxvBdMmSIqLapWUW8XVDNnqOc7IvDG4oha39zHAJrcIq7yympA_uQ3wI8NXzyivpJ_t_2x83vjacbJ0fKuKOvD8yvXk=&c=daG6z-mf9w6i4rYDsE-kIq_6sZLGtXLBz6Ox4qgxcXfdAa849Flu6Q==&ch=7Tw6Hscovv2RlloAZZa6KvMzG9N3KOIrRTPFvBwoPJsFyQiy19NYsg==)
---
| From left, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justices Donohue, Dougherty, and Wecht. All three Democrats are up for retention on this November's ballot.
---
| | | | But these judges are under attack by Trump and a rising MAGA coalition in Pennsylvania. They will not survive this onslaught in November--less than three months from now--unless we all come together to protect them.
If they lose, we will have MAGA judges running PA and they will only be loyal to one thing: Donald Trump.
That's why we need your help right now to defend these judges and protect free and fair elections, abortion rights, and more in the nation's most important swing state.
[Can you rush a donation to help us get the word out about the upcoming PA Supreme Court election? $50, $25, or even $5 will help us work to save Pennsylvania and our nation from becoming yet another arm of Trump's fascist MAGA movement:](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ehfepkN31bQiqBD3BdEhKQfj4dcIBFH5G12I2uB-H0KrcQD7IGCsi-bHKHd9i7IMuucRWc0--1IVoy4AmTtH_o9CHKEY2ci_hQpxWXvOOOPAhJEPGflKpckT4Ofcsa_e9OpPnFOjd7-OH7QvnxvBdMmSIqLapWUW8XVDNnqOc7IvDG4oha39zHAJrcIq7yympA_uQ3wI8NXzyivpJ_t_245F4Ne3dywjZjixY64kn7s=&c=daG6z-mf9w6i4rYDsE-kIq_6sZLGtXLBz6Ox4qgxcXfdAa849Flu6Q==&ch=7Tw6Hscovv2RlloAZZa6KvMzG9N3KOIrRTPFvBwoPJsFyQiy19NYsg==)

Peter Willis,

The list of billionaires and politicians lining up to take down Zohran
Mamdani is growing by the day.

The latest? Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, the highest-ranking Democrat in the
House, is REFUSING to endorse Mamdani, siding instead with Trump’s MAGA
machine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250819&t=1060&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]Headline: Blue no matter who?: Jeffries slammed for 'gutless' refusal
to endorse Zohran Mamdani

Let's get one thing clear: Zohran Mamdani OVERWHELMINGLY won his
nomination by speaking to a broad coalition of New Yorkers ready for
justice and change. But now, rather than honoring the will of Democratic
voters, the establishment is throwing Mamdani under the bus.

We can’t let Jeffries and the party bosses join with Trump to dictate our
politics – and so Our Revolution organizers are hitting the streets across
New York to give Mamdani the grassroots support he needs to win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250819nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]Can you urgently rush a donation to help us power the grassroots
mobilization needed to make sure Mamdani wins – even as billionaires and
the establishment line up to try to defeat him?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250819nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250819nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250819nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250819nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250819nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250819nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Jeffries isn’t alone. He’s just the latest establishment insider to cozy
up to MAGA, joining a growing list of politicians more interested in their
donor networks than in real change.

Mamdani has a proven record of fighting for tenants and workers. And the
fact is, Jeffries and other Democratic leaders want to silence him instead
because they’re scared of what real change looks like.

We will not back down. If Jeffries and his wealthy friends want to make
this a battle for the heart and soul of the Democratic Party, we say:
bring it on. We have people power on our side.

Grassroots dollars – not corporate PACs and not billionaire checks –
fueled Mamdani’s historic primary win. Now, with the political
establishment closing ranks, we need to double down to defend our movement
and win this race.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250819nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9199%2E5885482%2EYuwbYu ]Chip in now to ensure Our Revolution can train canvassers, organize
rallies, and get out the vote for Zohran Mamdani in these critical final
weeks.

The establishment may have money, but we have the movement. If we all step
up together right now, Mamdani can make history – and show the rest of the
country how progressives can win, everywhere.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Trump is scared of your power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1001&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| |
| |
|“Vladimir Putin said something — one of the most interesting things. He |
| said ‘your election was rigged because you have mail in voting. It’s |
| impossible to have mail in voting and have honest elections.’ He said |
|that to me because we talked about 2020. He said ‘you won that election |
| by so much.’” |
| |
| — Donald Trump |
| Fox News |
| 8.15.25 |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Say it with me: Russian dictators cannot dictate our democracy.

And yet that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants to see happen.

This is not
hyperbole. I wish it were. This is real. Trump is parroting a Russian
dictator and threatening executive orders to eliminate one of America’s
most popular, convenient, and secure ways to cast a ballot.

Why?

Because he’s scared. He’s scared of voters’ power — your power. He’s
afraid of voters who are seeing their grocery bills skyrocket, who can’t
afford to buy homes, who are facing tax increases and cuts to their health
care.

His destructive and unpopular policies are harming Americans all across
Michigan and our country. He doesn’t want to have to face the consequences
at the ballot box next year.

Trump — and Putin’s — continued efforts to destroy American democracy are
unpatriotic, unAmerican, and go against everything that truly makes our
country great. [ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1002&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]I won’t stand for it — and neither should you.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q32025._u867d&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q32025.vCRznT&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q32025.koEtbW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q32025.z9_9cy&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q32025.Z1Qyci&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I will always stand up to any bullies or dictators, no matter how
powerful, who try to rob you of your voice, your vote, and your power.
I’ve done that for the last decade as Michigan’s Secretary of State — and
I’ll do the same as Michigan’s Governor.

But I need your help to get there. I need your help to keep fighting.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]Pitch in right now to help us stand up to attacks on American’s right
to hold the powerful to account — your vote, your ballot, your power.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6 ]DONATE

Let’s go.

Jocelyn Benson

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
Unsubscribe: https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=1011&akid=626%2E181023%2EVVkFN6

[PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]

But Trump’s allies are pouring money into key districts, and we need a grassroots surge to fight back. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you! – Team Sánchez * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm back, Peter
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081925_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081925_1]
Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today , I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. Will you chip in $25 or more now – split between The Real Texas PAC and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081925_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081925_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081925_1&amount=25]
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won . When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won .
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.
I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now – split between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081925_1]
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

name: Nez for Congress
subject: people-powered movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/2rbQyazJNY1bmyUtBjb7aw~~/AAPPABA~/0F3WHoFgVQ2JCfrPLR_dtrKgY1sMtamxR0N5R0z6byBEcoOL5h0z6J1YYX6yacA0D9GLL2oRonRUJYg6KQOiNuWG_A1LiX49fscX1r4wer1fJ5c079nD-NDSsPKKX8pHByE2-_HZclmqHYeMi3Omfg~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/5gGzK3ausCrIYIpH12IXxQ~~/AAPPABA~/bjLwNvwOMcad2B3dCY9hb--853zgP4jOiqEcVXYRItjXOpziymi-tmY2w-jr-BUaBf1TF-McJ-rkOynCWc4djCIRibF0jhOuvG24oFwoTj7r5V4jDGqFhX6Mm7Y9GT57NT-x1MtWVdkOLYRcVdTy3gvKeq1BGQHEyEgOfNXlHgGvjj0bs1geXN8g16AE9LQdb1Hm3Kdzw-F9AyG38dFsjw~~

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Please consider supporting my campaign today: https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/7VNnPywaV886uQl1HeGGQw~~/AAPPABA~/3b3A9GZ_u47lapJgmHcwjOGLywPNCBpEjjmI8WKR1vR1GxF_Y5REzJA8xwl-0BKRqLe8ymCdKZ7ck9ryZzbyDiugsUH5YSUXicL6xWSg0eVD1FmXNmajz87dfXtwdINzgmBcp5vuPrDuKioMOAN8Cg~~

DONATE
https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/Uq4hG4HxIY99EHjTG1uGxg~~/AAPPABA~/3uWlkMpz1GLL6Fw6lRxbZC4tbg0cqc6x_v-M8qcsv-WU6jBwMpCkVDfnWkOXFOh7_TFBfSGqmLledELUeQtuCnOl_W5rMbJwwgbmcjwqaC4z7Fk_2IxMvWYFHzw0x6lZ5tT_1FedoIAo6rwRhUoOZw~~

Thank you so much for your support,

Jonathan Nez

# **Fun Fact of the Month**

These acrobatic amphibians _skydive_ between fern mats, using their long, flexible tails to flip, turn, and control their glide. | It’s Mandela Barnes.

In case you missed it, Texas House Democrats staged a brave walkout to stop the Republican-controlled state government from creating five new gerrymandered and intensely Republican congressional districts.

The fight is far from over, but _**it was a daring step to thwart the Republican effort to play dirty and retain their House majority.**_

The walkout reminded me of a similarly brave and necessary step Democrats took right here in my home state of Wisconsin to stand up to then-Gov. Scott Walker and his disastrous Act 10 bill, which would have decimated collective bargaining rights for public employees.

Because of the stand the Democrats took, portions of Act 10 were deemed unconstitutional by the Wisconsin Supreme Court. _**That would not have been possible without the dedicated Democrats who stood up for workers’ rights.**_

Those are the sorts of representatives our country needs – ones who stand up to abuses of power and fight for the will of the people. At the Long Run PAC, we support changemaking candidates nationwide of that very sort, [_**and we need your support to grow our program. Will you support us in the fight for a fair future ahead with a contribution?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4402?t=3&akid=5592%2E196590%2ETUzGz5)

Summer 2025 has already seen record-breaking heat, dangerous flooding and fires along with severe storms. At the same time, conflict continues to take place around the world.
For U.S. service members both at home and abroad, this means being on constant alert, ready to respond at a moment's notice. **_During these times of increased need, your support is more important than ever._**
**That 's why this offer couldn't have come at a better moment: A generous group of donors has offered to MATCH all gifts, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $40,000, to help the USO provide critical programs, including 4,000 care packages.** [Will you please donate $29 or more now to have the value of your gift DOUBLED for our heroes?](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[$30 CAN HELP PROVIDE~~ 2 ~~ 4 CARE PACKAGES](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
**[$50 CAN HELP PROVIDE~~ 4 ~~ 8 CARE PACKAGES](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
**[MATCH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
Day in and day out, service members put their lives on the line and miss precious moments with their loved ones -- all to keep us safe and free. So our mission is to ensure they are supported and appreciated every step of the way.
One critical way we do this is by delivering thousands of care packages every year, each one carefully assembled with both essential supplies and reminders of home. But this, and everything we do, is only possible with your generous support.
**[So please, will you take advantage of this limited-time match offer and DOUBLE the value of your gift for our heroes in uniform? Let's do everything we can to thank them for their service this summer.](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[MATCH MY GIFT NOW](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
Thanks for all you do to support our heroes.
--The USO
* A generous group of USO donors is matching all gifts to the USO, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $40,000, through August 25, 2025.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

body:
[POLL] Peter,

**Donald Trump is leading a charge to wipe out mail-in voting and voting machines before the 2026 election.**

This is another blatant and shameless attack on our voting rights. Mail-in voting increases participation for Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike.

In 2020, almost half of Americans voted by mail. In Missouri, we’ve taken steps forward by allowing no-excuse absentee voting to make it easier for folks to cast their ballot — _especially those with limited mobility or disabilities, seniors, busy parents, and folks who work long hours._

Getting rid of mail-in voting and voting machines would make it harder for many Americans, including thousands here in St. Louis, to exercise their constitutional right to vote. **This isn't what democracy looks like; it's voter suppression, plain and simple.**

[**Do you agree we must reject Trump’s blatant attacks on our voting rights? clean_body: [POLL] Peter, Donald Trump is leading a charge to wipe out mail-in voting and voting machines before the 2026 election. This is another blatant and shameless attack on our voting rights. Mail-in voting increases participation for Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. In 2020, almost half of Americans voted by mail. In Missouri, we’ve taken steps forward by allowing no-excuse absentee voting to make it easier for folks to cast their ballot — especially those with limited mobility or disabilities, seniors, busy parents, and folks who work long hours. Getting rid of mail-in voting and voting machines would make it harder for many Americans, including thousands here in St. Louis, to exercise their constitutional right to vote. This isn't what democracy looks like; it's voter suppression, plain and simple. | Thank you for making your voice heard, Team Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, can you give up one coffee a month?
body:
Hi Peter,
Our sustainer drive is happening now, so I wanted to make sure you saw my last email. Can you give up one coffee a month and join our Sustainer Circle at just $5 a month?
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=KXvNyOE8u92Nq9BQjEZw58G0+qKt/YvfmZuaPG8ZNh+j/SIwDoPAWyPAIqBGvBD9xuha2RBZZ6NUlxEMEpuGhV0FzUwsuVbIXbJA2vggnQ9wNxad/vblh/WqC0tR3VJD]
We know there are lots of great causes out there, but our work is funded by individual grassroots supporters just like you . Things may be hard now, but rely on you, and we can't do this work of fighting for our environment and climate everyday without you. By joining our Sustainer Circle at $5 a month now, you'll receive an exclusive OLCV magnet, and other monthly giving benefits, like a subscription to our Sustainer E-Newsletter that provides the inside scoop on all of our work. Can we keep counting on you to support the fight for our climate?
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=KXvNyOE8u92Nq9BQjEZw58G0+qKt/YvfmZuaPG8ZNh+j/SIwDoPAWyPAIqBGvBD9xuha2RBZZ6NUlxEMEpuGhV0FzUwsuVbIXbJA2vggnQ9wNxad/vblh/WqC0tR3VJD [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=KXvNyOE8u92Nq9BQjEZw58G0+qKt/YvfmZuaPG8ZNh+j/SIwDoPAWyPAIqBGvBD9xuha2RBZZ6NUlxEMEpuGhV0FzUwsuVbIXbJA2vggnQ9wNxad/vblh/WqC0tR3VJD]
Dear Peter,
Every summer I’m reminded of one scary truth: this will likely be the coolest summer for the rest of our lives. Summer can be a reminder of the urgency of the climate crisis for a lot of us in Oregon, from the increasing number of scorching heatwaves to life-threatening wildfires. There is no time to waste – our lawmakers need to act now, but as we saw during this year’s session, they missed their opportunity.
Even though session is over, we must keep up the pressure and continue showing our lawmakers how much we care about our climate and environment. Will you join our Sustainer Circle, with other dedicated climate fighters, to make an impact that will protect Oregon’s climate and natural legacy for generations to come? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2] You can join with a monthly gift of whatever amount is right for you, and the first 20 new monthly donors will get an exclusive OLCV magnet!
Make an impact [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=KXvNyOE8u92Nq9BQjEZw58G0+qKt/YvfmZuaPG8ZNh+j/SIwDoPAWyPAIqBGvBD9xuha2RBZZ6NUlxEMEpuGhV0FzUwsuVbIXbJA2vggnQ9wNxad/vblh/WqC0tR3VJD]
The fight is still ongoing even when we aren’t in session, and holding our elected officials accountable with the upcoming Environmental Scorecard is just one crucial part in ensuring our state leaders defend Oregon values and push back on federal climate attacks. https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=KXvNyOE8u92Nq9BQjEZw58G0+qKt/YvfmZuaPG8ZNh+j/SIwDoPAWyPAIqBGvBD9xuha2RBZZ6NUlxEMEpuGhV0FzUwsuVbIXbJA2vggnQ9wNxad/vblh/WqC0tR3VJD [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=KXvNyOE8u92Nq9BQjEZw58G0+qKt/YvfmZuaPG8ZNh+j/SIwDoPAWyPAIqBGvBD9xuha2RBZZ6NUlxEMEpuGhV0FzUwsuVbIXbJA2vggnQ9wNxad/vblh/WqC0tR3VJD]
Some days it feels hard to keep believing and fighting for climate action with all that we are seeing from the current administration such as attacks on our clean air and public lands, but this is exactly the moment we can’t stop believing. A monthly gift has an even greater impact on our work, as ongoing gifts allow us to save on administrative and stewardship costs, so we can put more of your gift directly to climate action. [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]
Make an impact [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=KXvNyOE8u92Nq9BQjEZw58G0+qKt/YvfmZuaPG8ZNh+j/SIwDoPAWyPAIqBGvBD9xuha2RBZZ6NUlxEMEpuGhV0FzUwsuVbIXbJA2vggnQ9wNxad/vblh/WqC0tR3VJD]
Additionally, our Sustainer Circle members receive exclusive benefits like a subscription to the monthly Sustainer E-Newsletter, insider access to the OLCV Election Report and Environmental Scorecard, and opportunities to take action on urgent and important issues.
A monthly gift can be a small amount that’s easier for you to manage each month, making donating more accessible for you, while deepening your impact. I’ll keep it simple: smaller monthly gifts can have an even greater impact than larger one time donations!
Will you start your monthly gift today and be one of the first 20 new members of OLCV’s Sustainer Circle? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2]
I look forward to having you join us,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator

name: Autism Health
subject: Step Into Action for Autism – Walk with Us & Early Bird Summit Tickets
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle!**
---
| [ ](http://)
---
| Join us for a day of **movement, music, and miracles** as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking **in person** at Huntington Beach Central Park or **virtually** from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! [Click HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=069445d1b3&e=3a42edfdc4) to Register! **Date:** Saturday, September 6, 2025
**Location:** Huntington Beach Central Park West
18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
[_(See our website for parking and map)_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=56d752245a&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=9744c42f48&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
|
---
|
---
| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=812db7672a&e=3a42edfdc4). **Reserve your spot today and save 10%** at: [www.ahsconference.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f6bceec2a9&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=49d14d9b59&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [Donate Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=880d8ecd5f&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate Now")
---
