name: Adam Schiff
subject: We’re fighting back. Here’s how:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek,

There’s no other way to put it: The fight for American democracy is
happening right now. And we’re taking it on right here in California.

Donald Trump poked the bear. Now, the bear is fighting back.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker.a3ynUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]Don't Poke the Bear sticker

While Donald Trump bosses around his allies in Texas to gerrymander new
district maps in his favor and disenfranchise voters, we’re not sitting on
the sidelines.

If we need to fight fire with fire to protect our votes, we will do it.

I joined state leaders in Los Angeles last week to announce our plans to
adjust our own maps. If Trump is going try to maintain the deeply
unpopular GOP majority by rewriting the rules, we’re going to respond.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker.dZzwRR&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1005&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]Derek, will
you rush in a split contribution and help us protect our democracy from
Republicans’ power grab? Here’s a bonus: if you give $10 or more, you’ll
get a free Don’t Poke the Bear sticker in the mail!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Adam Schiff and Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker._jOyoS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker.PE12M4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker.oamWN_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker.25mKDu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker.a3ynUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

If Republicans want to mess with our democracy, then we need to put them
on notice: we’re ready to fight for every ballot and every voice.

In solidarity,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting-sticker.a3ynUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8919%2E5257348%2EQ8gjgn ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

name: Lauren Underwood
subject: I’ve been thinking quite a lot lately
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611402/564355130/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611403/564355131/2143952773?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=) Hey, Lauren Underwood here! I’ve been thinking a lot recently, Peter. I've been thinking of all the ways Democrats need to do better. We need to listen more, we need to meet our voters where they are at, show up better in our communities, and get to know the people we’re serving; their hopes, their fears, and see how we can help. But a huge thing we've been doing wrong is not showing what we stand for, only what we're fighting against. **So here are my guiding lights, and what I'm fighting FOR in Congress:** **EVERY American has a right to affordable and quality health care coverage.** In the richest country in the world, it's unacceptable that folks cannot afford to go to the doctor. It’s unacceptable that people are working multiple jobs to afford their prescriptions. It’s unacceptable that seniors are rationing their grocery budgets to afford health care. I wrote the _Health Care Affordability Act_ with my constituents facing those issues top of mind. **Abortion is a human right.** That’s why I voted for key legislation to codify Roe and protect our access to contraception. The extreme right is on a mission to roll our rights decades back and attack reproductive freedom — making all of us less free. **No child should fear for their life at school. No one should fear a mass shooting at their job.** Weapons of war don’t belong in our neighborhoods. I secured $25 million to study gun violence as a public health issue, the first federal research into gun violence in more than two decades. **It's past time we addressed the disparities in maternal health.** That's why I co-founded the Black Maternal Health Caucus and wrote the _Momnibus_ , a collection of 13 bills to address every driver of maternal mortality, morbidity, and disparities in the United States. 80% of Maternal Deaths are preventable – women and families deserve to live to raise their children. [**All of these things are true — and we need you now more than ever to help us build a movement for a better tomorrow. Will you stand with me and Eric Sorensen today as we work to build this future in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611404/564355132/2143952773?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611405/564355133/2143952773?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=)
---
| [Chip in $35 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611406/564355134/2143952773?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=)

| [Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611410/564355138/2143952773?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=)
---
I’m not losing hope, Peter, I know that together we can stand up for each other and our democracy.
Thanks for your time today,
Lauren
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611411/564355139/779985510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=&emci=6d929277-247d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=74929277-247d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611412/564355140/-1582993359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=&emci=6d929277-247d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=74929277-247d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611413/564355141/988740625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=&emci=6d929277-247d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=74929277-247d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=18052858) Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611414/564355142/896231865?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDkyOTI3Ny0yNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RYHOhPS7Shfxpq41Vo0RcoZW5xqV6L_qHb_aiH6big=)

In the richest country in the world, it's unacceptable that folks cannot afford to go to the doctor. It’s unacceptable that people are working multiple jobs to afford their prescriptions. It’s unacceptable that seniors are rationing their grocery budgets to afford health care. I wrote the Health Care Affordability Act with my constituents facing those issues top of mind. Abortion is a human right. That’s why I voted for key legislation to codify Roe and protect our access to contraception. The extreme right is on a mission to roll our rights decades back and attack reproductive freedom — making all of us less free. No child should fear for their life at school. No one should fear a mass shooting at their job. Weapons of war don’t belong in our neighborhoods. I secured $25 million to study gun violence as a public health issue, the first federal research into gun violence in more than two decades. It's past time we addressed the disparities in maternal health. That's why I co-founded the Black Maternal Health Caucus and wrote the Momnibus , a collection of 13 bills to address every driver of maternal mortality, morbidity, and disparities in the United States. 80% of Maternal Deaths are preventable – women and families deserve to live to raise their children. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m not losing hope, Peter, I know that together we can stand up for each other and our democracy. Thanks for your time today, Lauren | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The slide into authoritarianism, and what to do about it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Donald Trump has taken over the D.C. police force under the pretense of lowering crime rates. Let’s call this what it really is: the latest dress rehearsal for Trump’s full-blown authoritarian takeover.
We saw what he did in California in June, deploying not just the National Guard but active-duty Marines (!) to Los Angeles completely unnecessarily — just because he didn’t like the protests against his administration’s extreme immigration enforcement.
Two months later, he’s pulling from the same playbook in D.C., making it the latest backdrop for test-driving dictatorship.
Every one of us should be extremely concerned about what’s next.
So what can we do? I’ve said this before but I will keep repeating it over and over because it could not be more important: When democracy starts backsliding, the #1 most important thing for people to do in their day-to-day lives is to stay in community. Talk to people. Don’t isolate, don’t ignore, don’t let the fractures Trump is pushing on us become reality.
They’re counting on us being demoralized, distracted, and just plain tired — that’s how they push the bounds of power further and further. But the truth is, way more people in this country believe in preserving democracy than not — and we need to hold onto that tightly.
So that’s the bigger picture: Join a group ( Indivisible has great options! [https://indivisible.org/groups] ). Talk about this stuff with your friends and family on a regular basis. Connect with the people around you, even if you can only find the tiniest nugget of overlap to agree on.
But right now, in this exact moment , what should we do?
What I’m doing is taking a deep breath and re-committing myself to fighting for what I believe in. It helps, I promise.
Want to join me? Add your name here if you’re still in this fight — and don’t skip the deep breath part. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Wxo2zuKqq0K0DfFUwbmpGQ2]
Our country’s values have been tested before. We’ve gone through challenging times and seen the messy back and forth of true progress. And we will certainly be tested again. Through it all, we need to stick together.
I’m with you.
-Sara Jacobs
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Al Franken
subject: Me Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
While some in Washington avoid their constituents, Peggy is front and center, engaging with Minnesotans, hearing their concerns, and bringing people together.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td064b5a7-983e-4f68-b2a2-9dae9ba10bf1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te622ede9-081a-4ce1-bf2a-c46b74d548b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, When Peggy asked me to reach out to you today, I said, “Of course!” I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom (her, not me), Peggy understands the vital role federal programs play in supporting working families. From Section 8 housing vouchers to health insurance and child care assistance, she knows firsthand how these resources can transform lives. Peggy’s credentials are impressive: currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor, she's the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in our country. Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. She also refuses to take a cent of corporate PAC money, because she won’t be a puppet for corporate interests. While some in Washington avoid their constituents, Peggy is front and center, engaging with Minnesotans, hearing their concerns, and bringing people together. She doesn’t just want to fight Trump and his allies; she’s ready to lead and deliver concrete accomplishments for folks like she’s done in Minnesota over and over again. [Help send my friend Peggy to the Senate by splitting a donation between Blue Amp Action and her campaign now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T982a5214-c7a5-4b03-9a90-cc40caec112f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peggy told me that if she doesn’t hit her next fundraising goal, I’ll get to email you all again. So if you’re tired of seeing my face in your inbox, [I’d donate right away.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18ee6fba-fd03-4e78-9a11-e5bec13ed142/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9821430-3c90-4788-bf87-e2ab35ad6d7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Emily
subject: Take a look at this map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
The new Texas Republican map completely reshapes the 32nd District, represented by our friend Julie Johnson, the first LGBTQ+ member of Congress elected from the South.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611647/564355955/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.19_TXSplit_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQwMmQ1MC0yNTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5H2hP4OUYLYHEGYYxqstkomO_7sMxnEuZBL2P-l0oMM=&emci=72affcc8-1a7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=b4402d50-257d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=23483442) | Peter, **Today, we’re asking you to do one thing: Split a donation of any amount between our organizing and Rep. Julie Johnson’s Don’t Mess with Texas PAC →** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611648/564355956/1344462191?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.19_TXSplit_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQwMmQ1MC0yNTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5H2hP4OUYLYHEGYYxqstkomO_7sMxnEuZBL2P-l0oMM=) Here’s why: Under orders from Donald Trump, Texas Republicans are redrawing their state’s Congressional district maps. The goal? Create more Republican districts so that the House stays in GOP hands — no matter what the voters think. Their proposed new map completely reshapes the 32nd District, represented by our friend Julie Johnson, the first LGBTQ+ member of Congress elected from the South. Her urban and suburban North Texas district would become rural and predominantly Republican. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113611649/564355957/1344462191?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.19_TXSplit_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQwMmQ1MC0yNTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5H2hP4OUYLYHEGYYxqstkomO_7sMxnEuZBL2P-l0oMM=) Julie isn’t taking this attack lying down. She is speaking out and organizing buses so her neighbors can travel to the state capitol to testify against this unhinged power grab. **Together, we must swiftly and fiercely push back against this redistricting scheme. In America, voters choose their leaders – leaders don’t get to choose their voters.** [_**Let’s have Julie’s back and stop Trump and the GOP from stealing power. clean_body: The new Texas Republican map completely reshapes the 32nd District, represented by our friend Julie Johnson, the first LGBTQ+ member of Congress elected from the South. | Peter, Today, we’re asking you to do one thing: Split a donation of any amount between our organizing and Rep. Julie Johnson’s Don’t Mess with Texas PAC → = Here’s why: Under orders from Donald Trump, Texas Republicans are redrawing their state’s Congressional district maps. The goal? Create more Republican districts so that the House stays in GOP hands — no matter what the voters think. Their proposed new map completely reshapes the 32nd District, represented by our friend Julie Johnson, the first LGBTQ+ member of Congress elected from the South. Her urban and suburban North Texas district would become rural and predominantly Republican. = Julie isn’t taking this attack lying down. She is speaking out and organizing buses so her neighbors can travel to the state capitol to testify against this unhinged power grab. Together, we must swiftly and fiercely push back against this redistricting scheme. In America, voters choose their leaders – leaders don’t get to choose their voters. = = Even if you can only give $5 or $10, it all adds up. Thank you so much for your generosity and support! – the whole team at Emily Randall for Congress = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Team, It’s been a tough few months in Washington, but we have one big victory to celebrate together: **We kept our public lands in public hands. ** Thanks to a powerful coalition — crossing party lines and uniting conservationists — we stopped efforts to sell off or weaken protections for the lands we all cherish. This victory belongs to everyone who stood up and joined the fight. But this battle isn’t over. Opponents of conservation are still looking for ways to chip away at our public lands and turn them into fenced-off playgrounds for the ultra-wealthy. That’s why we need your support now more than ever. **[With your contribution, we can keep up the fight to protect our land, water, and wildlife for future generations. Please chip in today to help defend our public lands>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113612127/564357604/-1710431385?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDFjNGE1Ny0yNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HyV2wTCUcoxnvd1xwi5S5bJpBtsRRWV4Exp8oZOb45o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113612134/564357611/-1710431385?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDFjNGE1Ny0yNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HyV2wTCUcoxnvd1xwi5S5bJpBtsRRWV4Exp8oZOb45o=)

subject: Is Peter happy with Trump’s Republican trifecta?

body:
If NOT, we need you to respond ASAP >>

|

Hi Peter, it’s Matt from Democracy on the Line.

Last week, our team reached out to you so you could confirm your status as a Democrat... _**but we never heard back from you.**_

When someone doesn’t renew their Democratic Supporter membership our system automatically labels them as **“Republican.”**

You’ve been such a loyal Democrat in the past so I wanted to reach out personally to check if there’s been a change of your political affiliation or if this is just a clerical issue on our end.

name: Research Survey (Voter Action Project)
subject: Voter ID options at the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@RecorderDannyO: **Important** It is with great disappointment that I share that the Veteran Photo-ID Cards issued by Ohio County Recorders’ Offices appear to no longer be considered eligible forms of voter ID. This change is part of the new voter ID law, HB 458, signed into law on 1/6/23. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Ohio_VeteransID.png]
Ohio counties are grappling with the impact of their voter suppression law that enacts stringent voter identification laws.
Franklin County, home to the state capitol of Columbus and more than a million Ohioans, is among the counties that has announced that they're no longer able to accept veterans photo ID cards issued by the county as proof for voting because of Ohio's law.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should states with voter ID requirements expand or further restrict the types of IDs they accept?

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

| On August 21st, we are holding a virtual town hall with Rep. Robert Garcia and California Attorney General Rob Bonta. Rep. Garcia is the new ranking member of the House Oversight Committee, _meaning he is one of the top Democrats leading the fight in DC to hold Trump accountable_. AG Bonta is fighting the same fight from California, suing the Trump administration **twelve times in the last twelve weeks** to hold him accountable each time he has violated the law. They will be taking questions from everyday voters like you. **[Our California Strong members aren’t afraid to face Californians and explain our policies and positions. Unlike Republicans, who have been encouraged to cancel their town halls and avoid their constituents. This is one of many town halls we have held this year, and we want to keep up the momentum. clean_body: We want to continue holding town halls | = | On August 21st, we are holding a virtual town hall with Rep. Robert Garcia and California Attorney General Rob Bonta. Rep. Garcia is the new ranking member of the House Oversight Committee, meaning he is one of the top Democrats leading the fight in DC to hold Trump accountable. AG Bonta is fighting the same fight from California, suing the Trump administration twelve times in the last twelve weeks to hold him accountable each time he has violated the law. They will be taking questions from everyday voters like you. = = = = = = = In addition to taking questions, AG Bonta and Rep. Garcia will also be sharing critical information about your rights as Californians. Trump's anti-immigrant policies have unleashed a wave of arrests and terror on our communities. Knowledge is power and we all need to know how to fight back and stand up for ourselves and our neighbors. This event will provide an opportunity for information-sharing and crucial constituent Q&A. It’s these types of community-focused events that the California Democratic Party is honored to support and host. = = Thank you for your support, \- CADEM P.S. [@seanspicer](https://substack.com/redirect/a17b6c92-e6c8-4c1e-9a52-9404759e890d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): It's really rich watching Biden folks on the Sunday shows offering analysis of what Trump should do regarding Russia -- when it was on their watch it happened without any push back Maybe sit this one out

## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/e0a53f28-50a3-4165-8ca8-cc61f59e265e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/e0a53f28-50a3-4165-8ca8-cc61f59e265e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Join me today for a fascinating conversation with KT MacFarland, former Deputy National Security Advisor to President Trump. Wednesday I'm joined by former CIA Ops Officer, Bryan Dean Wright. Then Thursday, we've got a great panel featuring, Nan Hayworth and Grace Curley. Finally Friday I'm talking with Dr. Peter McCullough for an update on the MAHA agent. Don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## Trump's weekend of diplomacy...
If there's one thing I hope everyone has learned from the first 200 days it's this:
Don't bet against Donald Trump.
The master of the deal is back.
And this time he's setting his sights on ending the Russia-Ukraine conflict.
Friday, Putin traveled to Alaska to discuss the issue with President Trump.
The outcome of these diplomacy efforts remains to be seen-- at the close of the meeting Trump reported ["we're pretty close to a deal."](https://substack.com/redirect/bf77f6a4-0723-413e-9d88-095d30e80f5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Then yesterday, Ukraine's President Zelensky, along with other major European leaders, visited the White House to work towards peace.
Again, talks went well, with the White House reporting all parties as ["happy about the possibility of peace."](https://substack.com/redirect/feacfee1-e776-446b-b34f-7bd2d8576693?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Sounds like great news to me, but evidently not according to the legacy media.
The usual suspects are critiquing Trump's approach; you'd swear they _want_ peace talks to fail.
But if you ask me, it's pretty rich watching Biden folks on the Sunday shows offering their analysis.
They had their chance to fix things, but instead, the war happened under their watch--and they did nothing.
Maybe sit this one out.
Let's break down what's actually going on...

clean_body: American strength is at work brokering peace for Russia and Ukraine. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more American strength is at work brokering peace for Russia and Ukraine. | | | Aug 19| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ICYMI: What happens NEXT with Russia-Ukraine? Stories I'm reading... \- via Just the News \- via Politico \- via Reuters \- via The Washington Post \- via Axios \- via Reuters Top tweets... : It's really rich watching Biden folks on the Sunday shows offering analysis of what Trump should do regarding Russia -- when it was on their watch it happened without any push back Maybe sit this one out : Trump says US won't do business with Russia 'until we get the war settled' "I noticed he's bringing a lot of business people from Russia, and that's good" Trump said. "I like that because they want to do business, but they're not doing business until we get the war settled." Start your day in the know Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it! This week on The Sean Spicer Show... Join me today for a fascinating conversation with KT MacFarland, former Deputy National Security Advisor to President Trump. Wednesday I'm joined by former CIA Ops Officer, Bryan Dean Wright. Then Thursday, we've got a great panel featuring, Nan Hayworth and Grace Curley. Finally Friday I'm talking with Dr. Peter McCullough for an update on the MAHA agent. Don't miss it! Wellness update... If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center. If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me! Trump's weekend of diplomacy... If there's one thing I hope everyone has learned from the first 200 days it's this: Don't bet against Donald Trump. The master of the deal is back. And this time he's setting his sights on ending the Russia-Ukraine conflict. Friday, Putin traveled to Alaska to discuss the issue with President Trump. The outcome of these diplomacy efforts remains to be seen-- at the close of the meeting Trump reported Then yesterday, Ukraine's President Zelensky, along with other major European leaders, visited the White House to work towards peace. Again, talks went well, with the White House reporting all parties as Sounds like great news to me, but evidently not according to the legacy media. The usual suspects are critiquing Trump's approach; you'd swear they want peace talks to fail. But if you ask me, it's pretty rich watching Biden folks on the Sunday shows offering their analysis. They had their chance to fix things, but instead, the war happened under their watch--and they did nothing. Maybe sit this one out. Let's break down what's actually going on... Fellow Conservative,

You’ve been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most.

But lately... I’ve noticed we haven’t heard from you.

I get it. It’s been a long cycle. The news is relentless. And after the big wins, it can feel like the battle’s already over.

Let me tell you that it’s not. But here's the truth: this is the moment we need our people the most—when no one’s watching. When the media’s tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash.

And right now, we’re hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Fellow Conservative.

So here’s what I’m asking:

**[Can I convince you to send in $1 today to let me know that you’re still around and interested in being a part of the team?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=902278534f4b4f31a13fb7af06f4daab&_e=UFTHxoGOK_wv4wmme6Gvg015uQAGgZdM50LfYJoopEIlkfPUNw_DTI8Q-ozt-kc8RiurcFt0a2aDvIX60KSwwBUyZNSE7kmdzyy9jsP81K3FIY7HcSIWXXmwTVx-hg9dzcBSdBNbahDPLf5yutw7bqf_qRQn8RcA0R1BMqcLaHwiOzrK-gVs_1J-hBiNWnvMlmTZgpezypqmIbbnqvJILeXa-gyFQDCPhDZrYgrlZp7ThSyYl3u0WMwXB3zhwKWzaAAbemboHMpJ0YVbi-k29soUGemISUKyWMFYgC4ncq-esHLHNF4Gber0yHqzPUcyhUHq9iYgKeBedsQRJ_aAbx30O6p6LUiKY536NS3FfDkCT_Pnfispy6upszrZrKIvDWHz-83EJTrvTxrt7wKeYGoXD0DU3nglZI5i-tEN2TJf7Jc4_eCre7KU8qOkrDvidnBaUXXJVt1yrqCmN1iNBQNk3zE9rSNInbHCVjmpO2iJwD1z5GrqEDEeC1dnrLzVZMcS7CsBE7G_Pw7V8eknak1p4GLy0yTyEfGbhGl9GdWt2zFSZLneE3BZyEUnwJK0IywUhITaZZtPaxm4LRW1uen56odlAmIwHWQgVQK_QwWwU8HdnyLI_pcOVElecshjEAQqiWciBD39xHN-5dpV-dqDFmOH1mJ_toBjGUGVnbE6Mkj7wn4VqgtIBk_5NGWA9Nt3XxibaF0GE0NDwDl46wrTtJXwwbxBo1qXJ2B-fLTH-ueRKGvuuSNfYLsQe1_MRg1TAmdxU8swI6RBh4rmDF6abki2j7ZG6aBuGkppUc-_tylxOQdht64m0cq9g1cIUjSxKHVpFdrM22RfAe1nD3ieLLORe8ItsOBztzpuy5DD2TMkGsUTGlX_oofhOV8S)** Not for the number—honestly, it’s symbolic.

**Really, consider your donation a signal to me and the team that you’re still here, that you still believe this fight is worth it, and that you haven’t tuned out.**

We can’t win this with half our team watching from the sidelines. And the truth is: **[I’d rather have 10,000 conservatives chipping in $1 because it shows we have real Americans backing our efforts and not Hollywood Elites or Mega Donors like the Socialist Democrats depend on.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=902278534f4b4f31a13fb7af06f4daab&_e=UFTHxoGOK_wv4wmme6Gvg015uQAGgZdM50LfYJoopEIlkfPUNw_DTI8Q-ozt-kc8RiurcFt0a2aDvIX60KSwwBUyZNSE7kmdzyy9jsP81K3FIY7HcSIWXXmwTVx-hg9dzcBSdBNbahDPLf5yutw7bqf_qRQn8RcA0R1BMqcLaHwiOzrK-gVs_1J-hBiNWnvMlmTZgpezypqmIbbnqvJILeXa-gyFQDCPhDZrYgrlZp7ThSyYl3u0WMwXB3zhwKWzaAAbemboHMpJ0YVbi-k29soUGemISUKyWMFYgC4ncq-esHLHNF4Gber0yHqzPUcyhUHq9iYgKeBedsQRJ_aAb82iE3FEMoNfS6yVjN_3dVc_miyKYdFafnsQRF9NMbuGbBJtEeKxNUM2gTGx5HBeIoQs9MHhtk-W1GMl8YmESx-_KM3IiBCjxpaRm5Qi5tedRXpI7vXQ9woZJ5lhkB7vpmrqiosT41_Ki4HIFJ5yC6uHli57z297-phgEChDaVEBZgxTONVwG0_7uWRoB14w-kQlr2w5E-ND5v9YeEHyOicPM7HYTPOxW6lP6anRJgH3TYKRKp-d_QMmMIUtLgbi_DD_OzN7rCNiOsKHCvo4PsSFg0MUiI9FSqXTUkXFX5REr6zseT__Zr8aMB54rCj84Mda3RZWFRm-SNrHWNwoNscorjYWm8_Sadh7nB1W_L-7Zbx7Rq_rLznxUBbai4zMLe7QCXoT_yaRhGGSpJXcpwOdLTA25tYHWoBV5oxs67hMnDFwh8Z-CKwa4D67E_6f1Od6wN-RSLQU9KcS9AkbuDvCuVhiv1gRf_YzIVREb0PKQeAlmE2Z-zOQlcVuR2saMRzOiTAsotHycMEjv_V1qT2Bu-DInjuXBGyM0Yc1QBdl)**

---
#### **Check Out The Custom Simulators on StopRCV.com**
#### [**https://stoprcv.com/rcv-in-action**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FFs48fz7UWJ&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=PB_kHzcKRX9jQ9p4sTZAHBDXtZM%3D)
---
|
---
Our partners at Michigan Fair Elections Institute (MFEI) have released a of comprehensive fact based assessment on RCV: _[Ranked Choice Voting: A Threat to Our Electoral Process](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Faa3979fb-9421-4dd8-ba7d-8ead2d346103.usrfiles.com%2Fugd%2Faa3979_1c9e4b6a7e6247988eb011ff3524a789.pdf&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=zCkycCI3aYrZCIDBQvsiqvUE8Lg%3D)_ It is peer-reviewed and based on data from major US universities and the London School of Economics. Unlike the left and a handful of well-paid "Republican" RCV supporters, it has actual, you know, data and history that proves the absolute folly of RCV. It is critical that Michigan voters understand that RCV acts against them. If you don't want your ballot sent to the trash can (ie, eliminated through RCV recounting) then please make sure you oppose the pro-RCV Constitutional Amendment coming to MI in 2026. Oh. And its not just Michigan. Sixteen states (WV, WY, TN, FL, ID, SD, MT, KY, AL, MS, LA, OK, MO, AR, KS, ND) have banned RCV. If you're not in one of those - look out - oppose RCV now before it's too late.
---
#### **I was asked to write a testimonial**
---
---
|
---
#### [**Click Here To Read The Michigan Report**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Faa3979fb-9421-4dd8-ba7d-8ead2d346103.usrfiles.com%2Fugd%2Faa3979_1c9e4b6a7e6247988eb011ff3524a789.pdf&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=zCkycCI3aYrZCIDBQvsiqvUE8Lg%3D)
---
|
---
#### **America First Policy Institute Update**
---
**My first videos with AFPI are now sitting with their executives for approval. We are now taking my Anti-RCV Education to three additional States (Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia). All of the videos we created to STOP RCV last year in Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, South Dakota, Nevada, and Colorado in 2024, we have now made available free of charge to AFPI, they will now be spending their own money pushing my content across the country. Targeting places where RCV is still being pushed.****My work with AFPI will produce RCV education to millions of people, I have RCV simulators that show in real time the election changes and the redistribution of votes. I explain each step so everyone can understand it. I have made these simulators available in 15 languages that are most used in each State. I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.****My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).****I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025.**
---
**My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.****On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI.**[**https://www.americafirstpolicy.com/**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.americafirstpolicy.com&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=vOEblAYMMoZcpvLlg5cqQhFjQgY%3D)**They have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.****I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure.**
---
---
|
---
**My organization Izon Education**[**@907Honest**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2F907Honest&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=_FRPv50FPO22_ZAfKFKVNPzj6rc%3D)**are working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview.**[**@A1Policy**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=dmfgJXTDOAFdNRxzMvKl8M98VT0%3D)**I am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute.**
---
---
|
---
**“Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release “Frozen Odds” & “The Permanent Short” in October pending delays from our partnership with America First Policy Institute. They are helping me edit the footage to fit their national needs.**
---
**“Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage.**
---
---
|
---
### **More News**
---
---
|
---
**Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=qBOJRXyOLbtTbkg7mAKIB8hNY8Q%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68a4c29ce38be67cdff1f7eb&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_68a4c07b476e3202bd8df69f&l=en-US&s=2fgALe9mSUqBTtpKNcGl7aoBLOk%3D)

body:
Our fight for the Dignity of Work continues.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113613559/564362737/-529377601?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.19_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNmYTc4Mi0yYTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6bFjkbcB25-12QJKDaOniT9-p_K9Eekl89m0AIbOUBI=) I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [**_Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Kirsten GIllibrand and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113613560/564362738/-529377601?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.19_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNmYTc4Mi0yYTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6bFjkbcB25-12QJKDaOniT9-p_K9Eekl89m0AIbOUBI=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113613561/564362739/-529377601?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.19_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNmYTc4Mi0yYTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6bFjkbcB25-12QJKDaOniT9-p_K9Eekl89m0AIbOUBI=)

I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**_Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $10 or $25 now, split between Kirsten Gillibrand and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113613566/564362744/-529377601?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.19_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNmYTc4Mi0yYTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6bFjkbcB25-12QJKDaOniT9-p_K9Eekl89m0AIbOUBI=)

clean_body: Our fight for the Dignity of Work continues. = I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown * =

name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
subject: Today I went for a walk.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Hey Peter,
Today I went for a walk. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act]
That sentence should never be revolutionary. But as a Black woman residing in occupied DC, it’s not just an act of resistance; it is utterly dangerous.
Leaving one’s house with a buddy should never be a mandate. Not being able to walk your neighborhood without fear of the US military detaining you on domestic soil for no reason other than a fascist agenda should never be the norm. But this is the new reality for 700,000 Washingtonians.
Unfortunately, while our awareness is heightened, it is not unusual nor abnormal. Rather, it is the state of existence that millions of black, brown, indigenous, and migrant communities historically and continuously live in these United States.
Trump’s occupation of DC with the National Guard is absolutely unprecedented, uncalled for, and egregious. This occupation must end immediately! And if you live outside of DC, please heed the call to action and contact your Congressional Representatives now; demand that they support HJ Res 115 [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XPl-5uxtHj6A06qREmsQbjimMYMzOBdaVeqmXgNwN6o/edit?usp=drivesdk] to end the emergency period.
The National Guard in DC does not make us safer.
Demilitarizing law enforcement, providing affordable housing and healthcare for all, increasing living wages, ensuring equitable and just public education, and making DC the 51st state make us safer.
Movement for Freedom is organizing on the frontlines across America to ensure that all people have access to proper safety and freedom. Please support our work today so that taking a simple walk today, tomorrow, or in the future doesn’t ever put anyone anywhere at risk. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act]
Stephany Rose Spaulding
Executive Director Politivist Action PAC
Lead Spokesperson for Movement for Freedom
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f-srs-video?refcode=x_250819_DCOccupation_act&recurring=1]

Washington, DC 20033
United States

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: This is a self-inflicted wound
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113614003/564364250/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250819_FR_BBBeffects_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBlYjJjMC0yYzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6y7ICqX5WSruMq2QE2fyd-SIw6YPZ7RK8UWv_PHVmWc=&emci=9c6d9165-1f7a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=790eb2c0-2c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=6108787) | Willis,

The ink is barely dry on the Admin’s reconciliation bill, and already, communities like ours in Santa Cruz County are bracing for the damage.

Let me be very clear: this isn’t just another partisan fight in Washington. This is personal. This is about nearly 37,000 people in our county who could lose access to **Medi-Cal** or **Affordable Care Act coverage**. It’s about our local clinics, community health providers, and hospital systems now scrambling to figure out how to care for patients with fewer resources and more red tape.

This bill, which slashes nearly $1 trillion in Medicaid and ACA funding to pay for $4.5 trillion in tax cuts for the wealthy, is — in my words — a self-inflicted wound. It puts working families last and writes a blank check to corporations and billionaires. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113614007/564364254/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250819_FR_BBBeffects_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBlYjJjMC0yYzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6y7ICqX5WSruMq2QE2fyd-SIw6YPZ7RK8UWv_PHVmWc=) Recently, we stood with frontline health care providers who explained the stakes:
* Longer wait times at hospitals
* More missed appointments due to fear or confusion
* Higher premiums for privately insured families
* Overcrowded emergency rooms
* Job cuts across the local health care sector

I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: we cannot put up roadblocks or barriers between people and the care they need. These policies are not just punitive, they’re ineffective. And when they hit communities like ours, it’s not abstract. It’s real. It’s painful. And it’s wrong.

If you’re with me in this fight to protect working families and defend health care access in Santa Cruz, I need your support. [Can you chip in $10 to help us organize, speak out, and push back against this reckless law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113614011/564364258/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250819_FR_BBBeffects_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBlYjJjMC0yYzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6y7ICqX5WSruMq2QE2fyd-SIw6YPZ7RK8UWv_PHVmWc=) | [CONTRIBUTE TO HELP ME DEFEND HEALTHCARE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113614016/564364263/1759435971?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250819_FR_BBBeffects_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBlYjJjMC0yYzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6y7ICqX5WSruMq2QE2fyd-SIw6YPZ7RK8UWv_PHVmWc=)

There is no beautiful part. Just broken promises, misplaced priorities, and families left behind.

Let’s demand better.

clean_body: | Willis, The ink is barely dry on the Admin’s reconciliation bill, and already, communities like ours in Santa Cruz County are bracing for the damage. Let me be very clear: this isn’t just another partisan fight in Washington. This is personal. This is about nearly 37,000 people in our county who could lose access to Medi-Cal or Affordable Care Act coverage. It’s about our local clinics, community health providers, and hospital systems now scrambling to figure out how to care for patients with fewer resources and more red tape. This bill, which slashes nearly $1 trillion in Medicaid and ACA funding to pay for $4.5 trillion in tax cuts for the wealthy, is — in my words — a self-inflicted wound. It puts working families last and writes a blank check to corporations and billionaires. = Recently, we stood with frontline health care providers who explained the stakes: Longer wait times at hospitals More missed appointments due to fear or confusion Higher premiums for privately insured families Overcrowded emergency rooms Job cuts across the local health care sector I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: we cannot put up roadblocks or barriers between people and the care they need. These policies are not just punitive, they’re ineffective. And when they hit communities like ours, it’s not abstract. It’s real. It’s painful. And it’s wrong. If you’re with me in this fight to protect working families and defend health care access in Santa Cruz, I need your support. = | = There is no beautiful part. Just broken promises, misplaced priorities, and families left behind. Let’s demand better. — Jimmy If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States **

subject: Fighting back against Trump’s authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
What’s happening in DC is a dangerous abuse of power. Help fight back.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250819-1&t=1&akid=2546%2E587540%2E7PNuz9)
Peter, what’s happening right now in Washington, DC, is a dangerous abuse of power.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250819_1_pccc?refcode=em20250819-2546&amount=5&refcode2=2546_587540_7PNuz9&akid=2546%2E587540%2E7PNuz9)
As heavily armed federal troops occupy and terrorize our nation’s capital, our friends at the Progressive Change Campaign Committee are working to plaster the city with billboards that Trump and his stormtroopers will see every day with quotes like these:
Rachel Maddow: **"THIS IS WHAT FASCISM LOOKS LIKE IN AMERICA."**

DC Attorney General Brian Schwalb: **TRUMP'S OCCUPATION: "ILLEGAL. UNWANTED. A DANGEROUS ABUSE OF POWER."**

_Washington Post_ editorial headline: **"A GESTAPO IN OUR CAPITAL."**

_The Guardian_ headline: **"AUTHORITARIANISM ON THE MARCH IN D.C."**
**[Help us plaster Washington DC with larger-than-life billboards showing Trump and his allies that America won't stand for fascism in our streets. Can you split a $5 contribution between PCCC and Leaders We Deserve today to power our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250819_1_pccc?refcode=em20250819-2546&amount=5&refcode2=2546_587540_7PNuz9&akid=2546%2E587540%2E7PNuz9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250819_1_pccc?amount=5&refcode=em20250819-2546&refcode2=2546_587540_7PNuz9&akid=2546%2E587540%2E7PNuz9)**
Trump and his military police won’t be able to escape the messages on these billboards, Peter. Let’s stand up together — visibly, loudly, and in their faces — against this illegal and authoritarian occupation.
**[If you can, make a $5 donation to PCCC and Leaders We Deserve today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250819_1_pccc?refcode=em20250819-2546&amount=5&refcode2=2546_587540_7PNuz9&akid=2546%2E587540%2E7PNuz9)**
Thanks for being with us in this fight.
—Leaders We Deserve

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/19/2025
body:
Griswold rallies Indivisible activists with anti-Trump speech while overseeing Colorado elections
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado politics are heating up on multiple fronts. Secretary of State [Jena Griswold is under fire](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for rallying Indivisible activists with a fiery anti-Trump speech while overseeing state elections, raising questions about partisanship. Denver wasted millions on a homeless shelter that [never housed anyone](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Teachers remain [priced out of their own districts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), wildfires continue to [test emergency response](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and debates [rage from ICE facilities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and [Xcel Energy contracts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to whether Colorado should be labeled a [“sanctuary state”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by the DOJ.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** President Trump jolted Washington with [three surprise moves](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): releasing declassified RussiaGate documents, meeting with Vladimir Putin in Alaska to discuss ending the Ukraine war, and deploying the National Guard in D.C. as tensions rise over what may come next.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Colorado’s working families are being left behind as leaders divert billions from roads into transit schemes and pet projects. With highways crumbling and drivers paying up to $1,100 a year in repairs, Mesa County Commissioner Bobbie Daniel argues [Coloradans deserve better](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—fix the basics and stop taxing families more while delivering less. Meanwhile, [media lawsuits are drawing scrutiny](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with critics pointing to selective filings and fig-leaf coverage that obscure deeper issues.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, August 19, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Griswold rallies Indivisible activists with anti-Trump speech while overseeing Colorado elections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN & SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
When Larimer County resident Phoebe McWilliams tuned into an Indivisible Colorado Zoom call on August 6, she expected to hear an update on election policy. Instead, she heard Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold accuse President Donald Trump of “abusing our legal system and undermining the Constitution almost every single day” and rally activists to “stop Trump in the courts, mobilize and beat MAGA.”
“She should be neutral,” McWilliams said after listening to the call. “Because all people hear is her so-called professional opinion. She’s not neutral, and that should be a neutral position.”
Speaking to more than 400 attendees, Griswold accused Trump of pardoning January 6 defendants, dismantling federal task forces on election security and “weaponizing the Department of Justice to try to attempt to release Tina Peters.” She went further, alleging Trump “unlawfully attempted to interfere in state-run elections through executive order” and had “even allegedly sent political operatives to try to explore gaining access to county election equipment right here in Colorado.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Potholes and Broken Promises: Colorado’s Working Class Deserves Better](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BOBBIE DANIEL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s crumbling roads symbolize broken promises from state leaders, who divert billions to pet projects while families pay $800–$1,100 annually in car repairs from poor infrastructure.
* State policies strangling energy revenues and prioritizing ideological programs over essentials have left schools, roads, and the economy underfunded.
* Daniel urges support for 2026 ballot initiatives to ensure gas taxes and fees are spent only on roads, highways, and bridges—restoring fairness and prioritizing working families.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!

**[Media fig leaves and selective lawsuits: the Colorado story you’re not hearing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* CPR ran a story amplifying Democrats’ accusations against ICE and the Trump administration but failed to seek or publish any response from the accused parties, which the author argues turns reporting into partisan PR.
* Colorado AG Phil Weiser has sued Trump dozens of times over policies he claims “harm Coloradans,” yet declined to challenge Biden’s unconstitutional student loan transfers, brushing off taxpayer harm as negligible.
* These patterns of selective journalism and selective lawsuits reinforce conservative frustration: public media and public officials operate as arms of one ideology, funded in part by taxpayer dollars.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

The event, called Now or Never, brought together four speakers to talk about school safety, election integrity, and Colorado’s political future. Details are available at hdr.nucleuspages.com/events/now-or-never._

__

**[Roblox isn’t a game when safety is on the line](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY HEIDI GANAHL | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 15** _This week, two very different voices sounded the same alarm about Roblox. YouTuber Schlep says the platform banned him after he worked with law enforcement to help catch child predators. Louisiana Attorney General Liz Murrill is suing Roblox, calling it a “clear and present danger” to kids. Both are pointing to the same problem: a platform packed with children and not enough safeguards to protect them._ __

**🥸 DID YOU KNOW?** **Human noses and ears really do look bigger with age.** You’ve probably heard the claim that they “never stop growing,” but that’s not quite true. Just like the rest of our body, they finish growing in youth. What happens later is gravity: over time, skin and cartilage stretch and sag, making noses and earlobes appear longer—one reason older folks often seem to have outsized ears.

| Hi friends,
Our friends at ACC Action are going to be at the State Fair! Join Congressman Jeff Hurd and Congressman Jeff Crank on August 23rd for _[Conserving the Tradition: Making America Beautiful Again](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_ —an afternoon of inspiring remarks on defending our values and preserving the beauty of our nation. Seats are limited—[RSVP today](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to secure your spot!
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Denver faces a cultural identity crisis as rapid growth and corporate influence erode the city’s character. The Air Force Academy will end race-based admissions after a legal settlement, while families call Colorado’s court competency system broken over delays and poor treatment for mentally ill defendants. Voters overwhelmingly back securing historic Shoshone water rights to protect Western Slope flows, and lawmakers clash over a sweeping “Big Beautiful Bill” bundling numerous policy changes. Meanwhile, ICE may open a 1,250-bed detention center in Hudson next year to address surging arrests, drawing mixed local reactions.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Cory Gaines warns that [Colorado’s “add-back” tax](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) rules act as a stealth tax on overtime pay. Sean Pond argues the [state has slid into “legal tyranny”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) via court rulings and legislative overreach, urging a grassroots push to reclaim freedoms. Dr. Brian Joondeph champions the Trump-era visa bond program as a market-based, America-first immigration reform—requiring certain high-risk visitors to post refundable bonds to ensure timely departure—calling it common-sense enforcement that protects taxpayers and restores trust in the system.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, August 14, 2025.
– Team RMV

|

**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado’s Legal Tyranny, How It Happened and How We Take It Back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Colorado did not fall because of one bad election or one bad governor. It fell because a handful of people figured out how to take over a state legally. They did it quietly, methodically, and permanently. By the time most Coloradans noticed, it was already too late._
_This is not theory. It is documented history and political strategy. If we do not face it head on, Colorado will become the model for how the rest of America loses its freedom without a single shot being fired._
_In the early 2000s four ultra wealthy progressives, Jared Polis, Tim Gill, Rutt Bridges, and Pat Stryker, launched a plan called The Blueprint. Their goal was to flip Colorado from red to blue and lock it down for good. They did not just focus on big elections. They targeted small local races, poured millions into “nonpartisan” nonprofits that were actually Democrat recruitment machines, and built a web of think tanks, activist groups, and friendly media outlets to control the narrative year round._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado’s add-back taxes are a backdoor tax on overtime](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s “add-back” tax policy forces residents to include certain income—like federally exempt overtime pay—back into their state taxable income, effectively creating a hidden tax.
* State Sen. Byron Pelton is pushing legislation to align such taxes with TABOR limits, arguing they generate new revenue without voter approval.
* Critics note the policy was championed by progressive lawmakers despite its disproportionate impact on hourly workers, contradicting their stated support for “the little guy.”

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**[Denver Is Losing Everything That Gave It Character](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* C. J. Garbo argues that granting police authority to non-citizens—such as green card holders or DACA recipients—undermines the sovereignty and legitimacy that citizenship confers in a constitutional republic.
* He warns that law enforcement power should only be entrusted to full citizens who have sworn allegiance, possess voting rights, and share mutual accountability under the Constitution.
* Garbo contends the policy disrespects immigrants who became citizens before serving, risks expanding to other civic roles, and erodes public trust by prioritizing demographics over shared constitutional values.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The Rule 211 gamble: How two towns used Colorado law to effectively shut down an oil company’s core assets](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | AUGUST 8** _Buried wells, sworn affidavits and a state determined to make an example. This is the opening chapter of a three-part series on one oil and gas company’s final stand—and what the documents and data actually reveal. Start with the towns. Stay for the verdict._
__

**[Bled dry by the state: One oil company’s fight to survive ECMC’s war of attrition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | AUGUST 8** _Jeffrey Kauffman stood at the edge of an excavation site—not to check production, but to explain why there wasn’t any. There was no rig, no flaring, no signs of oil moving to market. Just a fenced-off hole in the earth—and a state agency that wouldn’t let them fill it back in._
__

**[The man Polis vowed to destroy: Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth and legacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | AUGUST 8** _On his 50th birthday, Kevin Kauffman stood waist-deep in the waters off Eilat, Israel. His son handed him a sealed envelope his accountant asked him to deliver on this day. He opened it, read what was inside and stood in silence._
__
