name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: Let’s force a vote this year
body:
Sign the petition Chuck Schumer hates
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewrbc7ptdo3p8psqfdsi3p3iln5mfno5edc47cqa5r9w7lv4c7es7k5g0ak5zvjtahpdrr42pxcfyrltt&__stmp=t1994i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Right to Work Committee.
* * *
|
Dear Concerned American,

Below are petitions I've had prepared for you to House Speaker Mike Johnson, Senate Majority Leader John Thune, your Senators, and your Congressman.

It's crucial you sign and return them at once.

You see, President Donald Trump and leaders of both Houses of Congress -- plus a record number of Congressmen and Senators -- are on record in favor of Right to Work.

Without a doubt, this is our best opportunity EVER to advance a National Right to Work law to end forced unionism in America.

A National Right to Work law would ultimately end forced unionism nationwide by removing the sections of federal labor law that give union bosses the power to force workers to pay union dues or "fees" just to get or keep a job.

**[So please sign and return your petitions immediately](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonav3uuced0nkbiulfypat156vzi69gaubxolfu605f65glepu420ndqc27981xpmukn1m11k818idqxvne4i1draz238ezwyienaf39tbcrtki7r9n1h253w89z4ixgv0md932e4701rtir1cku9fi8nuijce1cc8ymu8hik1w1v71u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h).**

You see, the union bosses, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to kill a National Right to Work bill -- and they will try to do it as quietly as possible.

The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress!

They don't want the American people to know that:
---
*** Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs.

This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, provides a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and finances radical causes;
*** Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses.

Big Labor politicians and Biden-stacked bureaucracies have been strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations;
*** Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas.

Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes have all taken their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good; and
*** Billions of forced-dues dollars have been used to bankroll radical, Tax-and-Spend politicians like Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries, resulting in out-of-control spending and skyrocketing taxes.
**[That's why it's vital you sign and return your petitions to demonstrate to Congress and the national media the strong support for Right to Work](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonav3uuced0nkbiulfypat156vzi69gaubxolfu605f65glepu420ndqc27981xpmukn1m11k818idqxvne4i1draz238ezwyienaf39tbcrtki7r9n1h253w89z4ixgv0md932e4701rtir1cku9fi8nuijce1cc8ymu8hik1w1v71u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h).**

Of course, Big Labor allies in Congress may choose to obey the union bosses rather than the majority of their constituents.

That's their choice.

But time and again, when politicians defy the public and vote for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers!

So -- by all means -- let's have another vote and see which politicians want to end their careers in the next election.

**[That's why your signed petitions and financial support are so important](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonav3uuced0nkbiulfypat156vzi69gaubxolfu605f65glepu420ndqc27981xpmukn1m11k818idqxvne4i1draz238ezwyienaf39tbcrtki7r9n1h253w89z4ixgv0md932e4701rtir1cku9fi8nuijce1cc8ymu8hik1w1v71u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h).**

It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law:
*** Run TV, radio, and newspaper ads targeting swing votes in key states and districts;
*** Contact directly by mail and email up to 10 million supporters to urge them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Act;
*** Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, editorial writers, and bloggers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion; and
*** Crank up a massive, multi-faceted digital and social media campaign in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat.
Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive.

An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success.

So, to pay for the expensive ads, mailings, social media, and other efforts, it's vital you send a special contribution to the National Right to Work Committee today.

**[Will you make a generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 to launch the next crucial phase for ultimate passage of a National Right to Work law](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonav3uuced0nkbiulfypat156vzi69gaubxolfu605f65glepu420ndqc27981xpmukn1m11k818idqxvne4i1draz238ezwyienaf39tbcrtki7r9n1h253w89z4ixgv0md932e4701rtir1cku9fi8nuijce1cc8ymu8hik1w1v71u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h)?**

The National Right to Work Committee has successfully beaten back Big Labor's forced-dues machine for decades.

And now it's critical the National Right to Work Committee has your financial support right away to put politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work Act up for a vote.

It would be a crime to let politicians who support compulsory unionism off the hook.

Up against the forced-dues-fed, billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all you and I have on our side is truth and public opinion.

Together with the National Right to Work Committee, you can make the difference.

Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay dues.

So it has to depend on the generosity of folks like you.

Some have already sent $500, $1,000, and even more. For others, a contribution of $50 or $100 has been as much as they could afford.

**[Whatever you can do, sign and return your petitions and include your most generous contribution](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonav3uuced0nkbiulfypat156vzi69gaubxolfu605f65glepu420ndqc27981xpmukn1m11k818idqxvne4i1draz238ezwyienaf39tbcrtki7r9n1h253w89z4ixgv0md932e4701rtir1cku9fi8nuijce1cc8ymu8hik1w1v71u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h).**

Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and Big Labor to destroy the National Right to Work Act.

**[Without your contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25, the National Right to Work Committee won't be able to contact 10 million Americans, place the advertising, or staff phone banks to put Big Labor on the spot](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonav3uuced0nkbiulfypat156vzi69gaubxolfu605f65glepu420ndqc27981xpmukn1m11k818idqxvne4i1draz238ezwyienaf39tbcrtki7r9n1h253w89z4ixgv0md932e4701rtir1cku9fi8nuijce1cc8ymu8hik1w1v71u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h).**

It's vital we force roll-call votes in this Congress.

It's time to put Big Labor on the defensive. Without your help, the union bosses win by default.

Please act today.

U.S. Senator Rand Paul

P.S. Since over 80% of Americans oppose Big Labor's forced-unionism powers, a public debate and vote on a National Right to Work law is Big Labor's (and their water-carriers' in Congress) worst nightmare!

**[So, please sign your petitions to Congress. And along with your signed petitions, please include your most generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 to the National Right to Work Committee today](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=bfmxtlpasonav3uuced0nkbiulfypat156vzi69gaubxolfu605f65glepu420ndqc27981xpmukn1m11k818idqxvne4i1draz238ezwyienaf39tbcrtki7r9n1h253w89z4ixgv0md932e4701rtir1cku9fi8nuijce1cc8ymu8hik1w1v71u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h).**
* * *
**_The National Right to Work Committee is a nonprofit, nonpartisan, single-purpose citizens' organization dedicated to combating compulsory unionism through an aggressive program designed to mobilize public opposition to compulsory unionism and, at the same time, enlist public support for Right to Work legislation. The Committee's mailing address is 8001 Braddock Road, Springfield, Virginia 22160. The Committee can be contacted toll-free at 1-800-325-7892. Its web address is www.nrtwc.org

Not produced or e-mailed at taxpayer expense. To help the National Right to Work Committee grow, please **forward this** to a friend. _ **

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewrbc7ptdo3p8psqfdsi3p3iln5mfno5edc47cqa5r9w7lv4c7es7k5g0ak5zvjtahpdrr42pxcfyrltt&__stmp=t1994i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20axo4r5bv2zusi7ovrcuc9e4vze2d5fy3nksrrgxmwr5cs4kdpf1msjgg56jzhwwjcddtmkvnsvtwfxofgn0vn3yaqdk7m8sijf4q9nsfrtjo1cboy594bd5h15&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfklds7h4drf2hnphdxvepp2cynvmdxey7zx09181sbhdxnvgcvfxzcvctjkmhlr7t9fc1u6j5yu2acr8q26fi32nghl9og4iwcrncgdi58x9jc4c5a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1994i&__onlt=h)

name: Greg Murphy
subject: If they win, America loses.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by friends to elect Dr
body:
A Democrat win means the Democrats’ radical obstructionist agenda will return to Congress. What does that mean for you? | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=da5a9dbe404441b6899fb6e743500487&_e=IR_-PcVHTEm8WSH53jJlrs08EySCSsnS8V8QlLoFEdAwT79R9fckjXNGLka-ZlOLWjYcbp6ghZ2-wglozgmy9G2_5CNY0x5TOLEPTU4ZGuzb5RftwFEvOE8Qrg6jJ80dLDqWqn8sYGhFoFY2K7PfUrAMcA9EuDUsQ-RJ9RVG0InexPnGVxzyyLlviD-ywddyrLXrjGlcCQm-epPacZIc8TEaVw0mns_5wy9A7xzFJybR0vY8S4Yyt0DZXgywnCP6tgju1PaR2oyvJ-NQxAJaLilQdzmE2QkztodKJPb0at0-PlKWwNe56FVJLRQfaUlavZo2nlPU4Kvrb0WT2IrLfCCle5h8QN-pnVbyfI-EwpSXc8EOHnGfEpcUAd1Pcqm9AeZeLxIhNTQ2jeMQz01c4bqELNUS6Q6rcROAYLuy9ciBE19q2jS1uTEZ15VwdH7CYf2nAImhNCjbEKZuN-1jDOHh8dZureqLOfaHQywZyIyBaymKFZ3UpSi1cNBSuin_qKsVM13i0Oga2PS-torqrz_ea-KIPPfcHGasxPPAOe8-1CeRBPa2IylmGhew-kDxXCVXqYDzp7p51Uz8J0lGpmBIrshMXCvXtydMYo7cUuV6WlXj-irtAmnQ0KbAT6sF6YwZHYktfHE20JxmcYz04jkXAE3py2Fv7Bpr2W33bBX2-YwBoFYswQgO4Dy0Fo24bYr1suOK-Q8ZbcnFQtFU0Pf7PDXG-lrWA_pUIlV_AvgvWihYQGYylTrmiHOhyoUyUMPHV6JtrTChF_kkD51FHA%3D%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

_**If Democrats win in 2026, America loses.**_

A Democrat win means the Democrats’ radical obstructionist agenda will return to Congress. What does that mean for you?

➡️ The return of radical gender ideology
➡️ America Last and pro-socialist economic agenda
➡️ The re-weaponization of the Federal Government against Conservatives
➡️ The return of wide-open borders and pro-Amnesty radicalism

This is the only outcome of a Democrat victory, and they’re spending millions and rigging elections across the Country to achieve their vision.

North Carolina and every Republican member of Congress in the state is at the top of their target list -- _**THAT INCLUDES ME!**_

I’m asking **250 patriots** to step up and help me keep this seat out of Democrat hands.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: An update on Trump’s tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Working families are feeling the sting.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1933%2E582294%2EAudH_N)
Manufacturers and working families are feeling the sting of Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs across New Hampshire.
A family-owned stove company is being forced to downsize in Rochester. New Hampshire exporters are getting squeezed at the border. And for everyone else? Costs are skyrocketing — on everything from canned goods to construction materials.
**This is what happens when political stunts take priority over sound economic policy.**
I’ve always believed that New Hampshire’s success depends on supporting our small businesses and protecting working families — not putting them in the crosshairs of a trade war.
That’s why I’ve fought to strengthen manufacturing, invest in workforce development, and make sure our state remains competitive in a global economy.
And it’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate — because we need leaders who understand what’s at stake for our communities.
But I can’t do this without you. [**Can you join this fight with a $5 contribution to my Senate campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250819_1_tariffs?refcode=em20250819-1933&amount=5&refcode2=1933_582294_AudH_N&akid=1933%2E582294%2EAudH_N)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250819_1_tariffs?amount=5&refcode=em20250819-1933&refcode2=1933_582294_AudH_N&akid=1933%2E582294%2EAudH_N)**
Your support is essential to defeating the GOP, ending these harmful policies, and winning this fight for our families, our values, and our future.
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250819-1?t=2&refcode2=1933_582294_AudH_N&akid=1933%2E582294%2EAudH_N)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1933%2E582294%2EAudH_N)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1933%2E582294%2EAudH_N)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1933%2E582294%2EAudH_N)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Jason Crow
subject: Democracy isn’t inevitable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Donald Trump didn’t just meet with Vladimir Putin. He literally had American soldiers rolling out the red carpet for him.

Yet again, we watched as the President of the United States bowed down to a murderous dictator who continues to murder civilians and kidnap children.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025]

Instead of military fly-overs and red carpets, the President should be applying real pressure to Putin to end his aggression against Ukraine. The President’s summit is a historic embarrassment for the U.S. and our foreign policy.

Democracy isn’t inevitable.

I learned this when I served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, and this truth continues to play out in front of us today. It takes dedication and bravery to defeat authoritarian forces — especially when they’re at your doorstep.

We all have a part to play in defeating authoritarianism at home and abroad, and that includes standing up for our democratic allies in Ukraine.

I am devoted to ensuring that America’s foreign policy is focused on promoting real peace, democracy, and keeping Americans safe. If you’re with me, can you chip in to support my work in Congress today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=10&express_lane=true]

Jason

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Sharing my story
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Aphasia may make it harder for me to speak, but I have not lost my voice.
#

Friends --
Fourteen years ago, a gunman shot me in the head while I was meeting with constituents in front of a grocery store in Tucson.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250819-1-b&t=1&akid=10796%2E3935704%2E6MMeb3)
Because of the damage the bullet caused to the left hemisphere of my brain, where the language function sits, I have aphasia. This means that even though the words are in my head, I have a hard time getting them out.
**Aphasia may make it harder for me to speak. But I have not lost my voice.**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250819-1-b&t=2&akid=10796%2E3935704%2E6MMeb3)
The road to recovery hasn’t been easy for me, but I’ve never given up. In addition to speech therapy and physical therapy, I dedicate much of my time to riding my bike, playing my French horn, and practicing yoga. These activities have helped me so much in my recovery journey.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250819-1-b&t=3&akid=10796%2E3935704%2E6MMeb3)
I know sometimes the challenge of ending gun violence in our nation can feel overwhelming. When we see the headlines after a mass shooting -- or when we remember the countless tragedies that don’t make the news every day -- I know how hard it can be.
But friends, we can’t give up. I have found my recovery journey and the fight to end gun violence to be very similar.**Even on the hardest days, we can never lose hope.**
We are officially at the halfway point of the quarter. Our FEC fundraising deadlines are a critical test for the gun safety movement, as both our adversaries and our allies will be looking to see if we have the resources to take on the gun lobby and elect gun safety champions.
So this is where I need to ask for your help:
[**Will you make your first contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? We can’t reach our quarterly fundraising goals without your help.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250819-1-b&t=4&akid=10796%2E3935704%2E6MMeb3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-aug25.8KHFUP&refcode=em250819-1-b&t=24&akid=10796%2E3935704%2E6MMeb3)**
---
****

---

| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-aug25.DZaPyu&refcode=em250819-1-b&t=26&akid=10796%2E3935704%2E6MMeb3)**
---

| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-aug25.Yj6wVz&refcode=em250819-1-b&t=27&akid=10796%2E3935704%2E6MMeb3)**

Thank you for all that you do in this fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I'm proud to support John Hickenlooper
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
John has been a champion for gun safety, leading efforts to keep America safe and spearheading lifesaving policy changes after some of Colorado’s worst tragedies.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113615523/564369744/1506335976?refcode=email_081925_giffords&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhmYzcxMi0zMjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QPx6PCU7kcpprNvslv9anrrQys6Fg2dczOrsMzTWOs=) Friend, it's Gabby Giffords. In 2011, my life changed forever when I survived a mass shooting at a constituent event in my hometown. I decided to turn my pain into purpose by becoming a national gun safety advocate, and I've never looked back. **But today, I'm not writing to talk about myself. I'm here to tell you about my friend, John Hickenlooper.** **John has been a champion for gun safety his whole career, leading efforts to keep Americans safe and spearheading lifesaving policy changes after some of Colorado’s worst tragedies.** And he’s the kind of leader we can count on to keep up the fight to close dangerous ghost gun loopholes and hold gun traffickers accountable. Coloradans need a champion like John Hickenlooper as their Senator. John realizes the heartbreak gun violence causes everywhere, wherever it strikes, and he’ll never stop working to put an end to it once and for all. **His continued leadership will be critical for our next victories in Colorado and nationwide to prevent future tragedies.** **That’s why I am proud to support John Hickenlooper, who has the courage to fight to end gun violence.** **[John has always focused on keeping Colorado communities safe, and he’ll keep taking on the big fights to protect Colorado and save lives. But first, he needs to hold Colorado’s seat in the Senate, which has a habit of flipping one way, then the next. Please, can you join me in supporting his campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113615524/564369745/1506335976?refcode=email_081925_giffords&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhmYzcxMi0zMjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QPx6PCU7kcpprNvslv9anrrQys6Fg2dczOrsMzTWOs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113615525/564369746/1506335976?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_081925_giffords&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhmYzcxMi0zMjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QPx6PCU7kcpprNvslv9anrrQys6Fg2dczOrsMzTWOs=)

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]
Peter,
I wanted to reach out today to say one thing. Thank you. With your help, we hit our mid-August goal and got back on track.
From the start of this campaign, you’ve shown up when it mattered. Fundraising has been a little rocky lately, but if we keep up the momentum, I’m confident we’ll go the distance.
Thank you for believing in me and supporting the fight to lower prescription drug costs and make health care affordable for everyone. Coloradans are tired of the status quo. And together, we’re going to change it.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]
Thank you,
Yadira
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail]
Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@caraveoforcongress.com to your address book.
This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. You can click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ycfcemail] to make a donation to support Yadira Caraveo for CO-08. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: 🚨🚨🚨Trump sends federal troops into a sovereign U.S. city
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=081925_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-stoptrump?refcode=081925_2]
🚨🚨🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨🚨🚨
Donald Trump just announced he is deploying the National Guard and taking control of the capital city’s police force.
This is not a drill.
Donald Trump has just ordered federal troops into the streets of our capital city — and seized control of its police force — all over a LIE about crime.
He has crossed the line from dangerous rhetoric to outright authoritarian rule.
This is exactly how democracies die:
* A leader invents a crisis
* Deploys armed forces against his own people
* Seizes control of local law enforcement
If we don’t fight back now, there may be no going back.
We have a limited amount of time show Trump and his enablers that the American people will not stand by while he uses the military to intimidate and control a sovereign city. Every second we wait, this power grab becomes the “new normal.” Rush $10 now so we can help Democrats launch emergency ads, mobilize rapid response teams, and protect our democracy from Trump’s escalating authoritarianism. name: Heidi Hall
subject: What California redistricting means for us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend, it's Heidi Hall.
Before I ask you to support our campaign, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG] I have some big news to share.
The proposed map redistricting CA-03 could change things for our race to defeat MAGA extremist Kevin Kiley—he's scared!
Since day 1, Kevin Kiley made his career 1️⃣ saying one thing, 2️⃣ doing another, and then 3️⃣ blaming Gavin Newsom. Believe it or not, he's doing a heck of a lot more of that now because he's scared about his plans to climb the political ladder while ignoring his voters.
I approach things differently: friend, I won a tough seat in Nevada County because I listened to the needs of my community and fought for the people who've been ignored by ambitious politicians like Kevin Kiley.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
While this new map ⬆️ could be a big deal for our campaign... it doesn't change what I'm saying to people.
I am and always have been in this race because I want to 1️⃣ make a positive impact on our communities, 2️⃣ protect our environment, and 3️⃣ support working families. Kevin acts like a rubber stamp to Donald Trump to further his political career while ignoring voters. We deserve better.
Friend, no matter what, we still have a lot of campaigning to do, and Kevin Kiley won't go down without a fight.
Your support matters so much to our campaign, and we can't do this without you. So please, if you can, donate to our campaign so that we can flip this seat and elect a proven leader to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
In solidarity,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250819_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Reader,I'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column. In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - **and there are many.** Our nation has lost its way. Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ → ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=15256e55f6f748bfbe06de944847269f&_e=eoGitn-2dI3f2BNwn7hLOZX60He52cztTfAsBCHdbfAGtXot9O_rAIvi6r0fikAh5TJ8zxjPWE_aKMoDhgwgYTVVUT4CeKiKr27yA048mD16d7f28E7N1otIZ9_iirDruvJLzCVrhJD4kC93vOttGB7C_D7QFtvHV0YY0AXnGRJ81xcGsTZ9OCARcZGbH20tEJewjpIhrgPhPizUq1RIr4uz5ZDWUj32sCaFidd7vyL97qRoQ3FlUb4yqmnj23ESSetokN12JMuL5wLopi9nHRY-4vhmXtQTH7lWy2IUwSOpLweGwfjpRmer2OR3m58gWCs1H34EfBe4t40FBmzJ0IjDfIcSX3qTVvxBwCC2Tj94PK5rbToUW-9ybBt6dSbDL8s_kYUcrLgUdWGdYqhaMfStC_-x8FcxiRxL4IQlX_zg9_qzeIDRz5G0Akyi4t5_75MGgEkTix9iiukLal23szyL4kGUFLb2wGvS6byggs05znVTzb65JWKkNG1iCeQgglMwAYNU90i6hE3x_LfwEehNvmPgdFDRjIBpDygRXcKQSXwNqjVU38Ua_ByZYwP5EE5s1A_P78dQTN6vYRubSfL2XkflOx2JTuhXLq-reIY%3D)
---
| | But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, **I 've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.**It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years. It's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values. It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens. Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.**To win, we need you to join us.** To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America. Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.
---

clean_body: To win, we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH | | Reader,I'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column. In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - and there are many. Our nation has lost its way. Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead. | | | | But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, I 've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years. It's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values. It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens. Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.To win, we need you to join us. To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America. Membership starts at just 1 cent per day. | | | | You'll have access to my commentary, alongside some of the sharpest editorial minds in the country.Don 't wait - join today! | | | | | Newt Gingrich Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States ****. ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\})

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113616365/564373339/1362877131?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjNjNzIxOS0zNzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VwudnkB2QjqDzMZXHKVjhhD_4qY7UZbbWH9VVsrPY0w=) Friend, Tomorrow, I’ll be sitting down with Governor Gretchen Whitmer for a conversation with families here in Grand Blanc. If you didn’t know, I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan's children – from leading Michigan Head Start to serving at the Michigan Department of Education and The Skillman Foundation to make childcare more affordable and improve outcomes for kids.
**I’ve seen firsthand the challenges our families face, and let me be clear: the status quo isn’t working.**
Childcare costs are rising. Teachers are overworked. Back to school supply costs are skyrocketing because of tariffs. And too many families are being forced to patch together solutions that don’t really work – because the real investments and support they need just aren’t there.
Meanwhile, Republicans in Congress just gutted Medicaid and SNAP by a trillion dollars. And the administration is actively dismantling the Department of Education – putting public schools, teachers, and student support services at risk. All in order to give the richest among us another tax cut.
It’s the same story over and over again: working families pay the price, while the wealthiest reap the rewards.
[**We have a chance to flip the House and put a check on this administration, but that will only happen if we hold the line in races like this one. Republicans have already made MI-08 a top target, and we need grassroots support to stay competitive. name: Tobias Read
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250819em-ob2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250819em-ob2]
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously.
As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.
So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done.
There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in.
However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.
So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250819em-ob2]

Portland, OR 97242

However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues. So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [] ANSWER NOW >> [] Thank you, Tobias Read Oregon Secretary of State P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [?] CONTRIBUTE [] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: Postcard from the Illinois State Fair 🌽
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618161/564379047/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNmZWI0YS0zYjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3rwGCAbVl9KH69_BK6U_uBQbhsFYAUL64oNxu8JOv8=)
This is one of the highlights of the summer:

The Illinois State Fair just wrapped up this year’s events. Thousands of Illinoisans came to Springfield to enjoy ten days of fun – from entertainment, to fairground rides, and the famous cow constructed from 500 pounds of butter!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618163/564379051/-550958566?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNmZWI0YS0zYjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3rwGCAbVl9KH69_BK6U_uBQbhsFYAUL64oNxu8JOv8=)
_I had a blast walking in the Twilight Parade to kick off the festivities._
I may be biased, but our state fair is the best in the country. It’s a showcase of Illinois’ world-class agriculture and innovation that moves us forward.

But the reality is that right now, our local farmers are struggling to make ends meet. This administration is putting billionaires first while those who put our food on the table are left behind.

I’m fired up to return to Washington and advocate for our farmers and all working families in Central and Southern Illinois. **[If you’re with me, $3 or any amount will keep me in Congress fighting for IL-13.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618165/564379052/-550958566?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzNmZWI0YS0zYjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3rwGCAbVl9KH69_BK6U_uBQbhsFYAUL64oNxu8JOv8=)**

Thank you,

Nikki

name: Derek Tran
subject: Stand with me: Defend mail-in voting
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618069/564378942/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIzZmViNGEtM2I3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NNW0bqR1FOKvddt1WxlDTurmicCLCNEEkUp7-2cGjxI=)
**Donald Trump just announced he wants to eliminate mail-in voting before next year’s midterm elections, and he’s pledging to sign an executive order to do it.** That’s not just extreme. It’s dangerous. Here in California, registered voters rely on voting by mail to make their voices heard. In communities like mine, where voters speak multiple languages and work long hours, mail-in voting isn’t a luxury – it’s essential. Trump knows that. That’s why he’s trying to take it away and boost the chances of Republicans maintaining power in the House. **[Will you add your name to condemn Trump’s plan and protect mail-in voting for Californians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618073/564378945/1172394811?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIzZmViNGEtM2I3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NNW0bqR1FOKvddt1WxlDTurmicCLCNEEkUp7-2cGjxI=&emci=0da19f43-3b7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=523feb4a-3b7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=27336212)**
| **[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618078/564378951/1172394811?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIzZmViNGEtM2I3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NNW0bqR1FOKvddt1WxlDTurmicCLCNEEkUp7-2cGjxI=&emci=0da19f43-3b7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=523feb4a-3b7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=27336212)**
---
This fight is personal to me. I’ve seen firsthand how voting by mail empowers families like mine – Vietnamese refugees who believed in the promise of American democracy. **Silencing those voices is un-American.**
We can’t let Trump and his allies rip up the rules to win. That’s why I’m speaking out, and why I’m asking you to join me.
**[Add your name right now to say loud and clear: We won’t let them take our ballots away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618082/564378955/1172394811?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIzZmViNGEtM2I3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NNW0bqR1FOKvddt1WxlDTurmicCLCNEEkUp7-2cGjxI=&emci=0da19f43-3b7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=523feb4a-3b7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=27336212)**

clean_body: | = Donald Trump just announced he wants to eliminate mail-in voting before next year’s midterm elections, and he’s pledging to sign an executive order to do it. That’s not just extreme. It’s dangerous. Here in California, registered voters rely on voting by mail to make their voices heard. In communities like mine, where voters speak multiple languages and work long hours, mail-in voting isn’t a luxury – it’s essential. Trump knows that. That’s why he’s trying to take it away and boost the chances of Republicans maintaining power in the House. | This fight is personal to me. I’ve seen firsthand how voting by mail empowers families like mine – Vietnamese refugees who believed in the promise of American democracy. Silencing those voices is un-American. We can’t let Trump and his allies rip up the rules to win. That’s why I’m speaking out, and why I’m asking you to join me. Thank you for taking action, Derek = | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. Do you support Trump's crime crackdown? | | | My friend, In just the last two years, Members of Congress and our staff have been victims of:
* **Murders**
* **Robberies****
* **Assaults****
* **Carjackings****

That’s why President Trump has stepped in – taking over the DC Police and deploying the National Guard – after years of left-wing, soft-on-crime politicians running D.C. into the ground. It’s the same failed, dangerous agenda that allows millions to illegally cross our southern border and flood our communities with drugs, gangs, and violent criminals. I **stand with President Trump** in saying _enough is enough_.
---
| | **DO YOU SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP’S****CRIME CRACKDOWN?**

clean_body: I’m investigating the Deep State for this reason: Friend, The amount of bloat and waste corrupting every level of our federal government is absolutely disgusting! Did you know AT LEAST 400 government agencies exist today? And I promise you, most of them are just wasting your hard-earned tax dollars. I came to Washington to SLASH regulations and bureaucracy, call a spade a spade, and make our federal government work for the people, not the Deep State. I proudly serve as Chairman of the Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations in the Senate. I won 't back down until we rip the mask off and reveal: ✔️ The real story behind COVID-19 and the lies they fed the American people ✔️ The billions in taxpayer dollars wasted, misused or funneled to Democrat cronies ✔️ The special interests and lobbyists who have hijacked government agencies at YOUR expense ✔️ And so much more... ********** ******** ******** ******** ******** My mission is clear: take down the Deep State once and for all, and The American people deserve answers. We’d like to thank everyone who took the time to respond to last week’s survey.

Peter,

First of all, we’d like to thank everyone who took the time to respond to last week’s survey. After reading your responses, we wanted to share the key takeaways with you.
When we asked which of the threats posed by the Trump administration Democrats should prioritize, **you said to focus on protecting voting rights and our free and fair elections.** Many respondents also pointed to Trump’s corruption and abuse of power, threats to Social Security and Medicare, and the spread of disinformation and extremism.
You also shared how Democrats should fight back. **Many urged us to pass state-level protections to counter harmful federal policies.** Others told us to fight for fair redistricting, challenge gerrymandering in court, use social media and other methods to reach young people, and embrace policies that unite and inspire people.
Finally, we asked what worries you most — and what makes you feel optimistic about the future. Many respondents expressed concern about the persistence of extremism, disinformation, and the erosion of democratic norms. **But you also emphasized things that give you hope, including the persistence of grassroots organizing, mass mobilization, and the energy of young voters.**
We have a lot of work to do, but your responses made it clear that you’re ready to fight back alongside Governor Walz.
[**If you’re able, please consider making a contribution today. Every donation, no matter the size, will help us take on Trump’s destructive agenda and defend our shared values.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618437/564379993/1768818755?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDk5YTQ0Zi0zYzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eDskFHdoF1WTe-q6WQh6anWcpODOwbl25itqPgBSR9U=)

clean_body: We’d like to thank everyone who took the time to respond to last week’s survey. | = Peter, First of all, we’d like to thank everyone who took the time to respond to last week’s survey. After reading your responses, we wanted to share the key takeaways with you. When we asked which of the threats posed by the Trump administration Democrats should prioritize, you said to focus on protecting voting rights and our free and fair elections. Many respondents also pointed to Trump’s corruption and abuse of power, threats to Social Security and Medicare, and the spread of disinformation and extremism. You also shared how Democrats should fight back. Many urged us to pass state-level protections to counter harmful federal policies. Others told us to fight for fair redistricting, challenge gerrymandering in court, use social media and other methods to reach young people, and embrace policies that unite and inspire people. Finally, we asked what worries you most — and what makes you feel optimistic about the future. Many respondents expressed concern about the persistence of extremism, disinformation, and the erosion of democratic norms. But you also emphasized things that give you hope, including the persistence of grassroots organizing, mass mobilization, and the energy of young voters. We have a lot of work to do, but your responses made it clear that you’re ready to fight back alongside Governor Walz. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Walz ********=******

body:
I’m running to defend democracy
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618753/564381232/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzNjJlYi0zZDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBZgdLIGdHKPdkLDcHwUK4SnA787Y_5NiFzAfo-_JQs=)
Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman, Robert Garcia.
We're all seeing the news: Democracy is under attack.
Donald Trump and Texas MAGA extremists are using redistricting in Texas to rig the next midterm elections. But here in California, we’re fighting back. If Texas is going to punch, California will punch harder.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618756/564381235/789508428?refcode=250819_RG_newdistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzNjJlYi0zZDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBZgdLIGdHKPdkLDcHwUK4SnA787Y_5NiFzAfo-_JQs=)
We just learned about California’s new map – and I have big news: If passed, I’ll be running in the new 42nd District.
This district includes my hometown of Long Beach and stretches along the coast through Huntington Beach and Newport Beach.
**But I’ll be honest: this is a much tougher district.** In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. _Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618758/564381238/789508428?refcode=250819_RG_newdistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzNjJlYi0zZDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBZgdLIGdHKPdkLDcHwUK4SnA787Y_5NiFzAfo-_JQs=)
I love my current congressional district, but I understand the stakes. Democracy is on the line.
**So I’m ready to fight and run in this new, harder district. But I’m going to become a top target for national Republicans. They’re going to spend millions and pull out all the stops to try and defeat me – to silence _us._ **
Here’s what they don’t know: this amazing grassroots team is ready to fight back. Because that’s what this moment calls for: speaking out, getting involved, and fighting for a democracy that represents _all of us._
**[Can you rush a grassroots donation today to help me kick off my campaign in this new, tougher district – and to help Democrats flip the House, end Trump’s power grab, and defend our sacred democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618759/564381239/789508428?refcode=250819_RG_newdistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzNjJlYi0zZDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBZgdLIGdHKPdkLDcHwUK4SnA787Y_5NiFzAfo-_JQs=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618760/564381241/-309737922?refcode=250819_RG_newdistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzNjJlYi0zZDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBZgdLIGdHKPdkLDcHwUK4SnA787Y_5NiFzAfo-_JQs=)
Thanks for being by my side. I'm ready to fight — let's get to work!
Robert
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618762/564381242/-309737922?refcode=250819_RG_newdistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzNjJlYi0zZDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBZgdLIGdHKPdkLDcHwUK4SnA787Y_5NiFzAfo-_JQs=)

name: Team Bynum
subject: College athletes deserve to earn their fair share
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
For too long college athletes have generated huge value for their schools without being able to share in the success they create.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618763/564381247/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFjZTgwZjEtM2Q3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YMoc-IIsY0CuGd5hOQIqDAJyw4-Qx1mzVj_4GB4wD2I=) **ADD YOUR NAME:[Support Janelle Bynum and her fight to protect and preserve college athletics →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618764/564381248/1049824174?refcode=email_081925_NIL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFjZTgwZjEtM2Q3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YMoc-IIsY0CuGd5hOQIqDAJyw4-Qx1mzVj_4GB4wD2I=&emci=70d73bd1-047d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=dace80f1-3d7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=14434323)**
* * *
As a mom of a D1 football player, Janelle knows how important it is to let students earn their fair share and protect their access to a complete and quality education. **That’s why she’s proud to be leading the charge to pass the College SPORTS Act.** This landmark bipartisan legislation will establish national standards for how college athletes can earn compensation from their name, image, and likeness. It will also strengthen academic, health, and financial protections for collegiate athletics. Our student athletes deserve to benefit off the revenue they generate for schools — and Janelle Bynum is fighting to pass these protections for them. **[She’s calling on Congress to pass the College SPORTS Act to deliver real fairness for our college athletes, and she needs your support. Please, add your name today to help Janelle Bynum fight to protect student athletes →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618765/564381249/1049824174?refcode=email_081925_NIL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFjZTgwZjEtM2Q3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YMoc-IIsY0CuGd5hOQIqDAJyw4-Qx1mzVj_4GB4wD2I=&emci=70d73bd1-047d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=dace80f1-3d7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=14434323)** | | [Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113618766/564381250/1049824174?refcode=email_081925_NIL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFjZTgwZjEtM2Q3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YMoc-IIsY0CuGd5hOQIqDAJyw4-Qx1mzVj_4GB4wD2I=&emci=70d73bd1-047d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=dace80f1-3d7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=14434323)

clean_body: For too long college athletes have generated huge value for their schools without being able to share in the success they create. = ADD YOUR NAME: As a mom of a D1 football player, Janelle knows how important it is to let students earn their fair share and protect their access to a complete and quality education. That’s why she’s proud to be leading the charge to pass the College SPORTS Act. This landmark bipartisan legislation will establish national standards for how college athletes can earn compensation from their name, image, and likeness. It will also strengthen academic, health, and financial protections for collegiate athletics. Our student athletes deserve to benefit off the revenue they generate for schools — and Janelle Bynum is fighting to pass these protections for them. ** | | Thank you, Team Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. Hi null, it’s Haley – checking in from the trail of my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I already had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation is reminding me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my August Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4820?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=636%2E49239%2EQKrVnb)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4820?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=636%2E49239%2EQKrVnb)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 38 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4820?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=636%2E49239%2EQKrVnb)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4821?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=636%2E49239%2EQKrVnb) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4819?t=8&akid=636%2E49239%2EQKrVnb)

Thank you,
Haley

Fellow Conservative,

**I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot.**

**Will you[chip in just $1](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=da4a6c2bbf834e77aaee439877d1543d&_e=D_f2ui70x9QB_AdPdLfUIXFU4IEEnri-0BE5dKE72agTV6TpIKT7j4-FJtWxg9VfqSdTGmucsTfM-wQoueCfTPnYYQJKlUkKKPrjmdJCeKUTjsEP6NxvwmtuXkXZ8QKozPzbbMiC-q3RA10lFv36SozV40pxKowBLCiSJKWj9UC04ZvxkRI1YIa-5NMQTRK9YTAtMM2XIe2t9kpyRaHyZefK3AFoVly3LLuO-76kQaC-7lM3JFRdLgC8OYzw222RwSZjbwooVJ85dl4VW83mqihY-GQxbWLWBlh_fjPFCGP9eq4ytZ3PEpspCB45H2juwiSZ6LR7i9FYH7HvwLndN5jWLfgUywu1FTDJ0bjaNI7Wr9VyG5izdCG3KHReP6f0E-sQJIEM9y21IiB9VTGF0hnX_jK7MUfCVvcnzXl5Bcm2LiPsuoK2ePMwIJ8iLLPAxZ2apNxQmn1L82QeRdoLb9W-0J2qKAC4rhnyGLv02T1zSyszC07NPNOgepemkPWbbxM2n0Ce6Y1nD5_X2YfVCQT5M2M9IvYJkLV8Rtu03qEwwscGf7kYr2pW5yqLe-2nbUgIQwAuYKK2VyU2tvWWLtaU5iqAQKEm5oArxAjq4IN9vtS2fBExmamcJzoJdk3jPvGCkEyHL6iULrEmwprLdMfbCdyCLrJ95q3W_zwJc6lp-gpfKNeTf4_Af1ovRcJ-MSaNyKAJU-1eeW1rzVbjSz_hqGHSZJbbAfs62beCqIk13dvQQpWBHOPXwr9DEJWxk05IzlI2kdUnPyJ3HGfd3kOmlF_9HOJBn9nqqmvHhsaqLdB7AoFZFlU2tKgJb97JfwEj-ewEnkhrpUbGtxdRS0H-mx7ti-u2ofqid3Trqi2WK_K7agb-yXrdSpzAYdn_LYIrLYu0JiF3T_MmB4CwtM7QXAJQmaIbRGC0AelE6k4%3D) today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate?
**
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — **[I’m asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=da4a6c2bbf834e77aaee439877d1543d&_e=D_f2ui70x9QB_AdPdLfUIXFU4IEEnri-0BE5dKE72agTV6TpIKT7j4-FJtWxg9VfqSdTGmucsTfM-wQoueCfTPnYYQJKlUkKKPrjmdJCeKUTjsEP6NxvwmtuXkXZ8QKozPzbbMiC-q3RA10lFv36SozV40pxKowBLCiSJKWj9UC04ZvxkRI1YIa-5NMQTRK9YTAtMM2XIe2t9kpyRaHyZefK3AFoVly3LLuO-76kQaC-7lM3JFRdLgC8OYzw222RwSZjbwooVJ85dl4VW83mqihY-GQxbWLWBlh_fjPFCGP9eq4ytZ3PEpspCB45H2juwiSZ6LR7i9FYH7HvwLndN5jWLfgUywu1FTDJ0bjaNI7W7DKwBXj3pjhYHjFzMyQDBM4R7fM_tSqWbatOZ-sXe20hWadcvOgBWyd3U9FwG--4ZhGu15DUtmrQL175Yz7xCw_Lf2a2xeaVJx0skA3LuEingReZCHcR8LPTTXYhXX9S97bt81FwFNgUJpw3__gtnpH1UvGsyuqPnBa6UgIcgmHXkkdnewHM7opOr-k3mIb0D3VfB6BlQT_DwajMBYQ5CjaopeLJXoEBPKifQEWpG1mRgvJHNKwkL8If0V-5xNbxcIwana05Rr9HTFAKgIOT_L_RACAhaMQGYsYmWQ6rkCvhMsz9_2QthOuxp67zzmJvYUhycxtH214hBhFBTFsjx4aMXjgY41TIzFZywK_pFFNvYnfvGJ9KxmFPofMyd1E0GOH7RpXobUaJlxqMTarBeWeiKv7hcpDipVH6-7kcIbKN1wNnnmXmQoQacAXA1v86pWtRUhlJga1dkCpBgEQLmPMM8Cu0x3Y8hyulS6F-HMc5oOuEGfnPs64CMSDZBtaQqvIWMkf_RRDIiYqc2v0MbOQil41Ypp1VFV_Lwkwq2oyglE_K1njZXBqAXbE03AM%3D) **

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because i**t locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

[**CHIP IN $1 NOW**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=da4a6c2bbf834e77aaee439877d1543d&_e=D_f2ui70x9QB_AdPdLfUIXFU4IEEnri-0BE5dKE72agTV6TpIKT7j4-FJtWxg9VfqSdTGmucsTfM-wQoueCfTPnYYQJKlUkKKPrjmdJCeKUTjsEP6NxvwmtuXkXZ8QKozPzbbMiC-q3RA10lFv36SozV40pxKowBLCiSJKWj9UC04ZvxkRI1YIa-5NMQTRK9YTAtMM2XIe2t9kpyRaHyZefK3AFoVly3LLuO-76kQaC-7lM3JFRdLgC8OYzw222RwSZjbwooVJ85dl4VW83mqihY-GQxbWLWBlh_fjPFCGP9eq4ytZ3PEpspCB45H2juwiSZ6LR7i9FYH7HvwLndN5jWLfgUywu1FTDJ0bjaNI6pjQV-bkzdg-ro5DHYUu16RQH65SemJGRY_z05oOj_vJQq9FZoNpBZ1vG2q27ulmF3VaYbAkBMDIncF2mA0Qc7eryoAscWdgw3LqgC64g0btEdYXJmISILd37pD9EeoRxIR-ZPWYVHein_vo4XjrzqGfRaLbs3E0dlGRXOi4IjKI1uDL41Hh0-Rbp6ytLgTxbkEZoa_jdgP7_UikGfkNEsMG-vtfaqGm_J0n-jGIjNrPToane1Ux0DUWeQwbwxpCl1jAe_jnwVaVG9NEJ8B-Uapk4naD6of5Btwsyvyjziq5WAREynBJeVZg5XUHM7qXNXx1IuRBkbl8ie3zvMPppW9S-BdG0ACerid6tA71gQoJLxinqDOkP6BU1x9FgvSGAaceBH9WPc350Khvi8g41reGXuvOXXgELIaFFC1K4EMUqa3OsYqMAeN8YSuoXViLxOzzbds9ywCJ6CWpH5x6Z7v0TagYdUI2U7xwESyuaCY1fqINRfEnzOkUIJFSeifsyjjhZPRhfFf9P0AhJKrqfiam_oUfJ_7bsx_IR0zzhWaQ8vXM55EYnuSzoaVfx4RUo%3D)

Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you.

When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: **we’re still in this fight.
**
You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — **[even if it’s just for $1.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=da4a6c2bbf834e77aaee439877d1543d&_e=D_f2ui70x9QB_AdPdLfUIXFU4IEEnri-0BE5dKE72agTV6TpIKT7j4-FJtWxg9VfqSdTGmucsTfM-wQoueCfTPnYYQJKlUkKKPrjmdJCeKUTjsEP6NxvwmtuXkXZ8QKozPzbbMiC-q3RA10lFv36SozV40pxKowBLCiSJKWj9UC04ZvxkRI1YIa-5NMQTRK9YTAtMM2XIe2t9kpyRaHyZefK3AFoVly3LLuO-76kQaC-7lM3JFRdLgC8OYzw222RwSZjbwooVJ85dl4VW83mqihY-GQxbWLWBlh_fjPFCGP9eq4ytZ3PEpspCB45H2juwiSZ6LR7i9FYH7HvwLndN5jWLfgUywu1FTDJ0bjaNI6q6OFQN0OW_u9x4_vceV4GmQr-7w4Fd625pyuqOXKD26Z6eBK7t3g1gPN4hVNBWwV30EH8Kk5v4_CqRwuK6YMN7FrZVCNQYNOcFhcjGnor3ockVUZQsJRoKuo8MOPcXhB3lxZHu79CG9E4Z7hdf2tUwDnbRnqrsso6ewhQTNI2evnyJ2-RSHDxkro0GvAbJlzhWHH-n9GFl55n5MqGNS71du1t8poSFn-OnUPofWUH8rBnKy5g4Ofd8DahKQ099DjZkuqytp7_Ywx6lgdSPTFYtHQV7fEuBWCCjFfSATBMByHGNh5o3qRN8EdO4WX_WTlLCGuuttc2264UeJQQpBKf0PEnTs1ERhCYlmFuj5PV7T4LX70JPF7Iucn9Uk5fJhBru4kdrnYztQNDbfU1Q8dPQFWPY9wdolOdr9hIdEUTAvIQEUk0hhPr5Op2ut6VFWGXPTmBUgCDpUVH8Lgfdd2UX1fNBUDQXiQh9WgaBZ9Butx7Ai4jbdRKaVSdtTGZMcXALtHsxIlTM1Okf4qH6o-HQedIC91MEiW4m3OA9K0WL5JKj_wcBcDMbBz6RVyRr3M%3D) **

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Help Shift Consciousness and Shape Discourse Through Public Art
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
Peter, we have an exciting opportunity to participate in a project that champions the foundational principles of our democracy right in the heart of Washington, D.C.! In collaboration with renowned political artist and Army veteran Essam Attia, we want to transform a prominent wall in a busy commercial district in Washington DC, into a powerful monument celebrating the people’s power in our democracy. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvHQt2jsHMPkLo3mII2nqxTqW3y3dOiba4_63CV9nrMVTANjqPB8CJkyygTWjXGGUKkrwc4_QyoVf1bUv-L3tgUHT0mo51twi9BfyfrdryM1-tk4S6v1EjU_AVGDf_-4zbpqO2H6MnrkXi-N9DGsXZ-n9u0Dk75f2ZEzOcXAFW_9sy2FLSK_y-NQmoBGIragCGVnZmc1uTQ9IGv3Eff3BtxaUEi7i-NaIg8IMzXevpsUkVKTW_Ucwc8Fegsct5LJy1IzF2kwnH_9MKmLZoaO9bjpzvXqMAE1Dyoo8TMOPKKpLGIV5aYOj3aowsLio55pTeXBoAdcPhr3lOcWzS7vkgLiJyChO8yFeVQvExCuE9CUye4noFsiAft7CmCdMF4trQ/4j6/H1OHT1r7QfiwYDYnxtotNA/h0/h001.X6s4ugej1izif9LvpFp-OeQX6sA-D9ynpzRYZxGJrZc)_Existing Mural (left) Essam Attia’s conceptual mock-up (right)_ _This initiative is more than just art; it's a visual reminder of the timeless call from our forefathers and foremothers to uphold democratic values and FIGHT for what we love.
_
The mural will replace an existing artwork in the LeDroit Park Historic District, and FDR’s poignant words: “The ultimate rulers of our democracy... are the voters of this country" will be prominently featured near the convergence of U St. and Florida Ave. NW, one of the city's busiest thoroughfares.
**
Through this artwork, we aim to reclaim local power and remind everyone that meaningful change begins at the grassroots level—within school boards, city councils, and through local organizing.
**
[**We’re raising funds for materials, labor, and to get through the permitting process. Please pitch in to help us bring this mural and message to life!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvHQt2jsHMPkLo3mII2nqxTqW3y3dOiba4_63CV9nrMVTmWDGL1EWuFHFjeJfB5hbLPvU6gT66aQNzt_gtONuiGJ8-kdeUkoSGLqmpE51GFOScz6VCO7LwWuSusH9YPSxs5G7I3sKM9MKrL3kiplzJiCN_F8WhP7qAAaz8W6tu4RvP77TOSglKlHUwjpgytvG0M6JhLtVV4kuFEstPD_HTlx-C-nu3WpMCblhldQlKTcd-1C3tUx3R--IqFcOvuv0_zVEwtJwlp6sdylfKuROeny1qspRx7_UusVRVjaxG3J39CC6BYY__a2p3makKCU19BbDNCxlkK5uBwjPzhAqrZvSoBVNZunB41MxDw-67aSIcisLBiChRK4MbvDLVWNP8/4j6/H1OHT1r7QfiwYDYnxtotNA/h1/h001.phM43ms0FYM69TKmpfPTgCnxFs7UI2E0YoSSyW-EPjg)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, we have an exciting opportunity to participate in a project that champions the foundational principles of our democracy right in the heart of Washington, D.C.! In collaboration with renowned political artist and Army veteran Essam Attia, we want to transform a prominent wall in a busy commercial district in Washington DC, into a powerful monument celebrating the people’s power in our democracy. Mural (left) Essam Attia’s conceptual mock-up (right) This initiative is more than just art; it's a visual reminder of the timeless call from our forefathers and foremothers to uphold democratic values and FIGHT for what we love. The mural will replace an existing artwork in the LeDroit Park Historic District, and FDR’s poignant words: “The ultimate rulers of our democracy... are the voters of this country" will be prominently featured near the convergence of U St. and Florida Ave. NW, one of the city's busiest thoroughfares. Through this artwork, we aim to reclaim local power and remind everyone that meaningful change begins at the grassroots level—within school boards, city councils, and through local organizing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Supported by the Local Democracy Project, this large-scale installation blends civic action with creative resistance. It is designed to ignite conversation, inspire civic engagement, and anchor a burgeoning movement that builds from the ground up. As a defender of democracy, your support is crucial. We invite you to pitch in and help us bring this vital project to life. Thank you for considering this opportunity to make a lasting impact. Together, we can ensure that the spirit of democracy continues to thrive in our communities. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . | | I'm reaching out with some incredible news: **My friend Sherrod Brown just announced that he's running for Senate again in Ohio! I'm so proud to support him, and I'm counting on you to join me.**[**Will you chip in $14 or more now – split between Sherrod and me – to help give his campaign the strongest kickoff possible?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113619791/564384915/525691683?refcode=2025-08-18-launch&recurring=0&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ea6f7522-407d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTZmNzUyMi00MDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCYZT7g7DGX55UicqQ4e8xdoydH4_oFYKeoR-tXmSkk=) As Sherrod says himself, he never planned to return to public office. But he sees what's happening in Washington, and he's called to jump back in the fight. He's the exact leader we need at this moment. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you come from, or what kind of work you do. Right now, this principle is under threat. Billionaires and corporations are profiting like never before – while workers and everyday people are struggling just to make ends meet. _The system is rigged in favor of the wealthiest among us, and Sherrod is running to change that._ **If there's one thing I know about Sherrod, it's that he never backs down from a tough fight. But this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races on the map in 2026, and he needs to build a massive grassroots movement to win.** [**I'm grateful to have you on my team, and now I'm asking you to be on Sherrod's. With so much at stake, will you give $14 or more now – split between Sherrod and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio's Senate seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113619792/564384916/525691683?refcode=2025-08-18-launch&recurring=0&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ea6f7522-407d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTZmNzUyMi00MDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCYZT7g7DGX55UicqQ4e8xdoydH4_oFYKeoR-tXmSkk=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Sherrod Brown and Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: Ohio’s Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive on the map in 2026, and we need to build a massive grassroots movement to win. | | | | I'm reaching out with some incredible news: My friend Sherrod Brown just announced that he's running for Senate again in Ohio! I'm so proud to support him, and I'm counting on you to join me.= As Sherrod says himself, he never planned to return to public office. But he sees what's happening in Washington, and he's called to jump back in the fight. He's the exact leader we need at this moment. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you come from, or what kind of work you do. Right now, this principle is under threat. Billionaires and corporations are profiting like never before – while workers and everyday people are struggling just to make ends meet. The system is rigged in favor of the wealthiest among us, and Sherrod is running to change that. If there's one thing I know about Sherrod, it's that he never backs down from a tough fight. But this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races on the map in 2026, and he needs to build a massive grassroots movement to win. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Sherrod Brown and Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I'm so grateful to have you in this fight – and I know Sherrod is too. name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Extraordinary steps must be taken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
My thoughts on this watershed moment for democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113619825/564385065/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2Yzg5YjdjLTNmN2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=14jQ662rFvu9BrnfQYNCF7rcE7tK7JS1zG2kpPk_lRc=&emci=748d66a4-067d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=26c89b7c-3f7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, From the day President Obama and I started the National Democratic Redistricting Committee eight years ago, our north star has been fairness in the redistricting process. We oppose the use of partisan and racial gerrymanders — by all political parties — designed to disenfranchise people. I’m still deeply committed to that ideal. **But let me be clear: That enduring commitment to fairness does not blind us to reality.** Right now, Republican leaders, led by the president, are attempting to gerrymander their way to unchecked power. Let’s call this what it is: We are witnessing an authoritarian attempt to thwart the will of the people. We cannot stand by in the face of an overt threat to democracy. Extraordinary steps must be taken to meet this moment. **We must preserve our democracy today in order to ultimately heal it.** For that reason, we are evolving our approach. The NDRC will not oppose — on a temporary basis — responsible, responsive actions to ensure that the foundations of our democracy are not permanently eroded. And once this moment has passed, we must pass reforms at the federal and state levels to outlaw the very actions that have led to this crisis. The people who are willing to undermine the core precepts of democracy for partisan gain must never again be allowed to threaten what makes America exceptional. We are not abandoning the fight for fairness — far from it. Fairness is a weapon that exists to protect the people’s power. And we shouldn’t be afraid to use it. In solidarity, Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113619826/564385066/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGHolderRR_email_20250819-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderRR-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250819-NDRC-Tier1-AGHolderRR-NOR_&utm_campaign=AGHolderRR&utm_campaign=AGHolderRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2Yzg5YjdjLTNmN2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=14jQ662rFvu9BrnfQYNCF7rcE7tK7JS1zG2kpPk_lRc=)
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m America Only
body:
That’s why AIPAC is lining up to defeat me
| | | | Friend,
I’ve had enough of watching your hard-earned tax dollars vanish into endless foreign wars and aid packages, while families back home struggle to put food on the table. American families are crumbling under crushing debt, and politicians in DC act like it's all just fine—as long as their foreign lobbyist friends are happy.
**It breaks my heart, and it should break yours too.** I've seen the pain in the eyes of everyday Americans who've been left behind, forgotten by a system that prioritizes everyone but us. That's why I refuse to stay silent.
**__**
**_[America First isn't some catchy phrase—it's a promise I make every day to fight for you, your family, and our future](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
But it’s being watered down by “Republicans” who time and again put foreign interests ahead of the interests of the people that elected them; the people they claim to represent.
**That’s why I’m embracing a new moniker: AMERICA ONLY!**
---
[SUPPORT AMERICA ONLY](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
The powerful forces who profit from this betrayal are turning their sights on me. AIPAC, the shadowy unregistered lobby pushing Israel's agenda, is furious because I won't bow down.
**They see me as a threat.** A Congresswoman who can't be bought, who puts faith in Jesus Christ above all, and who demands we stop the endless giveaways that hollow out our nation.
**_[Now they're mobilizing their deep-pocketed donors to smear me, silence me, and defeat me in my primary](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.** It enrages me, and it should enrage every patriot who loves this country. We've sacrificed too much and are watching our dreams for our children slip away while our leaders mortgage their future for foreign powers.
I won't back down, but I can't do this alone. Your support has always been my strength—the grassroots fire that keeps me going against the odds. **_If this injustice stirs something in you, if you're tired of the sellouts and ready to reclaim America, then don’t wait for a second._**
**_[Together, we'll show them what real American resolve looks like](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
For America,
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

### **_[Unsubscribe from list](https://link.email.greene4congress.com/click/e5081900/VaHR0cHM6Ly9tdGcubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZ3JlZW5lRk9VUmNvbmdyZXNzX2NvbTI1MDgxOQ/LbmNsUk03STBZ/qP2hpZHM9bmMzd25VZEd1QjN4OGxz/gaKTntw/s1r0eb2dc4e)_**

If this injustice stirs something in you, if you're tired of the sellouts and ready to reclaim America, then don’t wait for a second. . For America, | | Marjorie Taylor Greene _
