# [The Great Farce of Norwalk: ICE Loses a Parking Spot, Finds Its Rage](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=171397298&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzk3Mjk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU2MzgwODcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODIzMDA4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.60a3aKXEFtq6XBZ9hjJRAPTJk6u3apnN5_WiVZnfeLM)
### The completely unnecessary & disgusting violence by Trump's secret police keeps escalating
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---
| Aug 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=171397298&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzk3Mjk4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTYzODA4NywiZXhwIjoxNzU4MjMwMDg3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XLqCFPH2P23srrJ9Ih-weLRhLJjB4ICFQEWNGlWtzrI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=171397298&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzk3Mjk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU2MzgwODcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODIzMDA4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.60a3aKXEFtq6XBZ9hjJRAPTJk6u3apnN5_WiVZnfeLM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=171397298&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMzk3Mjk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU2MzgwODcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODIzMDA4NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.60a3aKXEFtq6XBZ9hjJRAPTJk6u3apnN5_WiVZnfeLM)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/the-great-farce-of-norwalk-ice-loses?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4063f834-ba76-43d5-aa38-19c2dec922b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### _**Corporate media rigs our system. W/ Soundcheck Fund grants for independent media, we un-rig it. Your Paid Subscriptions empower us to do this. We ARE the ones we 've been waiting for.**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ScldjKd8USCalcPpzNop6oXnYPHPQpuxU3_DMzmhHFY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171397298)
**By David Shuster**
In the bucolic town of Norwalk, Connecticut -- with it's vibrant middle class, manicured hedges, and consistent ranking as a top 100 place to live in America -- the federal government recently dispatched the tyrannical knights of immigration and customs enforcement (ICE) not to uphold the law, but avenge a bruised ego.
**This tale of federal fury began not with a crime wave, nor a terror plot,[but something so anodyne](https://substack.com/redirect/5471ece5-16b1-4fe1-8ece-76e7b4d0fe16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a parking dispute.**
Yes, you read this correctly. ICE -- that phalanx of masked men who believe themselves to be the last bulwark between the republic and collapse -- was denied the sacred right to park at the Norwalk Police Department.
The local police chief, having retained some sense of constitutional decency, told these federal peacocks to flap elsewhere.
No badge, no courtesy. No warrant, no parking.
For any normal agency, this might have been a momentary inconvenience. But for ICE, an institution whose moral compass seems to have been fashioned by Gestapo officers on a bender, it was nothing less than heresy.
So, with their pride bruised and their SUVs presumably overheating while double parked on Main Street, the agents embarked on what can only be described as a tantrum in boots (that goose-step to the mere thought of committing violence).
Unfortunately at that moment, Ricardo and Nunez Chavez,[ two brothers](https://substack.com/redirect/b8ec6c97-12d4-47d2-9763-be25a1164283?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) happened to be driving their red pickup truck on Norwalk's Main Street. More significantly, the Chavez brothers possess Latino features.
That's all it took for the Trump tyrants to erupt.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/06e665c7-8a8e-4962-9f14-4a773ed3cfaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The masked ICE agents refused to identify themselves, blocked the path of the Chavez truck, and then smashed the windows when the brothers hesitated to get out.
Ricardo Chavez bolted and tried to run. An ICE agent then tasered him, causing Chavez to fall and smash headfirst into the pavement.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/01071202-92ba-407d-9a97-c8457ff19228?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ScldjKd8USCalcPpzNop6oXnYPHPQpuxU3_DMzmhHFY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171397298)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/418f5c62-477a-4be6-aeae-018db50211c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The agent then handcuffed Chavez, ignored the man's bloody temple, and disregarded infuriated bystanders who urged ICE to take Ricardo Chavez to a hospital.
Nunez Chavez got out of the truck, and told the agents his wife could bring his paperwork to the scene (both brothers are legally entitled/documented to be in the United States). The problem is these Judge Dredds don't care a one whit about justice--in fact they often seem to try and achieve just the opposite.
Chavez had his arms quickly twisted and pinned behind his back. There would be no patience nor paperwork allowed for Nunez. And no ambulance ride to the hospital for Ricardo.
**The Chavez brothers were shoved into unmarked vehicles like sacks of contraband.**
All of this was across the street from the police department headquarters, and the parking spots ICE had wanted.
A short time later, the Mayor of Norwalk, himself a former Norwalk police chief, held a news conference. He denounced the conduct of these ICEe agents as both rogue and unjustified.
That is commendable. But it is also irrelevant. Trump's Securitate do not answer to reason or to jurisdiction. [They only answer to grievance, vengeance, and whatever sadistic thought](https://substack.com/redirect/64d23dd7-f68f-411e-ab2c-1ea06bfb252a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) seeps into Stephen Miller's head that day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/daf83f73-c260-4c85-bf50-4d62654339d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is difficult to figure out what offense the Chavez brothers committed, other than existing. Their legal paperwork? On the way. Their rights? Disregarded. Their humanity? A footnote.
Indeed, one suspects that their true crime was ["Driving While Latino"](https://substack.com/redirect/32085110-9cb9-43d7-9584-a6281f5f6dd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- an offense that ICE, in its self-deputized crusade, considers punishable by roadside abduction.
This is not merely about Norwalk, CT, [it's happening across the country with regularity](https://substack.com/redirect/32085110-9cb9-43d7-9584-a6281f5f6dd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Recently in Portland, Oregon, a peaceful protester -- **and military veteran, no less** -- was flattened for the crime of standing and observing I.C.E. Agents, who absurdly claimed that the man was in their way.
Video of this event shows no warning, no request, just a sudden bone crunching cheap shot tackle from behind.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ScldjKd8USCalcPpzNop6oXnYPHPQpuxU3_DMzmhHFY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171397298)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc86952e-7c6e-4ab7-b9c6-ec8c94b7c953?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In downtown Washington--already increasingly authoritarian [due to Trump's calling in the National Guard](https://substack.com/redirect/df8f72f3-4c64-462c-823f-bc0528a27958?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--D.C. I.C.E. agents recently tackled and assaulted an Uber Eats driver just doing a delivery. The feds pulled him from his moped and threw him to the street.
Nearby, in Washington, D.C.'s Latino neighborhood of Mount Pleasant, ICE agents filmed themselves ripping down a protest sign criticizing the Border Patrol. How very adult.
And, let's be honest, nothing screams **liberty** like silencing opinions the U.S. Constitution explicitly defends.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/055a11cb-86b3-41d7-a7be-bb9ad1b36cde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**What we are witnessing is not law enforcement.[It is theater -- grotesque, petty, and vindictive](https://substack.com/redirect/5471ece5-16b1-4fe1-8ece-76e7b4d0fe16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- performed by men drunk on authority and unshackled by oversight.** Absolute power corrupting absolutely.
They are not protecting America; they are punishing America for daring to be diverse and humane.
One might ask,[ what kind of man smashes a window instead of showing a warrant](https://substack.com/redirect/8e47473f-1627-491c-a58f-88835ad13260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? What sort of officer bleeds a human being rather than speak his name? And most damningly -- what kind of government allows this, not in secret, but in broad daylight, on Main Street across from local police headquarters?
The answer is federal government agents [who confuse cruelty with strength](https://substack.com/redirect/8e47473f-1627-491c-a58f-88835ad13260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and parking privileges with a divine right.
[There was a time when government service meant duty](https://substack.com/redirect/82fe7f1f-5bfb-4eb7-be69-79e3aa0d3373?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Today, in the hands of ICE, it is an opportunity for cowards -- who seek not to serve, but to settle scores, and engage in sadistic, psychopathic, racist fantasies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/69333fca-3ecf-4eff-ac78-6149b298c281?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The tragedy of Norwalk is not that it happened in a so-called sanctuary city. The [tragedy is that it can happen ](https://substack.com/redirect/64d23dd7-f68f-411e-ab2c-1ea06bfb252a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[anywhere](https://substack.com/redirect/64d23dd7-f68f-411e-ab2c-1ea06bfb252a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ in America](https://substack.com/redirect/64d23dd7-f68f-411e-ab2c-1ea06bfb252a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Anytime.
**This is what America has become under Donald Trump and the Republican Party.**
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of[our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."](https://substack.com/redirect/bf351f87-01e1-4010-aa01-1ba673d806de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

Video of this event shows no warning, no request, just a sudden bone crunching cheap shot tackle from behind. | | ---|---|--- In downtown Washington--already increasingly authoritarian . I.C.E. agents recently tackled and assaulted an Uber Eats driver just doing a delivery. The feds pulled him from his moped and threw him to the street. Nearby, in Washington, D.C.'s Latino neighborhood of Mount Pleasant, ICE agents filmed themselves ripping down a protest sign criticizing the Border Patrol. How very adult. And, let's be honest, nothing screams liberty like silencing opinions the U.S. Constitution explicitly defends. | | ---|---|--- What we are witnessing is not law enforcement. -- performed by men drunk on authority and unshackled by oversight. Absolute power corrupting absolutely. They are not protecting America; they are punishing America for daring to be diverse and humane. One might ask,? What sort of officer bleeds a human being rather than speak his name? And most damningly -- what kind of government allows this, not in secret, but in broad daylight, on Main Street across from local police headquarters? The answer is federal government agents , and parking privileges with a divine right. . Today, in the hands of ICE, it is an opportunity for cowards -- who seek not to serve, but to settle scores, and engage in sadistic, psychopathic, racist fantasies. | | ---|---|--- The tragedy of Norwalk is not that it happened in a so-called sanctuary city. The . Anytime. This is what America has become under Donald Trump and the Republican Party. David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of Corporate media rigs our system. W/ Soundcheck Fund grants for independent media, we un-rig it. Your Paid Subscriptions empower us to do this. We ARE the ones we 've been waiting for.** You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

subject: What does grassroots mean?
body:
And why does it matter?

| |
---
Friend, We say, “This is a grassroots campaign,” a lot. But what does that actually mean? And why does it matter? Some campaigns are built around relationships with billionaires and ultra-wealthy donors. Our campaign is not about that; we prioritize neighbors, friends, and families chipping in whatever they can. Your grassroots support doesn’t just “help,” it is the cornerstone of our campaign. Those contributions add up and give us the tools we need to:
* Re-elect Nellie, a New Jersey leader who knows our communities.
* Take back the House majority from extremist Republicans.
* Protect one of the most important districts in the country.

This is an official Frontline campaign, and Republican groups have already started attacking Nellie with false ad campaigns fueled by dark money. **[Every time you give, you’re not just donating, you’re helping to re-elect Nellie, take back the House majority, and protect this crucial seat. name: Mark Warner
subject: Something I think about often…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Virginia’s kids deserve better.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113620214/564386276/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Grandkids_250819_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzczYzg5My00MTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1TxUlPH6cmbfXhgJCJyw7R8ePN0mf85lX6N7mkvY64=) Derek,

This summer, I was so fortunate to welcome my second grandchild into the family.

And I’ve got to tell you something: The saying about “what kind of world are we leaving for our grandkids”... It’s something I think a lot about.

I think about the critical investments in climate science and clean energy Republicans voted away in their Big, Ugly Bill – and the state of the environment our kids will inherit.

About how the next generation of families will have less access to health care than my family did.

About the unfair tax system where billionaires don’t pay their fair share and everyday Americans make up the difference.

Frankly, that’s just the beginning of the mess the Trump administration and Senate Republicans are making.

Virginia’s kids deserve better. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113620215/564386277/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Grandkids_250819_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzczYzg5My00MTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1TxUlPH6cmbfXhgJCJyw7R8ePN0mf85lX6N7mkvY64=) **I fight like heck every day in the Senate to push back against this dangerous agenda, find real solutions to make our communities safer and stronger, and give every child in Virginia and our country a fair shot. Because that’s what my grandkids – and all Americans – deserve.**

[_**And I’m grateful to have committed grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me. We’ve got a long road ahead of us and a pretty consequential election coming up next year. So I have to ask, if you’re able to, will you donate to my reelection campaign, so we can keep up the fight for our children and grandchildren’s future?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113620216/564386278/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Grandkids_250819_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzczYzg5My00MTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1TxUlPH6cmbfXhgJCJyw7R8ePN0mf85lX6N7mkvY64=) clean_body: Virginia’s kids deserve better. | | | = Derek, This summer, I was so fortunate to welcome my second grandchild into the family. And I’ve got to tell you something: The saying about “what kind of world are we leaving for our grandkids”... It’s something I think a lot about. I think about the critical investments in climate science and clean energy Republicans voted away in their Big, Ugly Bill – and the state of the environment our kids will inherit. About how the next generation of families will have less access to health care than my family did. About the unfair tax system where billionaires don’t pay their fair share and everyday Americans make up the difference. Frankly, that’s just the beginning of the mess the Trump administration and Senate Republicans are making. Virginia’s kids deserve better. = I fight like heck every day in the Senate to push back against this dangerous agenda, find real solutions to make our communities safer and stronger, and give every child in Virginia and our country a fair shot. Because that’s what my grandkids – and all Americans – deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I want your name on this wall!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)
I have some exciting news:
**Last week, we opened the doors to our official campaign headquarters in Albuquerque!** This isn’t just a place to make phone calls or plan rallies — it’s where our movement will come together to build a better future for families across New Mexico.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250819_1_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250819-3903&refcode2=3903_400544_kG1fGu&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)
And right in the heart of our office is our **Grassroots Donor Wall** , a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, _not_ billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall!
**We’re going to be adding the names of _everyone_ who pitches in to this email to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is. [Can I count on you to pitch in today so we can put your name up there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250819_1_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250819-3903&refcode2=3903_400544_kG1fGu&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250819_1_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250819-3903&refcode2=3903_400544_kG1fGu&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)**
Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that _you_ helped make this movement possible.
With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: a **people-powered campaign** that reaches every corner of New Mexico.
I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it!
**[If you can, please make a contribution of $5 or any amount today so we can get your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250819_1_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250819-3903&refcode2=3903_400544_kG1fGu&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250819-1&t=2&refcode2=3903_400544_kG1fGu&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3903%2E400544%2EkG1fGu)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Last night, State Rep. Nicole Collier refused to comply with Texas Department of Public Safety’s demands that they “escort” her to and from the Capitol, and they locked her in the House chamber.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113620325/564386706/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkODAxNzQyLTQyN2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GBk5-acGj724znX0r60a9faCjDIzvCafAEubUo8MVrQ=)

| Peter,

Yesterday, we hosted our most attended #LeadersMatter virtual event to hear directly from Emerge women like State Sen. Molly Cook who are pushing back against the latest Republican power grab— gerrymandering.

Here’s the latest in the fight:

Last night, State Rep. Nicole Collier refused to comply with Texas Department of Public Safety’s demands that they “escort” her to and from the Capitol, and they locked her in the House chamber.

Protestors showed up in force to support her, chanting “let her go!” deep into the night. **Emerge Alum State Sen. Molly Cook stepped up to protect three women protestors demanding Collier be free to go, but Texas DPS arrested them.**

This fight isn’t just about Texas. It's about protecting the integrity of our elections and ensuring every vote counts.

[_**Can you chip in $25 to help us train the women who will lead the resistance in Texas and across the country?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113620326/564386707/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkODAxNzQyLTQyN2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GBk5-acGj724znX0r60a9faCjDIzvCafAEubUo8MVrQ=)

subject: We're falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Do you approve of Donald Trump?
| | | Hey team -- It's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC, and right now I'm reviewing today's responses to our Trump Approval poll. We're _still missing_ your crucial input, so **I wanted to explain why hitting our response goals is mission-critical, but first, please let me know:**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/21969?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250819-Pat-PatFallingBehindTrumpResponses-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250819-Pat-PatFallingBehindTrumpResponses-ETG-sl1&akid=21028%2E9716520%2Eo8ETl_)
---

---

**Here's the deal:** When we send polls to top supporters like you, we're looking for data that'll help us win.

We have to determine which issues are mobilizing Democrats, which races we need to invest in, and where to send volunteers. **If not enough Democrats show up and participate in live polls like these, we won't have the accurate data we rely on to inform our strategy.**

**And that strategy could make or break our chances of winning back the Senate!**

Right now, we're falling behind on the responses I need for my Trump Approval Tracker, so I wanted to ask _you_ personally for help: Will you help our Democratic strategists by taking our Live Poll before it closes at midnight?

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/21969?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250819-Pat-PatFallingBehindTrumpResponses-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250819-Pat-PatFallingBehindTrumpResponses-ETG-sl1&akid=21028%2E9716520%2Eo8ETl_)

Thanks for your prompt action,

Pat
DSCC Research Director

name: Team Fetterman
subject: trains, planes & automobiles 🚗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10258%2E434096%2EU-XeAN ]John Fetterman

Hey Derek,

Fetterman HQ here with a quick update on what John’s been up to – because while D.C. plays games, he’s out here getting sh*t done.

As part of his work on the Commerce, Science, and Transportation Committee, John's making sure folks in PA can actually get where they need to go.

🚆 John secured a commitment from the Amtrak Board leader nominee to bring back train service from Reading to Philly by 2029.

✈️ When Trump’s FAA nominee was up for a vote, John grilled him HARD. Why? Because the last thing we need is air travel that’s unsafe and underfunded. John got Trump’s nominee on the record supporting PA’s air traffic control training programs.

🚇 John met with the Roosevelt Boulevard Subway crew to say loud and clear: You’re still a priority. Philadelphia deserves transit investment, not just survival.

🛑 And when Trump’s folks tried to stall PA transit grants? John went straight to the transportation secretary himself to see what was up. And now, $1 BILLION in PA infrastructure funding is on its way.

So now, John wants to hear from you. We're going to keep up this momentum: What infrastructure upgrades does your community need?

👉 Take our 60-second survey now.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51581?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10258%2E434096%2EU-XeAN

Looking forward to hearing from yinz,

Team Fetterman 💛

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=10258%2E434096%2EU-XeAN

clean_body: [ ]John Fetterman Hey Derek, Fetterman HQ here with a quick update on what John’s been up to – because while D.C. plays games, he’s out here getting sh*t done. As part of his work on the Commerce, Science, and Transportation Committee, John's making sure folks in PA can actually get where they need to go. 🚆 John secured a commitment from the Amtrak Board leader nominee to bring back train service from Reading to Philly by 2029. ✈️ When Trump’s FAA nominee was up for a vote, John grilled him HARD. Why? Because the last thing we need is air travel that’s unsafe and underfunded. John got Trump’s nominee on the record supporting PA’s air traffic control training programs. 🚇 John met with the Roosevelt Boulevard Subway crew to say loud and clear: You’re still a priority. Philadelphia deserves transit investment, not just survival. 🛑 And when Trump’s folks tried to stall PA transit grants? John went straight to the transportation secretary himself to see what was up. And now, $1 BILLION in PA infrastructure funding is on its way. So now, John wants to hear from you. We're going to keep up this momentum: What infrastructure upgrades does your community need? 👉 Take our 60-second survey now. Looking forward to hearing from yinz, Team Fetterman 💛

name: Dan Goldman
subject: An escalating abuse of power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, In 2019, I led the House investigation that resulted in Donald Trump’s impeachment for his abuse of power by holding hostage military assistance to Ukraine in return for a benefit for his reelection. **This time around, enabled by the spineless Republicans in Congress, President Trump is abusing his power for personal gain with reckless abandon. ** In particular — and especially upsetting to me as a 10-year career prosecutor — Donald Trump has turned the Department of Justice into a personal and partisan weapon. Consider:
* He called for the FBI to arrest Texas Democrats who fled the state to prevent Republicans from unilaterally passing gerrymandering their congressional districts;
* He has sicked the incompetent and dangerous Ed Martin to investigate bogus allegations against NY AG Letitia James and Senator Adam Schiff — two Democrats who have stood up to Trump’s corruption;
* And, of course, he has ordered the DOJ to hide the Epstein Files after promising to release them.

Trump and his MAGA allies know how unpopular their agenda is. That’s why they’ve resorted to changing the rules, hand-selecting their voters, and using the criminal justice system to go after their opponents. This is an outright betrayal of public trust. It reeks of a selfish desperation to cling to power, disregarding the very principles that guide our nation. Throughout my career, I have stood firm against corruption and abuse of power, from prosecuting white collar criminals to addressing money laundering and corporate fraud. These experiences strengthened my resolve to ensure that no one, regardless of position, can exploit the system for their personal interests. That includes Trump and his allies. Just as I did as lead counsel during Trump’s first impeachment, I will continue to use every tool in my toolbox to hold Trump and those in power accountable for their harmful and illegal actions. We can’t let the voices attempting to undermine our democracy drown out the truth:**Our nation thrives on diversity, dialogue, and collective dissent — not the coercion and manipulation of broken institutions. ** I’m running to protect the interests of the people, not to silence opposing views or manipulate electoral laws for their gain. clean_body: | Peter, In 2019, I led the House investigation that resulted in Donald Trump’s impeachment for his abuse of power by holding hostage military assistance to Ukraine in return for a benefit for his reelection. This time around, enabled by the spineless Republicans in Congress, President Trump is abusing his power for personal gain with reckless abandon. In particular — and especially upsetting to me as a 10-year career prosecutor — Donald Trump has turned the Department of Justice into a personal and partisan weapon. Consider: He called for the FBI to arrest Texas Democrats who fled the state to prevent Republicans from unilaterally passing gerrymandering their congressional districts; He has sicked the incompetent and dangerous Ed Martin to investigate bogus allegations against NY AG Letitia James and Senator Adam Schiff — two Democrats who have stood up to Trump’s corruption; And, of course, he has ordered the DOJ to hide the Epstein Files after promising to release them. Trump and his MAGA allies know how unpopular their agenda is. That’s why they’ve resorted to changing the rules, hand-selecting their voters, and using the criminal justice system to go after their opponents. This is an outright betrayal of public trust. It reeks of a selfish desperation to cling to power, disregarding the very principles that guide our nation. Throughout my career, I have stood firm against corruption and abuse of power, from prosecuting white collar criminals to addressing money laundering and corporate fraud. These experiences strengthened my resolve to ensure that no one, regardless of position, can exploit the system for their personal interests. That includes Trump and his allies. Just as I did as lead counsel during Trump’s first impeachment, I will continue to use every tool in my toolbox to hold Trump and those in power accountable for their harmful and illegal actions. We can’t let the voices attempting to undermine our democracy drown out the truth:Our nation thrives on diversity, dialogue, and collective dissent — not the coercion and manipulation of broken institutions. I’m running to protect the interests of the people, not to silence opposing views or manipulate electoral laws for their gain. As we work towards flipping the House, advocating for transparency, accountability, and the preservation of democratic integrity has never been more important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together, we can resist these threats and work towards a future where democracy is not merely preserved, but strengthened. name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: Broad Support: AFL-CIO, Firefighters, and Police Endorse Our Campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
This endorsement joins the powerful support I have already received from the Virginia Professional Firefighters and the Virginia Police Benevolent

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/190ec6da2065/broad-support-afl-cio-firefighters-and-police-endorse-our-campaign?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=d4d8447fd5&e=606d7e9aa2)
| |

Friends,
I am honored to announce that my campaign has been endorsed by the AFL-CIO, the voice of working people across our Commonwealth and our country.
This endorsement joins the powerful support I have already received from the Virginia Professional Firefighters and the Virginia Police**Benevolent Association**. These brave men and women put their lives on the line every day, and their trust in me is one of the greatest honors of my life.
I grew up in coal country, where I saw firsthand how unions could transform lives. I watched families gain stability, dignity,and hope because workers stood together and demanded fairness.
Every worker deserves the right to organize, and that right is constitutional and fundamental to a free society. Unions don’t just protect paychecks; they protect communities, families, and futures.
With the AFL-CIO, the firefighters, and law enforcement at our side, we are building a coalition that cannot be ignored. Together, we will fight for safer workplaces, better wages, and stronger protections for every Virginian.
This is a campaign for working people. Let’s show Richmond that when we stand shoulder-to-shoulder, nothing can stop us.
**In solidarity,**
**Dr. Gary Miller**
Democratic Nominee for House of Delegates49th District

GOP Rep. Lisa McClain shot back at Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett for blaming guns, not criminals, for rampant violent crime.
**[Her response was perfect:](https://substack.com/redirect/9e3252dc-6e8e-4a0a-b698-eb75c7b418c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9e3252dc-6e8e-4a0a-b698-eb75c7b418c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Total crime up 27% in D.C. from the same time last year, motor vehicle theft up 110%, homicides of 12%, sexual abuse is up 53% and property crime is up 30%, that's not a good position of the law abiding citizens to be in! Why? Consequence to the action..." McClain told Crockett.
"67% of the people who committed an action didn't have a consequence to those actions. I wonder what kind of behavior that lead to..." she added, stating the obvious for the Democrats.
**[Watch McClain go off at the Democrats for failing the people of D.C.](https://substack.com/redirect/9e3252dc-6e8e-4a0a-b698-eb75c7b418c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **[Liberals laughed at RFK Jr's COVID warning... until THIS happened](https://substack.com/redirect/e7683ee5-8615-4071-979e-b3f1ca9bbd33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e7683ee5-8615-4071-979e-b3f1ca9bbd33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
When RFK Jr warned that COVID 19 originated from a lab leak in Wuhan, China... liberals laughed and called him a conspiracy theorist.
NOW the FBI, CIA and Department of Energy all agree that Covid-19 most likely originated from a Wuhan lab leak...
Once again Kennedy was proven right.
But **[RFK Jr.'s next WARNING](https://substack.com/redirect/e7683ee5-8615-4071-979e-b3f1ca9bbd33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be far worse for millions of Americans.

Before the deep state's smear campaign really revs up--**[see it here for yourself.](https://substack.com/redirect/e7683ee5-8615-4071-979e-b3f1ca9bbd33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/e7683ee5-8615-4071-979e-b3f1ca9bbd33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Students suspended after questioning transgender student in locker room
Two Virginia high school students have been **[suspended for 10 days](https://substack.com/redirect/581174cc-0f88-486c-a320-83bc41fc4ec8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after questioning why a transgender student was in the boys' locker room, a decision that has drawn criticism from parents and the state's attorney general who called the school district's investigation biased and retaliatory.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a87ed0d3-374c-4bd7-815c-890b3e1648ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Loudoun County Public Schools found the Stone Bridge High School boys responsible for sexual harassment** and sex-based discrimination following a Title IX investigation into an incident where they questioned why a female student identifying as male was in the boys' locker room.

* **Parents and Virginia Attorney General condemn decision as biased and retaliatory** \- The boys' families are furious about the suspensions, with one parent moving out of state, while Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares referred LCPS to federal authorities, arguing the school improperly targeted students for expressing discomfort rather than actual misconduct.
* **Video evidence shows boys asking transgender student to leave, not discriminatory behavior** \- The incident was recorded by the transgender student, and according to Miyares, the footage showed the boys simply asking the person recording to leave rather than displaying discriminatory or derogatory behavior toward the student.
* **Punishment includes no-contact orders and permanent academic record impact** \- The suspended students face no-contact orders preventing them from sharing classes with the complainant and must meet with administrators for corrective action plans, with parents concerned the suspensions on permanent records could affect college applications.
* **Case highlights ongoing controversy over LCPS Policy 8040** \- The incident stems from the school district's controversial 2021 policy allowing students to use restrooms and locker rooms matching their gender identity rather than biological sex, with this being the latest in a series of high-profile LCPS controversies involving transgender policies.

* * *

# Joy Reid says white people "can't originally invent anything" in racist podcast rant
Fired MSNBC host, Joy Reid, claimed on Wajahat Ali's "Left Hook" podcast that Black people created country music, hip hop, R&B, jazz, and rock and roll, while white people couldn't invent these genres, also claiming Black people "make the food better" and "make the economy better."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d8e36264-b2d2-419f-82fd-452554c29690?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Reid cites Elon Musk and Tesla as example of white appropriation** \- She argued that Musk "didn't invent them damn Teslas" but rather bought the company from its actual inventors, though both Tesla co-founders Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning are also white men.
* **Comments made amid criticism of Trump's Kennedy Center role** \- Reid's remarks came as President Trump, now Kennedy Center board chair, announced he would host the 2025 Kennedy Center Honors and helped select honorees including George Strait, Gloria Gaynor, KISS, and Sylvester Stallone, rejecting some artists he deemed "too woke."
* **Ali calls Stallone's honor example of "white male fragility"** \- Podcast host Wajahat Ali claimed that without "black people, brown people, the DEIs, there's no culture in America" and argued Sylvester Stallone's Kennedy Center honor represents white fragility since Rocky was about "a mediocre white man" who couldn't beat Apollo Creed, though Rocky actually defeats Creed in "Rocky II."

name: Frank Mrvan
subject: Republicans are rewriting the rules
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Republicans are working behind closed doors to redraw the Congressional map in Indiana mid-decade.

| Friend,

Throughout my career, as a public servant and member of Congress, I’ve fought to uplift the most vulnerable in our communities: seniors, children, people with disabilities, survivors of sexual assault and working families.

I’m proud to stand with organized labor, our veterans, our teachers and steelworkers, and I will never back down in defending their rights and livelihoods.

**But now, Indiana Republicans, backed by none other than Vice President JD Vance, are working behind closed doors to redraw the Congressional map mid-decade.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621125/564389546/-1578591404?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250819_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2JhYmZjNC00NTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlYS4uJD0iMzOJKNZZGvWMgLbsGYn6DjA0anePCOIXM=)****Let’s be clear: this is nothing more than an attempt to silence the voices of the very communities I represent and fight for every single day.**

While they pass tax breaks for billionaires and slash healthcare for our seniors and working families, they’re hoping to gerrymander their way to power by making my district more favorable for them.

**Republicans know that they can’t win on their harmful policies, so they’re trying to rig the system instead.** **[This is a pivotal moment, friend, and I cannot face it alone. clean_body: Republicans are working behind closed doors to redraw the Congressional map in Indiana mid-decade. | Friend, Throughout my career, as a public servant and member of Congress, I’ve fought to uplift the most vulnerable in our communities: seniors, children, people with disabilities, survivors of sexual assault and working families. I’m proud to stand with organized labor, our veterans, our teachers and steelworkers, and I will never back down in defending their rights and livelihoods. But now, Indiana Republicans, backed by none other than Vice President JD Vance, are working behind closed doors to redraw the Congressional map mid-decade. ’s be clear: this is nothing more than an attempt to silence the voices of the very communities I represent and fight for every single day. While they pass tax breaks for billionaires and slash healthcare for our seniors and working families, they’re hoping to gerrymander their way to power by making my district more favorable for them. subject: This is a direct attack on California voters
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621168/564389678/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE4YzQxZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JedPZP_TlN3Wesv7qZ87iUqRix4Js_f2Y1FNEn9ymlY=)
This is concerning on so many levels, Peter.

**President Trump just declared war on mail-in voting – pledging to sign an executive order banning vote by mail before the 2026 midterm elections.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621169/564389679/1501846072?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE4YzQxZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JedPZP_TlN3Wesv7qZ87iUqRix4Js_f2Y1FNEn9ymlY=&emci=c1a08619-467d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=8b18c41f-467d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=36198509)
This is a direct attack on California voters, 100% of whom receive their ballots in the mail if registered.

Make no mistake: This is a move designed to favor the GOP. Only three seats separate House control, and making voting more difficult could majorly impact the outcome of next year’s election.

Mail-in voting is the best way to protect our fundamental right to vote, especially for those who would have trouble reaching an in-person vote center. If the president truly cared about election integrity, he wouldn’t be taking advice from Russian President Putin – he would expand vote by mail.

**[If you’re with me, this is the time to make your voice heard. Will you sign onto my petition to protect our democracy and condemn Trump’s scheme to end vote by mail?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621170/564389680/1501846072?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE4YzQxZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JedPZP_TlN3Wesv7qZ87iUqRix4Js_f2Y1FNEn9ymlY=&emci=c1a08619-467d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=8b18c41f-467d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621171/564389708/1501846072?refcode=em-8.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE4YzQxZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JedPZP_TlN3Wesv7qZ87iUqRix4Js_f2Y1FNEn9ymlY=&emci=c1a08619-467d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=8b18c41f-467d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=36198509)****

And our kids will pay the price
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621181/564389749/-1291811453?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_CleanAir_250819_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdlMjUyZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThDV8JwuKcmkmUxw9LHMKSIi3QCiW-DpMlgu9R7Anb4=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621182/564389750/-1291811453?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_CleanAir_250819_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdlMjUyZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThDV8JwuKcmkmUxw9LHMKSIi3QCiW-DpMlgu9R7Anb4=) _\- Politico, 7/23/25_ Team,

Trump’s war on clean energy killed a groundbreaking clean steel project in Ohio that would have created thousands of good-paying jobs and our chance to lead the clean energy economy. But Republicans would rather serve their special interest donors than invest in our state’s future.

[**_We’re tired of watching Republicans trade Ohio’s clean air for megadonor dirty money. If you’re with us, pitch in $5 right now to help us defeat them at the ballot box next year >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621183/564389751/-1291811453?amount=5&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_CleanAir_250819_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdlMjUyZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThDV8JwuKcmkmUxw9LHMKSIi3QCiW-DpMlgu9R7Anb4=)

For the past year, Ohio Republicans in Washington have gutted climate policy, slashed clean energy incentives, and sabotaged progress at every turn — all to protect their billionaire fossil fuel donors and keep Trump’s polluter-first agenda alive.

**They’re making our state sicker, dirtier, and more dangerous, all to please their climate change-denying megadonors.**

We’re done with the lies and backroom deals. Ohioans deserve clean air, good-paying jobs, and a future our kids can thrive in.

[**_But we need your help to get it there. Will you chip in to elect Ohio Democrats who will fight for clean air and jobs — not do the bidding of their megadonors?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621184/564389752/-1291811453?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_CleanAir_250819_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdlMjUyZi00NjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThDV8JwuKcmkmUxw9LHMKSIi3QCiW-DpMlgu9R7Anb4=)

Thank you,

Ohio Dems

body:
But to keep winning for parents and students, we need your help. | | | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/sJIAendZKQZjDQ8qAr121mDFE3LiNrZ9WhXgZCAFADCe3TLaB_qf8Ve8qlry-Q-Vl6FTZiHEBRvhONw-bPGE_tYSJ_WEAgCNsat0vSbCSz0gMqtlos0a_MR89otfcZBbBMS78ILKdOJpnpIHlvWrtv054RjUYkNj-WAiXnEyyuAe1vYjaRPe-ofzAXKmLA-2vIAdMcN3ZMLcjjXkdYNP7cWO9gkjAX4brQtp8JtroKVc-xRQ4g4zJwUgyLiolgdyfj-buUHE7vNv-dQP8T18wz2wCaOMZAwB03tZORX9bCB0nYou2gidcMXWQDpA-Y0No5cqR8JjAmHsABHq6jXalitgGgscariFtwg64yFJnwV2VfdXAPUVrGDJTpgPXwc8oEOE14vXFtsWqQl8GQ-VxsBFC4kdSGogrq7EuLuBueWswgQyuw_krHSl9Pt9WwNI1fuf5wM6LHxIc8qRC7qPplzri-nJrV6s3DuJ1sVM7EgEJbesbAzRNYgMJgfeelLlK75lWNGenk-V6jSi0rAnZ0rgUuMzcv-lAFLrKszcQwSQLkhuhm5n8Z_fpP8jSim48xWSs7ojBmlEQ_RejNKmxlyl-xybSJkxiCxrTybfFw/E23lVGKeUZ1SQzgR_wQGOP0oMcqOHZRY/12)
---
Fellow Republican, While students across Indiana head back to school, they’re returning to **the most parent-empowered, outcome-focused education system in the country** — thanks to Republican leadership and Governor Mike Braun. **In just six months, Governor Braun and Indiana Republicans have:** ✅ Expanded school choice to **EVERY** family in the state
✅ Boosted teacher pay — especially for high-need and high-performing educators
✅ Delivered an additional $640 million into the classroom
✅ Protected students with the appointment of Indiana’s first School Safety Director
✅ Froze in-state tuition at **EVERY** Indiana public university

And the results speak for themselves. [**Indiana just won a national innovation award for student success.**](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/Jg4NWUeVuBlVVp-qacphRXQOOlpEQt7ta8-VPtL4xByDSXi_dM5RRctiLrjHnRaiuJZuVrU2N823EKO_RJKr4jxEVHdMQ2FR2KIZ-ItiC2frGeK-aeg3T6OqEi_DqejuU39VOgXvgv_fOxTQ7HoCbGW_l_v-dBVErU03DbpTowSMRlw49iLM8IM-BPGyWH9EvVlPUYlljqYyTjypjCJJhJrOJU0NTMwkth_AmuIwNEWjZ5dj3daaGVo1F6bBUzPtzmySCoxE3M7ciZcn5_OZ5bbIQ9vtytG-N39rAhAXkcnAHsWLun_IvuPjO6SH26-V_qvp7cHSfsvBlfAeAr7sb4eeUFPSZMT6kd64nIVG8So-8yk7dA7AuUDFAWS1xyPjjSnqr4GXY0s0lFnOtYdEluxij6e4OjX5XeYEd9rXgXQhfVaRCOdnkovDVcBcGgJZA4BFih8k_zvFrcj55Hcy0XL0FMUYSJ9ASZv964Kbukn_e6x83tp-voQ5OZ_KNXF26frXIIJiMzfc5ubCi6Hj6rkpfc9lZgNwXgDwBxGiQ7lPE6xiRun1MV2-TgjZd229kP4xNJlQBZW7n23GIhzFPfKvunJLmNyZgNfbpfSUPg/mWogRVEBzV6jlKYP_4RLdaynSHk7bxbF/12) The Wall Street Journal called our reforms “a breakthrough.” Forbes praised the tuition freeze. **We’re delivering real-world wins for students, parents, and teachers alike.**

---
But here’s the truth: To keep this momentum going, we **NEED** to win the next election.
---
| | [ **STAND FOR INDIANA EDUCATION EXCELLENCE** ](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/iUauM89IEmLBl2NWyunJj0MAAvRr8RNppRFzypPH4x3Wj-s1HbK00EPuGjRb29TNe1D7Lfw62hxyvDnnP3hcDYC46lHhfj1sFCq9NSyqGwUxJM8ApJtbYS7qYGgqK77PlbWiYvx5UZJIkUcDcZZNQxiXN4Cf5Cjlhd9U_Ug2_IQv885dFGp8XZJbzjnXuOyQ-BfNhzouNgiB77ODS_9aZBfMGA9m5rrt-oV9B53u9e3PSW8mORGJzfvnp7ftY_vQh7F9flcrhKcHBXDrU0U8K3eynOIc3zd-jar6FGODVkBg-Ri9eyWeit6XrFuQ4AzTJfpjs5IcXzn-aWVjTUuzQX9U1MDcKtqL2sFntHRh9YTLoEQPrljWbQCUCxFOGfL5-8psOPhN7kZz43bNIfKakoROffKrcMpi6bb6uPM_OAxserd7kwXAhEsZzPikZSu08rVzD4XnSJKB3ZbvuGD_cQlTEvOLsT8pFLHhzpDYkP2GZ9uDRwQwgA6zr6_AWg4_DxGPqJMCfxtp_UHvQqFaBfQYe_cL3U4WKYk8sKb-giids1UjXw3lbXatlWY-MUAqf0thxkJ-dhRG63bePSCK6HdZhARzglDu2C1-fywQsg/-9WA002oFHLGPmGO_a8sG2S7kGLZZPBY/12)
---
Democrats — and the teachers’ unions bankrolling them — are already plotting to roll it all back. They want to **end school choice, re-implement woke indoctrination, and hand control back to the same bureaucrats who failed our kids for decades.** **We cannot let that happen, friend.** Will you donate now to help us defend these reforms and elect more education-focused Republicans across Indiana? **👉****[Rush in $5, $15, $25, or more to support GOP education champions »](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/9GWQnFQxIrWODBqS1zwTpOY1wXNhXtI0JhYX6yRKvdRdwK0BBZtnYnyTkE2es9n1UpvyqbU52HQoDot83OzAuHtEbHe1rEUVS8jYFZJOEZE4jS4UsQKLoDPPx2e8wo6BJ_EQbKhfo8sL6KCYMaiNEBItJRpdiJ2HVCVY2wRgphNw_xpT0hBAlnljz25KLOl97rtiQN-dMWW7aWYs4RKgUxVPCkOqPemG59BVWGOXEjdvICW1KulWOspLicTtn0UBVIRMREmqa1v42wqpZlVVf_21P0WyMSprejbkAlkC6NGYXS8iA6R1DS3MZ2KQPKG1Zw2Wmg5YSrVBh0zEgawDrR6X7tGqrSXAWh-6aZJ803e5ziVsNhZGS-PyaKbvgy2n3yk5NOc2Uv6dGECJu7D6NFA7MXE6XwC2070fycuyRDAUErrZ3YQewKOhEOMa8Bfe66BYSbNUeFkeXOt1n-THkmqJITEs32ToOjxM8zF5p1zqkNU0NDF1cS9fiZVWH7UdVa5qJhqH_PoMm5WyJZ4JL_j7aofO7-ROC1G5mUljIUlizFzVn1BCjBncmFMcg_ImGTFPPz5frfOPj5DZ34ix3n-QuDVj_3lNkRwDC621Ew/Y4EUtpn7Dp2xAOCB1zZ2r1HUc1eF8tN1/12)** With your help, we’ll keep winning for Hoosier families — in the classroom and at the ballot box.__

clean_body: But to keep winning for parents and students, we need your help. | | | Fellow Republican, While students across Indiana head back to school, they’re returning to the most parent-empowered, outcome-focused education system in the country — thanks to Republican leadership and Governor Mike Braun. In just six months, Governor Braun and Indiana Republicans have: ✅ Expanded school choice to EVERY family in the state ✅ Boosted teacher pay — especially for high-need and high-performing educators ✅ Delivered an additional $640 million into the classroom ✅ Protected students with the appointment of Indiana’s first School Safety Director ✅ Froze in-state tuition at EVERY Indiana public university And the results speak for themselves. The Wall Street Journal called our reforms “a breakthrough.” Forbes praised the tuition freeze. We’re delivering real-world wins for students, parents, and teachers alike. But here’s the truth: To keep this momentum going, we NEED to win the next election. | | Democrats — and the teachers’ unions bankrolling them — are already plotting to roll it all back. They want to end school choice, re-implement woke indoctrination, and hand control back to the same bureaucrats who failed our kids for decades. We cannot let that happen, friend. Will you donate now to help us defend these reforms and elect more education-focused Republicans across Indiana? 👉 With your help, we’ll keep winning for Hoosier families — in the classroom and at the ballot box. For our children’s future, Lana Keesling Chairwoman, Indiana Republican Party | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. | | 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Masa cut out all the bad stuff and created a tortilla chip with just 3 ingredients: organic nixtamalized corn, sea salt, and 100 percent grass-fed beef tallow. Snacking on MASA chips feels different--you feel satisfied, light, and energetic, with no crash, bloat, or sluggishness. So head to https://MASAChips.com/SEAN to get 25% off your first order.
European leaders came to the White House along with President Zelensky to discuss a lasting peace plan for the people of Ukraine. It was one European leader noting how President Trump has gotten more done in a matter of months than Joe Biden did in almost 4 years. Europe is in the process of getting their energy needs from the United States. The Russian shadow fleet is still working around sanctions and able to sell oil to European countries. The extraordinary trade deal President Trump made with the E.U. will ultimately shut Russia out as the $750 Billion deal takes effect. The economic impact on Russia will be devastating and could set up Ukraine to flourish and integrate into European economies within 5 years. President Trump called Putin immediately after the meeting to try and end this war once and for all. Former National Security Advisor KT McFarland is here to unpack everything that has happened and what to look for in the coming days.
Featuring:
**KT McFarland**
Former U.S. Deputy National Security Advisor

body:
I'm hitting the track for an all-out Race to Save the Senate.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621561/564391281/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4YzNmYi00NzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_b6eRqiaIZ0r2Kj8vO0RZlXosZXZS0G_iUFnDdounI=&emci=1003acf5-477d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=2f68c3fb-477d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=7731215)

| | On your mark. Get set. Go! I'm hitting the track for an all-out Race to Save the Senate. To save the Senate from Donald Trump and another disastrous Republican majority, we need to lock down the current 47 Democratic seats and cross the finish line first in at least four red-to-blue Senate races. That's why I'm running 69 laps for my 69th year of life, launching my third Race to Save the Senate. Every dollar the Race raises will help me to lock down my reelection campaign in Oregon and enable me to then focus on winning campaigns across the country. [**You can watch my video from my morning workout explaining more about why I'm running to save the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621562/564391282/864486245?refcode=2025-08-19-race&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2f68c3fb-477d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4YzNmYi00NzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_b6eRqiaIZ0r2Kj8vO0RZlXosZXZS0G_iUFnDdounI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621563/564391283/864486245?refcode=2025-08-19-race&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2f68c3fb-477d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4YzNmYi00NzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_b6eRqiaIZ0r2Kj8vO0RZlXosZXZS0G_iUFnDdounI=) As I mentioned in the video, I had my first workout to prepare this morning. It was painful. I haven't jogged in a long time. I jog-walked 3.69 miles at the painfully slow pace of a little over 13 minutes per mile. To jog 69 quarter-mile laps in my October Race is going to take intense preparation, just as winning 51 Senate seats will take intense focus and dedication. [**In support of the Race to Save the Senate and the mission to secure 51 Blue seats in the next election, can you donate $3.69 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621564/564391284/864486245?refcode=2025-08-19-race&recurring=&amount=3.69&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4YzNmYi00NzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_b6eRqiaIZ0r2Kj8vO0RZlXosZXZS0G_iUFnDdounI=) (That's a dollar and change for each mile of the 3.69 miles I jog-walked this morning on my first workout.) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621565/564391285/864486245?refcode=2025-08-19-race&recurring=&amount=3.69&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4YzNmYi00NzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_b6eRqiaIZ0r2Kj8vO0RZlXosZXZS0G_iUFnDdounI=) With every workout in preparation for the October race, I'll be thinking about why a Senate majority matters. **We are fighting to save our nation from an authoritarian takeover and have the votes for a progressive agenda to serve the people rather than the powerful.** After each workout, I'll keep you updated and share thoughts about that agenda. There's no question that some of the Senate races we need to win are going to be difficult. In 2026, we are looking at one of the toughest maps we've ever seen. It includes defending blue seats in tough states like Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire. Then we have to win four more. Impossible? **Not at all.** Three real possibilities are swing seats in purple states: North Carolina, Maine, and Ohio. And there are multiple states where a great campaign could deliver seat #51. Tough, yes, but we just need one from the group to take the Senate majority. [**You can help me save the Senate by donating $3.69 or more today at my ActBlue site.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621566/564391286/864486245?refcode=2025-08-19-race&recurring=&amount=3.69&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4YzNmYi00NzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_b6eRqiaIZ0r2Kj8vO0RZlXosZXZS0G_iUFnDdounI=) Let's all lace up our shoes, click on the ActBlue link, and help build a strong foundation to win back the Senate. We need to run laps around Republicans in 2026, which is why I'm asking you to pitch in to my campaign's Race to Save the Senate. [**If you're ready to get to it, please make a donation of $3.69 to my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113621567/564391287/864486245?refcode=2025-08-19-race&recurring=&amount=3.69&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4YzNmYi00NzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5_b6eRqiaIZ0r2Kj8vO0RZlXosZXZS0G_iUFnDdounI=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: I'm hitting the track for an all-out Race to Save the Senate. | | | | On your mark. Get set. Go! I'm hitting the track for an all-out Race to Save the Senate. To save the Senate from Donald Trump and another disastrous Republican majority, we need to lock down the current 47 Democratic seats and cross the finish line first in at least four red-to-blue Senate races. That's why I'm running 69 laps for my 69th year of life, launching my third Race to Save the Senate. Every dollar the Race raises will help me to lock down my reelection campaign in Oregon and enable me to then focus on winning campaigns across the country. = = As I mentioned in the video, I had my first workout to prepare this morning. It was painful. I haven't jogged in a long time. I jog-walked 3.69 miles at the painfully slow pace of a little over 13 minutes per mile. To jog 69 quarter-mile laps in my October Race is going to take intense preparation, just as winning 51 Senate seats will take intense focus and dedication. = (That's a dollar and change for each mile of the 3.69 miles I jog-walked this morning on my first workout.) = With every workout in preparation for the October race, I'll be thinking about why a Senate majority matters. We are fighting to save our nation from an authoritarian takeover and have the votes for a progressive agenda to serve the people rather than the powerful. After each workout, I'll keep you updated and share thoughts about that agenda. There's no question that some of the Senate races we need to win are going to be difficult. In 2026, we are looking at one of the toughest maps we've ever seen. It includes defending blue seats in tough states like Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire. Then we have to win four more. Impossible? Not at all. Three real possibilities are swing seats in purple states: North Carolina, Maine, and Ohio. And there are multiple states where a great campaign could deliver seat #51. Tough, yes, but we just need one from the group to take the Senate majority. = Let's all lace up our shoes, click on the ActBlue link, and help build a strong foundation to win back the Senate. We need to run laps around Republicans in 2026, which is why I'm asking you to pitch in to my campaign's Race to Save the Senate. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = On your mark. subject: fascism is putting our future at risk

| | Peter, Ron DeSantis’ fascism is seeping into new territory, and if we don’t stop it right now, every Florida student’s future is at risk.

And as a Florida representative, as someone who grew up in public schools in Florida, and as someone who sees Florida youth affected by DeSantis’ fascist policies, this is personal to me.

It’s also undeniable: DeSantis has proven again and again that he _does not care_ about protecting our youth. Instead, he and his extremist buddies are going after education at every school grade level in Florida, depriving students of their basic rights.

**We need to stand as a collective to keep DeSantis and all his far-right extreme cronies from putting Florida youth in danger. But I have to be able to fund this fight – and I’m falling short of my midnight goal.**

[**_This deadline is the perfect time to show the Florida GOP we're ready to fight back at full force. Please, Peter: Help me stand against Ron DeSantis and his fascist agenda by donating $27 to my midnight goal >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/l7hCrE2NeyAZQeE_sruQCA~~/AAPPABA~/5TMsflC69NU_g6UAiOfnxvkVaa9RB1QFaB7WvPLJCn0BsAsJgggL01rLlKs9OMD2h_4AjPqF7IKUQT0e3TDSSSEdgX_vzkEvrdNpTC3ED9a0lcxsgk1ynSIus4UIlHWhvm3_6v0q4ZkipJId8C4afZh0AXbARkHA2FEquwu38bFBZeVYJWQ5aZu0mdW_YyAJpgh44TnEaDmFOBZUR4Nk_3kxwx3zAhjIOFcIAr1cDr4SeDrN6skkbI5hzkExZ60gIW1UAGHVau1V4vK2ayI4I-sEirqKBj9BmZifD1YO0EhFTS2-W9HB69lb2EByH6TPuTlk58o_H8eSibPY-5Wyr1pxVATbfjX6jkwjhaOauLw~) Peter, DeSantis has implemented _ruthless_ policies that directly impact students across all of Florida - starting in elementary and making its way up to universities in the state:
* He’s banned books in all public schools that erase Black and Brown history - even the books you’d least expect.
* He’s directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, with his “Don’t Say Gay” bill - and specifically attacking trans youth, by prohibiting them to get the gender-affirming care they need.
* And of course, proposed a permitless carry bill - that will put hundreds of thousands of Florida students in immediate danger.

This list goes on and on – but these issues alone are enough to take a stand against DeSantis and get him out of office, along with all his far-right MAGA buddies, who are only in it for themselves.

Peter, I ran for Congress because I’ve been fighting people like DeSantis for years, but I know I could not do it alone. So I am asking you to support our movement to fight back against these horrific policies that hurt students and undermine our Democracy. [**_Tonight's midnight deadline is approaching. I need you to donate $27 toward my goal so when the reports of our fundraising efforts come out, the far-right extremists squirm at our results and realize we have strength in numbers they lack. subject: Crickets 🦗🦗🦗

body:
Add your name: Release the Epstein files. |
---
On the campaign trail, Trump promised to hold the abusers who enabled Jeffrey Epstein's abuse accountable and bring them to justice. Now? Crickets. **[I’m calling for the release of the Epstein files. name: James Walkinshaw (via jayjones.com)
subject: Why I’m stepping up to run for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
Friend,
I’m James Walkinshaw — a proud father, lifelong Virginian, and the Democratic Nominee for the special election in Virginia’s 11th District. This is Democrats' FIRST chance to elect a Democrat to the House since the 2024 election, and I don’t take that lightly.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em]
This campaign is personal to me.
I was born and raised in Northern Virginia. My grandfather grew up on a farm near where Dulles Airport stands today. And now, my wife Yvette and I are raising our son Mateo just down the road from where I grew up.
My mom was a nurse. My dad was a plumber. They taught me three lessons I’ve carried with me ever since: Work hard. Do the right thing — especially when it’s not easy. And never back down from a bully.
At 26, I got the opportunity of a lifetime: Congressman Gerry Connolly asked me to be his Chief of Staff. For more than a decade, I helped lead his team in Congress — including during Donald Trump’s first term. We passed the Affordable Care Act, secured major investments for Northern Virginia, and fought back against Trump’s attacks on immigrants, federal workers, and democracy itself.
Then in 2019, I flipped a Republican-held seat on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors — and got to work.
I led the charge to ban guns from libraries and rec centers, stood up for abortion rights after the fall of Roe, funded record teacher pay increases, and delivered real action on climate change — from going solar to reducing plastic waste.
And when Trump’s enforcer, Stephen Miller, threatened to jail me for refusing to turn Fairfax police into ICE agents, I stood my ground. And I always will.
Now, I’m stepping up to run for Congress to keep this seat blue and be the FIRST (of many) Democrats elected to the House since Trump’s win in 2024.
But Republicans are eager to flip this seat from blue to red, and they’re prepared to spend millions of dollars against me. I need my fellow Virginians to stand beside me now more than ever.
Will you split a donation between my campaign and Jay Jones' campaign for Attorney General so we have the resources between now and September 9 to win this critical election? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em?amount=250]
DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em?amount=500]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-walkinshaw_em?]
Thank you for believing in the power of public service — and for believing in this campaign.
— James Walkinshaw

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia

# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7a08776f72&e=5bd167f239)**

---

_**Don't Take the Bait! **_

**Trump's Messaging Scheme by Occupying D.C.**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 27
| Chuck Rocha returns from New Orleans to Washington D.C. where Trump’s show of military force has locals on edge. The two dig into what’s really behind the spectacle—**midterm messaging, crime politics, and redistricting battles.** Chuck assesses the messaging battlefield for the 2026 midterms, while Mike presses that the key to Democrats **winning is through the Latino Vote, rather than pursuing a redistricting fiasco**.

With anecdotes from Netroots Nation, a look at Ruben Gallego’s approach to winning over working-class voters, and a blunt conversation about what Democrats must do to avoid losing the Latino Vote again, you won't want to miss this episode.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Republicans sue to block Newsom’s fast-track California redistricting plan](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=8e8c3a9531&e=5bd167f239) By: The Guardian

Guess what she's running for now? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113622265/564393617/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDY5MDE4YmYtNGE3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vgCstUBnvarrsx3CR7fXnX4w_T7zhitU_732u2R7dMQ=)

Dear friend, You can't make this up. Mylie Biggs, daughter of Congressman Andy Biggs, is running for the Arizona State Senate. Here's what she said about women in office just last year: _"I don't think women should hold office in general. That's a man's position, that's my stance. I think women should run the home."_ Fast forward to today, and she's running to represent Arizona’s 14th legislative district. **This is GOP hypocrisy at its most absurd — and most dangerous.** Biggs went further, saying women "aren't built for" working jobs, that she wouldn't vote for "any female," and that she doesn't want women in the Secret Service or military because "what country wants a woman defending them?" **These remarks don't represent Arizona values. They represent the backwards ideology that the modern GOP is peddling across our country** **[Will you donate today to help Arizona Democrats fight back against this extremist hypocrisy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113622266/564393618/1948356670?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDY5MDE4YmYtNGE3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vgCstUBnvarrsx3CR7fXnX4w_T7zhitU_732u2R7dMQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113622267/564393619/1948356670?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDY5MDE4YmYtNGE3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vgCstUBnvarrsx3CR7fXnX4w_T7zhitU_732u2R7dMQ=)

This isn't just one person's warped views. This is the pattern we see from Republicans everywhere:
* They rail against government spending while taking millions in federal subsidies.
* They attack public education while sending their kids to elite schools.
* They claim to support "family values" while tearing families apart through deportations.

**The hypocrisy would be laughable if it weren't so harmful.**
Currently, Mylie Biggs is running unopposed. Her father Andy Biggs is running for governor. Their campaigns showcase everything wrong with today's GOP — extremist views wrapped in breathtaking hypocrisy.
**We can't let this backwards ideology spread unchallenged.**
Biggs thinks women should stay home and "nurture." Meanwhile, Democratic women like Gov. Katie Hobbs and AG Kris Mayes, both running for re-election in 2026, are leading Arizona forward on healthcare, education, and economic opportunity
**[Chip in now to help Arizona Democrats continue fighting for equality and against Republican double standards.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113622273/564393625/548103770?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDY5MDE4YmYtNGE3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vgCstUBnvarrsx3CR7fXnX4w_T7zhitU_732u2R7dMQ=)**
[CHIP IN TO FIGHT EXTREMISM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113622275/564393627/1948356670?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250819_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDY5MDE4YmYtNGE3ZC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vgCstUBnvarrsx3CR7fXnX4w_T7zhitU_732u2R7dMQ=)

They're counting on us to be so shocked by their hypocrisy that we forget to organize against it.
We're not forgetting anything.
With determination,
Arizona Democratic Party
P.S. Mylie Biggs worked for Turning Point Action and the Arizona Free Enterprise Club — the same extremist groups pushing book bans, attacking trans kids, and undermining public education. It’s hypocritical and a coordinated attack on Arizona values. Their campaigns showcase everything wrong with today's GOP — extremist views wrapped in breathtaking hypocrisy. We can't let this backwards ideology spread unchallenged. Biggs thinks women should stay home and "nurture." Meanwhile, Democratic women like Gov. Katie Hobbs and AG Kris Mayes, both running for re-election in 2026, are leading Arizona forward on healthcare, education, and economic opportunity = = They're counting on us to be so shocked by their hypocrisy that we forget to organize against it. We're not forgetting anything. With determination, Arizona Democratic Party P.S. Mylie Biggs worked for Turning Point Action and the Arizona Free Enterprise Club — the same extremist groups pushing book bans, attacking trans kids, and undermining public education. It’s hypocritical and a coordinated attack on Arizona values. = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG
